Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(******************************************************************************************

 The displayed category of strict 2-sided displayed categories

 In this file, we define the displayed category of strict 2-sided displayed categories over
 the category of strict categories. The objects over a strict category `C` are strict
 2-sided displayed categories over `C` and `C`, and the morphisms over a functor `F` are
 2-sided displayed functors over `F` and `F`.

 In essence, this proof is nothing more than a more complicated, convoluted, and technical
 version of the proof that the category of strict categories is univalent. The extra work
 comes mainly from the fact that we are looking at 2-sided displayed categories instead of
 categories.

 Contents
 1. The data of the displayed category of 2-sided displayed categories
 2. Transport lemmas for this displayed category
 3. The laws
 4. The displayed category of strict 2-sided displayed categories
 5. The proof that it is univalent
 5.1. Characterization of the isomorphisms
 5.2. The actual proof of univalence

 ******************************************************************************************)

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Prelude.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Setcategories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Categories.CategoryOfSetCategories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.PrecategoryBinProduct.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.NaturalTransformations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Total.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Univalence.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Constructions.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.DisplayedCatEq.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Examples.DispFunctorPair.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.TwoSidedDisplayedCats.TwoSidedDispCat.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.TwoSidedDisplayedCats.DisplayedFunctor.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.TwoSidedDisplayedCats.DisplayedNatTrans.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.TwoSidedDisplayedCats.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.TwoSidedDisplayedCats.Univalence.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.TwoSidedDisplayedCats.Strictness.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.TwoSidedDisplayedCats.TransportLaws.

Local Open Scope cat.

(** * 1. The data of the displayed category of 2-sided displayed categories *)

disp_cat_ob_mor cat_of_setcategory


disp_cat_ob_mor cat_of_setcategory

  
cat_of_setcategory → UU
(λ obd : cat_of_setcategory → UU,
 ∏ x y : cat_of_setcategory,
 obd x → obd y → cat_of_setcategory ⟦ x, y ⟧ → UU)
  ?pr1

  
cat_of_setcategory → UU
 exact (λ (C : setcategory), strict_twosided_disp_cat C C).
  
(λ obd : cat_of_setcategory → UU,
 ∏ x y : cat_of_setcategory,
 obd x → obd y → cat_of_setcategory ⟦ x, y ⟧ → UU)
  (λ C : setcategory, strict_twosided_disp_cat C C)
 exact (λ (C₁ C₂ : setcategory) D₁ D₂ (F : C₁ ⟶ C₂),
           twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂).
Defined.


disp_cat_id_comp cat_of_setcategory
  disp_cat_ob_mor_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat


disp_cat_id_comp cat_of_setcategory
  disp_cat_ob_mor_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat

  
∏ (x : cat_of_setcategory)
(xx : disp_cat_ob_mor_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat x),
xx -->[ identity x] xx
∏ (x y z : cat_of_setcategory)
(f : cat_of_setcategory ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : cat_of_setcategory ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(xx : disp_cat_ob_mor_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat x)
(yy : disp_cat_ob_mor_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat y)
(zz : disp_cat_ob_mor_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat z),
xx -->[ f] yy → yy -->[ g] zz → xx -->[ f · g] zz

  
∏ (x : cat_of_setcategory)
(xx : disp_cat_ob_mor_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat x),
xx -->[ identity x] xx
 exact (λ (C : setcategory) (D : strict_twosided_disp_cat C C),
           twosided_disp_functor_identity D).
  
∏ (x y z : cat_of_setcategory)
(f : cat_of_setcategory ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : cat_of_setcategory ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(xx : disp_cat_ob_mor_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat x)
(yy : disp_cat_ob_mor_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat y)
(zz : disp_cat_ob_mor_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat z),
xx -->[ f] yy → yy -->[ g] zz → xx -->[ f · g] zz
 exact (λ (C₁ C₂ C₃ : setcategory)
             (F : C₁ ⟶ C₂)
             (G : C₂ ⟶ C₃)
             (D₁ : strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁)
             (D₂ : strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂)
             (D₃ : strict_twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃)
             (FF : twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂)
             (GG : twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃),
           comp_twosided_disp_functor FF GG).
Defined.


disp_cat_data cat_of_setcategory


disp_cat_data cat_of_setcategory

  
disp_cat_ob_mor cat_of_setcategory
disp_cat_id_comp cat_of_setcategory ?pr1

  
disp_cat_ob_mor cat_of_setcategory
 exact disp_cat_ob_mor_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat.
  
disp_cat_id_comp cat_of_setcategory
  disp_cat_ob_mor_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat
 exact disp_cat_id_comp_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat.
Defined.

(** * 2. Transport lemmas for this displayed category *)

C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
p: F = G
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
xy: D₁ x y
transportb
  (λ H : C₁ ⟶ C₂, twosided_disp_functor H H D₁ D₂) p
  GG x y xy =
transportb_disp_ob2 (path_functor_ob p x)
  (path_functor_ob p y) (GG x y xy)


C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
p: F = G
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
xy: D₁ x y
transportb
  (λ H : C₁ ⟶ C₂, twosided_disp_functor H H D₁ D₂) p
  GG x y xy =
transportb_disp_ob2 (path_functor_ob p x)
  (path_functor_ob p y) (GG x y xy)

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
xy: D₁ x y
GG x y xy = GG x y xy

  apply idpath.
Defined.


C₁, C₂: setcategory
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FD: functor_data C₁ C₂
HF₁, HF₂: is_functor FD
F:= make_functor FD HF₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G:= make_functor FD HF₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
p: F = G
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
xy: D₁ x y
transportb
  (λ H : C₁ ⟶ C₂, twosided_disp_functor H H D₁ D₂) p
  GG x y xy = GG x y xy


C₁, C₂: setcategory
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FD: functor_data C₁ C₂
HF₁, HF₂: is_functor FD
F:= make_functor FD HF₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G:= make_functor FD HF₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
p: F = G
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
xy: D₁ x y
transportb
  (λ H : C₁ ⟶ C₂, twosided_disp_functor H H D₁ D₂) p
  GG x y xy = GG x y xy

  
C₁, C₂: setcategory
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FD: functor_data C₁ C₂
HF₁, HF₂: is_functor FD
F:= make_functor FD HF₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G:= make_functor FD HF₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
p: F = G
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
xy: D₁ x y
transportb
  (λ H : C₁ ⟶ C₂, twosided_disp_functor H H D₁ D₂) p
  GG x y xy = ?b
C₁, C₂: setcategory
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FD: functor_data C₁ C₂
HF₁, HF₂: is_functor FD
F:= make_functor FD HF₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G:= make_functor FD HF₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
p: F = G
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
xy: D₁ x y
?b = GG x y xy

  
C₁, C₂: setcategory
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FD: functor_data C₁ C₂
HF₁, HF₂: is_functor FD
F:= make_functor FD HF₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G:= make_functor FD HF₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
p: F = G
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
xy: D₁ x y
transportb
  (λ H : C₁ ⟶ C₂, twosided_disp_functor H H D₁ D₂) p
  GG x y xy = ?b

    apply transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob_help.
  
C₁, C₂: setcategory
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FD: functor_data C₁ C₂
HF₁, HF₂: is_functor FD
F:= make_functor FD HF₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G:= make_functor FD HF₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
p: F = G
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
xy: D₁ x y
transportb_disp_ob2 (path_functor_ob p x)
  (path_functor_ob p y) (GG x y xy) = GG x y xy

  
C₁, C₂: setcategory
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FD: functor_data C₁ C₂
HF₁, HF₂: is_functor FD
F:= make_functor FD HF₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G:= make_functor FD HF₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
p: F = G
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
xy: D₁ x y
path_functor_ob p x = idpath (F x)
C₁, C₂: setcategory
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FD: functor_data C₁ C₂
HF₁, HF₂: is_functor FD
F:= make_functor FD HF₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G:= make_functor FD HF₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
p: F = G
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
xy: D₁ x y
r₁: path_functor_ob p x = idpath (F x)
transportb_disp_ob2 (path_functor_ob p x)
  (path_functor_ob p y) (GG x y xy) = GG x y xy

  
C₁, C₂: setcategory
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FD: functor_data C₁ C₂
HF₁, HF₂: is_functor FD
F:= make_functor FD HF₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G:= make_functor FD HF₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
p: F = G
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
xy: D₁ x y
path_functor_ob p x = idpath (F x)

    apply isaset_ob.
  
C₁, C₂: setcategory
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FD: functor_data C₁ C₂
HF₁, HF₂: is_functor FD
F:= make_functor FD HF₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂

p: F = G
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
xy: D₁ x y
r₁: path_functor_ob p x = idpath (F x)
transportb_disp_ob2 (path_functor_ob p x)
  (path_functor_ob p y) (GG x y xy) = GG x y xy

  
C₁, C₂: setcategory
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FD: functor_data C₁ C₂
HF₁, HF₂: is_functor FD
F:= make_functor FD HF₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G:= make_functor FD HF₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
p: F = G
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
xy: D₁ x y
r₁: path_functor_ob p x = idpath (F x)
path_functor_ob p y = idpath (F y)
C₁, C₂: setcategory
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FD: functor_data C₁ C₂
HF₁, HF₂: is_functor FD
F:= make_functor FD HF₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G:= make_functor FD HF₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
p: F = G
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
xy: D₁ x y
r₁: path_functor_ob p x = idpath (F x)
r₂: path_functor_ob p y = idpath (F y)
transportb_disp_ob2 (path_functor_ob p x)
  (path_functor_ob p y) (GG x y xy) = GG x y xy

  
C₁, C₂: setcategory
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FD: functor_data C₁ C₂
HF₁, HF₂: is_functor FD
F:= make_functor FD HF₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G:= make_functor FD HF₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
p: F = G
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
xy: D₁ x y
r₁: path_functor_ob p x = idpath (F x)
path_functor_ob p y = idpath (F y)

    apply isaset_ob.
  
C₁, C₂: setcategory
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FD: functor_data C₁ C₂
HF₁, HF₂: is_functor FD
F:= make_functor FD HF₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G:= make_functor FD HF₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
p: F = G
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
xy: D₁ x y
r₁: path_functor_ob p x = idpath (F x)
r₂: path_functor_ob p y = idpath (F y)
transportb_disp_ob2 (path_functor_ob p x)
  (path_functor_ob p y) (GG x y xy) = GG x y xy

  
C₁, C₂: setcategory
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FD: functor_data C₁ C₂
HF₁, HF₂: is_functor FD
F:= make_functor FD HF₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G:= make_functor FD HF₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
p: F = G
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
xy: D₁ x y
r₁: path_functor_ob p x = idpath (F x)
r₂: path_functor_ob p y = idpath (F y)
transportb_disp_ob2 (idpath (F x)) (idpath (F y))
  (GG x y xy) = GG x y xy

  
C₁, C₂: setcategory
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FD: functor_data C₁ C₂
HF₁, HF₂: is_functor FD
F:= make_functor FD HF₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G:= make_functor FD HF₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
p: F = G
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
xy: D₁ x y
r₁: path_functor_ob p x = idpath (F x)
r₂: path_functor_ob p y = idpath (F y)
GG x y xy = GG x y xy

  apply idpath.
Qed.


C₁, C₂: setcategory
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
p: F = G
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
idtoiso (idpath (F x₁))
· idtoiso (path_functor_ob p x₁) · # G f
· idtoiso (! path_functor_ob p x₂)
· idtoiso (idpath (F x₂)) = # F f


C₁, C₂: setcategory
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
p: F = G
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
idtoiso (idpath (F x₁))
· idtoiso (path_functor_ob p x₁) · # G f
· idtoiso (! path_functor_ob p x₂)
· idtoiso (idpath (F x₂)) = # F f

  
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
identity (F x₁) · identity (F x₁) · # F f
· identity (F x₂) · identity (F x₂) = # F f

  
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
# F f · identity (F x₂) · identity (F x₂) = # F f

  
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
# F f = # F f

  apply idpath.
Qed.


C₁, C₂: setcategory
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
p: F = G
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₁ D₂
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
(#2 (transportb
       (λ H : C₁ ⟶ C₂, twosided_disp_functor H H D₁ D₂)
       p GG)) fg =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
        (idpath (F y₁))
        (transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob_help
           D₁ D₂ p GG xy₁) ;;2 transportb_disp_ob2_mor
                                 (path_functor_ob p x₁)
                                 (path_functor_ob p y₁)
                                 (GG x₁ y₁ xy₁) ;;2 
      (#2 GG) fg ;;2 transportb_disp_ob2_inv
                       (path_functor_ob p x₂)
                       (path_functor_ob p y₂)
                       (GG x₂ y₂ xy₂) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                            (idpath
                                               (F x₂))
                                            (idpath
                                               (F y₂))
                                            (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob_help
                                                 D₁ D₂
                                                 p GG
                                                 xy₂))


C₁, C₂: setcategory
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
p: F = G
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₁ D₂
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
(#2 (transportb
       (λ H : C₁ ⟶ C₂, twosided_disp_functor H H D₁ D₂)
       p GG)) fg =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
        (idpath (F y₁))
        (transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob_help
           D₁ D₂ p GG xy₁) ;;2 transportb_disp_ob2_mor
                                 (path_functor_ob p x₁)
                                 (path_functor_ob p y₁)
                                 (GG x₁ y₁ xy₁) ;;2 
      (#2 GG) fg ;;2 transportb_disp_ob2_inv
                       (path_functor_ob p x₂)
                       (path_functor_ob p y₂)
                       (GG x₂ y₂ xy₂) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                            (idpath
                                               (F x₂))
                                            (idpath
                                               (F y₂))
                                            (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob_help
                                                 D₁ D₂
                                                 p GG
                                                 xy₂))

  
C₁, C₂: setcategory
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
(#2 GG) fg =
trf₂ (id_two_disp (GG x₁ y₁ xy₁) ;;2 id_two_disp
                                       (GG x₁ y₁ xy₁) ;;2 
      (#2 GG) fg ;;2 id_two_disp (GG x₂ y₂ xy₂) ;;2 
      id_two_disp (GG x₂ y₂ xy₂))

  
C₁, C₂: setcategory
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
(#2 GG) fg =
trf₂ (trb₂ id_two_disp (GG x₁ y₁ xy₁) ;;2 (#2 GG) fg ;;2 
      id_two_disp (GG x₂ y₂ xy₂) ;;2 id_two_disp
                                       (GG x₂ y₂ xy₂))

  
C₁, C₂: setcategory
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
(#2 GG) fg =
trf₂ (trb₂ (trb₂ (trb₂ id_two_disp (GG x₁ y₁ xy₁) ;;2 
                  (#2 GG) fg)))

  
C₁, C₂: setcategory
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
(#2 GG) fg =
trf₂ (trf₂ (trf₂ (trf₂ id_two_disp (GG x₁ y₁ xy₁) ;;2 
                  (#2 GG) fg)))

  
C₁, C₂: setcategory
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
(#2 GG) fg =
trf₂ (trf₂ (trf₂ (trf₂ (id_two_disp (GG x₁ y₁ xy₁) ;;2 
                        (#2 GG) fg))))

  
C₁, C₂: setcategory
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
(#2 GG) fg =
trf₂ (trf₂ (trf₂ (trf₂ (trb₂ (#2 GG) fg))))

  
C₁, C₂: setcategory
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
(#2 GG) fg =
trf₂ (trf₂ (trf₂ (trf₂ (trf₂ (#2 GG) fg))))

  
C₁, C₂: setcategory
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
(#2 GG) fg = trf₂ (#2 GG) fg

  
C₁, C₂: setcategory
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ (#2 GG) fg = (#2 GG) fg

  apply transportf_disp_mor2_idpath.
Qed.


C₁, C₂: setcategory
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FD: functor_data C₁ C₂
HF₁, HF₂: is_functor FD
F:= make_functor FD HF₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G:= make_functor FD HF₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
p: F = G
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₁ D₂
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
(#2 (transportb
       (λ H : C₁ ⟶ C₂, twosided_disp_functor H H D₁ D₂)
       p GG)) fg =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp
        (idpath (make_functor F HF₁ x₁))
        (idpath (make_functor F HF₁ y₁))
        (transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
           F HF₁ HF₂ p GG xy₁) ;;2 (#2 GG) fg ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp
        (idpath (make_functor F HF₁ x₂))
        (idpath (make_functor F HF₁ y₂))
        (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
             F HF₁ HF₂ p GG xy₂))


C₁, C₂: setcategory
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FD: functor_data C₁ C₂
HF₁, HF₂: is_functor FD
F:= make_functor FD HF₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G:= make_functor FD HF₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
p: F = G
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₁ D₂
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
(#2 (transportb
       (λ H : C₁ ⟶ C₂, twosided_disp_functor H H D₁ D₂)
       p GG)) fg =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp
        (idpath (make_functor F HF₁ x₁))
        (idpath (make_functor F HF₁ y₁))
        (transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
           F HF₁ HF₂ p GG xy₁) ;;2 (#2 GG) fg ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp
        (idpath (make_functor F HF₁ x₂))
        (idpath (make_functor F HF₁ y₂))
        (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
             F HF₁ HF₂ p GG xy₂))

  
C₁, C₂: setcategory
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FD: functor_data C₁ C₂
HF₁, HF₂: is_functor FD
F:= make_functor FD HF₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G:= make_functor FD HF₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
p: F = G
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₁ D₂
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
        (idpath (F y₁))
        (transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob_help
           D₁ D₂ p GG xy₁) ;;2 transportb_disp_ob2_mor
                                 (path_functor_ob p x₁)
                                 (path_functor_ob p y₁)
                                 (GG x₁ y₁ xy₁) ;;2 
      (#2 GG) fg ;;2 transportb_disp_ob2_inv
                       (path_functor_ob p x₂)
                       (path_functor_ob p y₂)
                       (GG x₂ y₂ xy₂) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                            (idpath
                                               (F x₂))
                                            (idpath
                                               (F y₂))
                                            (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob_help
                                                 D₁ D₂
                                                 p GG
                                                 xy₂)) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp
        (idpath (make_functor F HF₁ x₁))
        (idpath (make_functor F HF₁ y₁))
        (transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
           F HF₁ HF₂ p GG xy₁) ;;2 (#2 GG) fg ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp
        (idpath (make_functor F HF₁ x₂))
        (idpath (make_functor F HF₁ y₂))
        (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
             F HF₁ HF₂ p GG xy₂))

  
C₁, C₂: setcategory
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FD: functor_data C₁ C₂
HF₁, HF₂: is_functor FD
F:= make_functor FD HF₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G:= make_functor FD HF₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
p: F = G
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₁ D₂
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
        (idpath (F y₁))
        (transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob_help
           D₁ D₂ p GG xy₁) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                 (path_functor_ob p x₁)
                                 (path_functor_ob p y₁)
                                 (transportb_disp_ob2_mor_path
                                    (path_functor_ob p
                                       x₁)
                                    (path_functor_ob p
                                       y₁)
                                    (GG x₁ y₁ xy₁)) ;;2 
      (#2 GG) fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                       (! path_functor_ob p x₂)
                       (! path_functor_ob p y₂)
                       (transportb_disp_ob2_inv_path
                          (path_functor_ob p x₂)
                          (path_functor_ob p y₂)
                          (GG x₂ y₂ xy₂)) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                (idpath
                                                 (F x₂))
                                                (idpath
                                                 (F y₂))
                                                (! 
                                                 transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob_help
                                                 D₁ D₂
                                                 p GG
                                                 xy₂)) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp
        (idpath (make_functor F HF₁ x₁))
        (idpath (make_functor F HF₁ y₁))
        (transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
           F HF₁ HF₂ p GG xy₁) ;;2 (#2 GG) fg ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp
        (idpath (make_functor F HF₁ x₂))
        (idpath (make_functor F HF₁ y₂))
        (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
             F HF₁ HF₂ p GG xy₂))

  
C₁, C₂: setcategory
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FD: functor_data C₁ C₂
HF₁, HF₂: is_functor FD
F:= make_functor FD HF₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G:= make_functor FD HF₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
p: F = G
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₁ D₂
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
        (idpath (F y₁))
        (transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob_help
           D₁ D₂ p GG xy₁) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                 (path_functor_ob p x₁)
                                 (path_functor_ob p y₁)
                                 (transportb_disp_ob2_mor_path
                                    (path_functor_ob p
                                       x₁)
                                    (path_functor_ob p
                                       y₁)
                                    (GG x₁ y₁ xy₁)) ;;2 
      (#2 GG) fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                       (! path_functor_ob p x₂)
                       (! path_functor_ob p y₂)
                       (transportb_disp_ob2_inv_path
                          (path_functor_ob p x₂)
                          (path_functor_ob p y₂)
                          (GG x₂ y₂ xy₂)) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                (idpath
                                                 (F x₂))
                                                (idpath
                                                 (F y₂))
                                                (! 
                                                 transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob_help
                                                 D₁ D₂
                                                 p GG
                                                 xy₂)) =
?b
C₁, C₂: setcategory
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FD: functor_data C₁ C₂
HF₁, HF₂: is_functor FD
F:= make_functor FD HF₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G:= make_functor FD HF₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
p: F = G
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₁ D₂
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
?b =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp
        (idpath (make_functor F HF₁ x₁))
        (idpath (make_functor F HF₁ y₁))
        (transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
           F HF₁ HF₂ p GG xy₁) ;;2 (#2 GG) fg ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp
        (idpath (make_functor F HF₁ x₂))
        (idpath (make_functor F HF₁ y₂))
        (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
             F HF₁ HF₂ p GG xy₂))

  
C₁, C₂: setcategory
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FD: functor_data C₁ C₂
HF₁, HF₂: is_functor FD
F:= make_functor FD HF₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G:= make_functor FD HF₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
p: F = G
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₁ D₂
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
        (idpath (F y₁))
        (transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob_help
           D₁ D₂ p GG xy₁) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                 (path_functor_ob p x₁)
                                 (path_functor_ob p y₁)
                                 (transportb_disp_ob2_mor_path
                                    (path_functor_ob p
                                       x₁)
                                    (path_functor_ob p
                                       y₁)
                                    (GG x₁ y₁ xy₁)) ;;2 
      (#2 GG) fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                       (! path_functor_ob p x₂)
                       (! path_functor_ob p y₂)
                       (transportb_disp_ob2_inv_path
                          (path_functor_ob p x₂)
                          (path_functor_ob p y₂)
                          (GG x₂ y₂ xy₂)) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                (idpath
                                                 (F x₂))
                                                (idpath
                                                 (F y₂))
                                                (! 
                                                 transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob_help
                                                 D₁ D₂
                                                 p GG
                                                 xy₂)) =
?b

    
C₁, C₂: setcategory
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FD: functor_data C₁ C₂
HF₁, HF₂: is_functor FD
F:= make_functor FD HF₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G:= make_functor FD HF₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
p: F = G
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₁ D₂
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁)) (idpath (F y₁))
  (transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob_help
     D₁ D₂ p GG xy₁) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                           (path_functor_ob p x₁)
                           (path_functor_ob p y₁)
                           (transportb_disp_ob2_mor_path
                              (path_functor_ob p x₁)
                              (path_functor_ob p y₁)
                              (GG x₁ y₁ xy₁)) ;;2 
(#2 GG) fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                 (! path_functor_ob p x₂)
                 (! path_functor_ob p y₂)
                 (transportb_disp_ob2_inv_path
                    (path_functor_ob p x₂)
                    (path_functor_ob p y₂)
                    (GG x₂ y₂ xy₂)) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                          (idpath
                                             (F x₂))
                                          (idpath
                                             (F y₂))
                                          (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob_help
                                               D₁ D₂ p
                                               GG xy₂) =
?t2

    
C₁, C₂: setcategory
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FD: functor_data C₁ C₂
HF₁, HF₂: is_functor FD
F:= make_functor FD HF₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G:= make_functor FD HF₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
p: F = G
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₁ D₂
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁)) (idpath (F y₁))
  (transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob_help
     D₁ D₂ p GG xy₁) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                           (path_functor_ob p x₁)
                           (path_functor_ob p y₁)
                           (transportb_disp_ob2_mor_path
                              (path_functor_ob p x₁)
                              (path_functor_ob p y₁)
                              (GG x₁ y₁ xy₁)) = ?y'

    apply idtoiso_twosided_disp_concat_strict.
  
C₁, C₂: setcategory
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FD: functor_data C₁ C₂
HF₁, HF₂: is_functor FD
F:= make_functor FD HF₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G:= make_functor FD HF₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
p: F = G
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₁ D₂
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ (trb₂ idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
             (idpath (F y₁))
             (idtoiso_twosided_disp_concat_disp_path
                (transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob_help
                   D₁ D₂ p GG xy₁)
                (transportb_disp_ob2_mor_path
                   (path_functor_ob p x₁)
                   (path_functor_ob p y₁)
                   (GG x₁ y₁ xy₁))) ;;2 (#2 GG) fg ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (! path_functor_ob p x₂)
        (! path_functor_ob p y₂)
        (transportb_disp_ob2_inv_path
           (path_functor_ob p x₂)
           (path_functor_ob p y₂) (GG x₂ y₂ xy₂)) ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
        (idpath (F y₂))
        (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob_help
             D₁ D₂ p GG xy₂)) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp
        (idpath (make_functor F HF₁ x₁))
        (idpath (make_functor F HF₁ y₁))
        (transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
           F HF₁ HF₂ p GG xy₁) ;;2 (#2 GG) fg ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp
        (idpath (make_functor F HF₁ x₂))
        (idpath (make_functor F HF₁ y₂))
        (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
             F HF₁ HF₂ p GG xy₂))

  
C₁, C₂: setcategory
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FD: functor_data C₁ C₂
HF₁, HF₂: is_functor FD
F:= make_functor FD HF₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G:= make_functor FD HF₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
p: F = G
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₁ D₂
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ (trf₂ idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
             (idpath (F y₁))
             (idtoiso_twosided_disp_concat_disp_path
                (transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob_help
                   D₁ D₂ p GG xy₁)
                (transportb_disp_ob2_mor_path
                   (path_functor_ob p x₁)
                   (path_functor_ob p y₁)
                   (GG x₁ y₁ xy₁))) ;;2 (#2 GG) fg ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (! path_functor_ob p x₂)
        (! path_functor_ob p y₂)
        (transportb_disp_ob2_inv_path
           (path_functor_ob p x₂)
           (path_functor_ob p y₂) (GG x₂ y₂ xy₂)) ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
        (idpath (F y₂))
        (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob_help
             D₁ D₂ p GG xy₂)) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp
        (idpath (make_functor F HF₁ x₁))
        (idpath (make_functor F HF₁ y₁))
        (transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
           F HF₁ HF₂ p GG xy₁) ;;2 (#2 GG) fg ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp
        (idpath (make_functor F HF₁ x₂))
        (idpath (make_functor F HF₁ y₂))
        (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
             F HF₁ HF₂ p GG xy₂))

  
C₁, C₂: setcategory

D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂

f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧

xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
              (idpath (F y₁))
              (idtoiso_twosided_disp_concat_disp_path
                 (transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob_help
                    D₁ D₂ p GG xy₁)
                 (transportb_disp_ob2_mor_path
                    (path_functor_ob p x₁)
                    (path_functor_ob p y₁)
                    (GG x₁ y₁ xy₁))) ;;2 (#2 GG) fg ;;2 
            idtoiso_twosided_disp
              (! path_functor_ob p x₂)
              (! path_functor_ob p y₂)
              (transportb_disp_ob2_inv_path
                 (path_functor_ob p x₂)
                 (path_functor_ob p y₂) (GG x₂ y₂ xy₂)) ;;2 
            idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
              (idpath (F y₂))
              (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob_help
                   D₁ D₂ p GG xy₂))) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp
        (idpath (make_functor F HF₁ x₁))
        (idpath (make_functor F HF₁ y₁))
        (transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
           F HF₁ HF₂ p GG xy₁) ;;2 (#2 GG) fg ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp
        (idpath (make_functor F HF₁ x₂))
        (idpath (make_functor F HF₁ y₂))
        (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
             F HF₁ HF₂ p GG xy₂))

  
C₁, C₂: setcategory
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂

p: F = G
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₁ D₂
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
        (idpath (F y₁))
        (idtoiso_twosided_disp_concat_disp_path
           (transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob_help
              D₁ D₂ p GG xy₁)
           (transportb_disp_ob2_mor_path
              (path_functor_ob p x₁)
              (path_functor_ob p y₁) (GG x₁ y₁ xy₁))) ;;2 
      (#2 GG) fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                       (! path_functor_ob p x₂)
                       (! path_functor_ob p y₂)
                       (transportb_disp_ob2_inv_path
                          (path_functor_ob p x₂)
                          (path_functor_ob p y₂)
                          (GG x₂ y₂ xy₂)) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                (idpath
                                                 (F x₂))
                                                (idpath
                                                 (F y₂))
                                                (! 
                                                 transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob_help
                                                 D₁ D₂
                                                 p GG
                                                 xy₂)) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp
        (idpath (make_functor F HF₁ x₁))
        (idpath (make_functor F HF₁ y₁))
        (transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
           F HF₁ HF₂ p GG xy₁) ;;2 (#2 GG) fg ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp
        (idpath (make_functor F HF₁ x₂))
        (idpath (make_functor F HF₁ y₂))
        (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
             F HF₁ HF₂ p GG xy₂))

f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧

xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))

               (! path_functor_ob p x₂)

                  (path_functor_ob p x₂)
                  (path_functor_ob p y₂)
                  (GG x₂ y₂ xy₂)) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                        (idpath (F x₂))
                                        (idpath (F y₂))
                                        (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob_help
                                             D₁ D₂ p
                                             GG xy₂)))) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp
        (idpath (make_functor F HF₁ x₁))
        (idpath (make_functor F HF₁ y₁))
        (transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
           F HF₁ HF₂ p GG xy₁) ;;2 (#2 GG) fg ;;2

        (idpath (make_functor F HF₁ x₂))
        (idpath (make_functor F HF₁ y₂))
        (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
             F HF₁ HF₂ p GG xy₂))

xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂

?b
C₁, C₂: setcategory
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FD: functor_data C₁ C₂
HF₁, HF₂: is_functor FD
F:= make_functor FD HF₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G:= make_functor FD HF₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
p: F = G
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₁ D₂
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C₁

xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
?b =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp
        (idpath (make_functor F HF₁ x₁))
        (idpath (make_functor F HF₁ y₁))
        (transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
           F HF₁ HF₂ p GG xy₁) ;;2 (#2 GG) fg ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp
        (idpath (make_functor F HF₁ x₂))
        (idpath (make_functor F HF₁ y₂))
        (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
             F HF₁ HF₂ p GG xy₂))

                                                 (idpath

                                                 D₁ D₂

C₁, C₂: setcategory
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FD: functor_data C₁ C₂
HF₁, HF₂: is_functor FD
F:= make_functor FD HF₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G:= make_functor FD HF₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
p: F = G
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₁ D₂
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
idtoiso_twosided_disp (! path_functor_ob p x₂)
  (! path_functor_ob p y₂)
  (transportb_disp_ob2_inv_path (path_functor_ob p x₂)
     (path_functor_ob p y₂) (GG x₂ y₂ xy₂)) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (F x₂))
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (F y₂))
                                                 (! 
                                                 transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob_help
                                                 D₁ D₂
                                                 p GG
                                                 xy₂) =
?t2

    apply idtoiso_twosided_disp_concat_strict.
  
C₁, C₂: setcategory
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FD: functor_data C₁ C₂
HF₁, HF₂: is_functor FD
F:= make_functor FD HF₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G:= make_functor FD HF₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
p: F = G
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₁ D₂
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
        (idpath (F y₁))
        (idtoiso_twosided_disp_concat_disp_path
           (transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob_help
              D₁ D₂ p GG xy₁)
           (transportb_disp_ob2_mor_path
              (path_functor_ob p x₁)
              (path_functor_ob p y₁) (GG x₁ y₁ xy₁))) ;;2 
      (#2 GG) fg ;;2 (trb₂ idtoiso_twosided_disp
                             (idpath (G x₂))
                             (idpath (G y₂))
                             (idtoiso_twosided_disp_concat_disp_path
                                (transportb_disp_ob2_inv_path
                                   (path_functor_ob p
                                      x₂)
                                   (path_functor_ob p
                                      y₂)
                                   (GG x₂ y₂ xy₂))
                                (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob_help
                                     D₁ D₂ p GG xy₂)))) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp
        (idpath (make_functor F HF₁ x₁))
        (idpath (make_functor F HF₁ y₁))
        (transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
           F HF₁ HF₂ p GG xy₁) ;;2 (#2 GG) fg ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp
        (idpath (make_functor F HF₁ x₂))
        (idpath (make_functor F HF₁ y₂))
        (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
             F HF₁ HF₂ p GG xy₂))

D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FD: functor_data C₁ C₂
HF₁, HF₂: is_functor FD
F:= make_functor FD HF₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G:= make_functor FD HF₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
p: F = G
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₁ D₂
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
              (idpath (F y₁))
              (idtoiso_twosided_disp_concat_disp_path
                 (transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob_help
                    D₁ D₂ p GG xy₁)
                 (transportb_disp_ob2_mor_path
                    (path_functor_ob p x₁)
                    (path_functor_ob p y₁)
                    (GG x₁ y₁ xy₁))) ;;2 (#2 GG) fg ;;2 
            idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G x₂))
              (idpath (G y₂))
              (idtoiso_twosided_disp_concat_disp_path
                 (transportb_disp_ob2_inv_path
                    (path_functor_ob p x₂)
                    (path_functor_ob p y₂)
                    (GG x₂ y₂ xy₂))
                 (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob_help
                      D₁ D₂ p GG xy₂)))) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp
        (idpath (make_functor F HF₁ x₁))
        (idpath (make_functor F HF₁ y₁))
        (transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
           F HF₁ HF₂ p GG xy₁) ;;2 (#2 GG) fg ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp
        (idpath (make_functor F HF₁ x₂))
        (idpath (make_functor F HF₁ y₂))
        (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
             F HF₁ HF₂ p GG xy₂))

  
C₁, C₂: setcategory
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FD: functor_data C₁ C₂
HF₁, HF₂: is_functor FD
F:= make_functor FD HF₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G:= make_functor FD HF₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
p: F = G
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₁ D₂
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
        (idpath (F y₁))
        (idtoiso_twosided_disp_concat_disp_path
           (transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob_help
              D₁ D₂ p GG xy₁)
           (transportb_disp_ob2_mor_path
              (path_functor_ob p x₁)
              (path_functor_ob p y₁) (GG x₁ y₁ xy₁))) ;;2 
      (#2 GG) fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                       (idpath (G x₂)) (idpath (G y₂))
                       (idtoiso_twosided_disp_concat_disp_path
                          (transportb_disp_ob2_inv_path
                             (path_functor_ob p x₂)
                             (path_functor_ob p y₂)
                             (GG x₂ y₂ xy₂))
                          (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob_help
                               D₁ D₂ p GG xy₂))) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp
        (idpath (make_functor F HF₁ x₁))
        (idpath (make_functor F HF₁ y₁))
        (transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
           F HF₁ HF₂ p GG xy₁) ;;2 (#2 GG) fg ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp
        (idpath (make_functor F HF₁ x₂))
        (idpath (make_functor F HF₁ y₂))
        (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
             F HF₁ HF₂ p GG xy₂))

  
C₁, C₂: setcategory
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FD: functor_data C₁ C₂
HF₁, HF₂: is_functor FD
F:= make_functor FD HF₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G:= make_functor FD HF₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
p: F = G
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₁ D₂
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁)) (idpath (F y₁))
  (idtoiso_twosided_disp_concat_disp_path
     (transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob_help
        D₁ D₂ p GG xy₁)
     (transportb_disp_ob2_mor_path
        (path_functor_ob p x₁) (path_functor_ob p y₁)
        (GG x₁ y₁ xy₁))) ;;2 (#2 GG) fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                              (idpath
                                                 (G x₂))
                                              (idpath
                                                 (G y₂))
                                              (idtoiso_twosided_disp_concat_disp_path
                                                 (transportb_disp_ob2_inv_path
                                                 (path_functor_ob
                                                 p x₂)
                                                 (path_functor_ob
                                                 p y₂)
                                                 (GG
                                                 x₂ y₂
                                                 xy₂))
                                                 (! 
                                                 transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob_help
                                                 D₁ D₂
                                                 p GG
                                                 xy₂)) =
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (make_functor F HF₁ x₁))
  (idpath (make_functor F HF₁ y₁))
  (transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
     F HF₁ HF₂ p GG xy₁) ;;2 (#2 GG) fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                              (idpath
                                                 (make_functor
                                                 F HF₁
                                                 x₂))
                                              (idpath
                                                 (make_functor
                                                 F HF₁
                                                 y₂))
                                              (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                                                 F HF₁
                                                 HF₂ p
                                                 GG
                                                 xy₂)

  apply idtoiso_twosided_disp_triple_concat.
Qed.

(** * 3. The laws *)

disp_cat_axioms cat_of_setcategory
  disp_cat_data_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat


disp_cat_axioms cat_of_setcategory
  disp_cat_data_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat

  
∏ (x y : cat_of_setcategory)
(f : cat_of_setcategory ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(xx : disp_cat_data_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat x)
(yy : pr1 disp_cat_data_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat y)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy),
(id_disp xx ;; ff)%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp xx yy) (id_left f) ff
∏ (x y : cat_of_setcategory)
(f : cat_of_setcategory ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(xx : disp_cat_data_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat x)
(yy : pr1 disp_cat_data_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat y)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy),
(ff ;; id_disp yy)%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp xx yy) (id_right f) ff
∏ (x y z w : cat_of_setcategory)
(f : cat_of_setcategory ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : cat_of_setcategory ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(h : cat_of_setcategory ⟦ z, w ⟧)
(xx : disp_cat_data_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat x)
(yy : disp_cat_data_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat y)
(zz : disp_cat_data_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat z)
(ww : disp_cat_data_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat w)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz)
(hh : zz -->[ h] ww),
(ff ;; (gg ;; hh))%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp xx ww) (assoc f g h)
  (ff ;; gg ;; hh)%mor_disp
∏ (x y : cat_of_setcategory)
(f : cat_of_setcategory ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(xx : disp_cat_data_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat x)
(yy : disp_cat_data_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat y),
isaset (xx -->[ f] yy)

  
∏ (x y : cat_of_setcategory)
(f : cat_of_setcategory ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(xx : disp_cat_data_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat x)
(yy : pr1 disp_cat_data_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat y)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy),
(id_disp xx ;; ff)%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp xx yy) (id_left f) ff
 
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: pr1 C₁ ⟶ pr1 C₂
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
comp_twosided_disp_functor
  (twosided_disp_functor_identity D₁) FF =
transportb (mor_disp D₁ D₂) (id_left F) FF

    
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: pr1 C₁ ⟶ pr1 C₂
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
∏ (x y : C₁) (xy : D₁ x y),
comp_twosided_disp_functor
  (twosided_disp_functor_identity D₁) FF x y xy =
transportb (mor_disp D₁ D₂) (id_left F) FF x y xy
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: pr1 C₁ ⟶ pr1 C₂
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
∏ (x₁ x₂ : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧) (y₁ y₂ : C₁)
(g : C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁) (xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂)
(fg : xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂),
(#2 (comp_twosided_disp_functor
       (twosided_disp_functor_identity D₁) FF)) fg ;;2 
idtoiso_twosided_disp
  (idpath ((functor_identity (pr1 C₁) ∙ F) x₂))
  (idpath ((functor_identity (pr1 C₁) ∙ F) y₂))
  (?p x₂ y₂ xy₂) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp
        (idpath ((functor_identity (pr1 C₁) ∙ F) x₁))
        (idpath ((functor_identity (pr1 C₁) ∙ F) y₁))
        (?p x₁ y₁ xy₁) ;;2 (#2 (transportb
                                  (mor_disp D₁ D₂)
                                  (id_left F) FF)) fg)

    
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: pr1 C₁ ⟶ pr1 C₂
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
∏ (x y : C₁) (xy : D₁ x y),
comp_twosided_disp_functor
  (twosided_disp_functor_identity D₁) FF x y xy =
transportb (mor_disp D₁ D₂) (id_left F) FF x y xy
 
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: pr1 C₁ ⟶ pr1 C₂
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
xy: D₁ x y
FF x y xy =
transportb (mor_disp D₁ D₂) (id_left F) FF x y xy

      exact (!(transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob _ _ _ _ _ _)).
    
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: pr1 C₁ ⟶ pr1 C₂
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
∏ (x₁ x₂ : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧) (y₁ y₂ : C₁)
(g : C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁) (xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂)
(fg : xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂),
(#2 (comp_twosided_disp_functor
       (twosided_disp_functor_identity D₁) FF)) fg ;;2 
idtoiso_twosided_disp
  (idpath ((functor_identity (pr1 C₁) ∙ F) x₂))
  (idpath ((functor_identity (pr1 C₁) ∙ F) y₂))
  ((λ (x y : C₁) (xy : D₁ x y),
    ! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
        (pr1 F) (pr2 F) (pr2 F) (id_left F) FF xy
    :
    comp_twosided_disp_functor
      (twosided_disp_functor_identity D₁) FF x y xy =
    transportb (mor_disp D₁ D₂) (id_left F) FF x y xy)
     x₂ y₂ xy₂) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp
        (idpath ((functor_identity (pr1 C₁) ∙ F) x₁))
        (idpath ((functor_identity (pr1 C₁) ∙ F) y₁))
        ((λ (x y : C₁) (xy : D₁ x y),
          ! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
              (pr1 F) (pr2 F) (pr2 F) (id_left F) FF
              xy
          :
          comp_twosided_disp_functor
            (twosided_disp_functor_identity D₁) FF x y
            xy =
          transportb (mor_disp D₁ D₂) (id_left F) FF x
            y xy) x₁ y₁ xy₁) ;;2 (#2 (transportb
                                        (mor_disp D₁
                                           D₂)
                                        (id_left F) FF))
                                   fg)
 
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: pr1 C₁ ⟶ pr1 C₂
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
(#2 FF) fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
                 (idpath (F y₂))
                 (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                      (pr1 F) (pr2 F) (pr2 F)
                      (id_left F) FF xy₂) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
        (idpath (F y₁))
        (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
             (pr1 F) (pr2 F) (pr2 F) (id_left F) FF
             xy₁) ;;2 (#2 (transportb (mor_disp D₁ D₂)
                             (id_left F) FF)) fg)

      
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: pr1 C₁ ⟶ pr1 C₂
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
        (idpath (F y₁))
        (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
             (pr1 F) (pr2 F) (pr2 F) (id_left F) FF
             xy₁) ;;2 (#2 (transportb (mor_disp D₁ D₂)
                             (id_left F) FF)) fg) =
(#2 FF) fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
                 (idpath (F y₂))
                 (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                      (pr1 F) (pr2 F) (pr2 F)
                      (id_left F) FF xy₂)

      
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: pr1 C₁ ⟶ pr1 C₂
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
        (idpath (F y₁))
        (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
             (pr1 F) (pr2 F) (pr2 F) (id_left F) FF
             xy₁) ;;2 (#2 (transportb (mor_disp D₁ D₂)
                             (id_left F) FF)) fg) = 
?b
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: pr1 C₁ ⟶ pr1 C₂
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
?b =
(#2 FF) fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
                 (idpath (F y₂))
                 (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                      (pr1 F) (pr2 F) (pr2 F)
                      (id_left F) FF xy₂)

      
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: pr1 C₁ ⟶ pr1 C₂
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
        (idpath (F y₁))
        (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
             (pr1 F) (pr2 F) (pr2 F) (id_left F) FF
             xy₁) ;;2 (#2 (transportb (mor_disp D₁ D₂)
                             (id_left F) FF)) fg) = 
?b

        
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: pr1 C₁ ⟶ pr1 C₂
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
(#2 (transportb (mor_disp D₁ D₂) (id_left F) FF)) fg =
?t2

        apply transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_mor.
      
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: pr1 C₁ ⟶ pr1 C₂
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
        (idpath (F y₁))
        (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
             (pr1 F) (pr2 F) (pr2 F) (id_left F) FF
             xy₁) ;;2 (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                               (idpath
                                  (make_functor
                                     (make_functor
                                        (functor_composite_data
                                           (functor_identity
                                              (pr1 C₁))
                                           F)
                                        (is_functor_composite
                                           (functor_identity
                                              (pr1 C₁))
                                           F))
                                     (is_functor_composite
                                        (functor_identity
                                           (pr1 C₁)) F)
                                     x₁))
                               (idpath
                                  (make_functor
                                     (make_functor
                                        (functor_composite_data
                                           (functor_identity
                                              (pr1 C₁))
                                           F)
                                        (is_functor_composite
                                           (functor_identity
                                              (pr1 C₁))
                                           F))
                                     (is_functor_composite
                                        (functor_identity
                                           (pr1 C₁)) F)
                                     y₁))
                               (transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                                  (make_functor
                                     (functor_composite_data
                                        (functor_identity
                                           (pr1 C₁)) F)
                                     (is_functor_composite
                                        (functor_identity
                                           (pr1 C₁)) F))
                                  (is_functor_composite
                                     (functor_identity
                                        (pr1 C₁)) F)
                                  (pr2 F) (id_left F)
                                  FF xy₁) ;;2 (#2 FF)
                                                fg ;;2 
                             idtoiso_twosided_disp
                               (idpath
                                  (make_functor
                                     (make_functor
                                        (functor_composite_data
                                           (functor_identity
                                              (pr1 C₁))
                                           F)
                                        (is_functor_composite
                                           (functor_identity
                                              (pr1 C₁))
                                           F))
                                     (is_functor_composite
                                        (functor_identity
                                           (pr1 C₁)) F)
                                     x₂))
                               (idpath
                                  (make_functor
                                     (make_functor
                                        (functor_composite_data
                                           (functor_identity
                                              (pr1 C₁))
                                           F)
                                        (is_functor_composite
                                           (functor_identity
                                              (pr1 C₁))
                                           F))
                                     (is_functor_composite
                                        (functor_identity
                                           (pr1 C₁)) F)
                                     y₂))
                               (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                                    (make_functor
                                       (functor_composite_data
                                          (functor_identity
                                             (pr1 C₁))
                                          F)
                                       (is_functor_composite
                                          (functor_identity
                                             (pr1 C₁))
                                          F))
                                    (is_functor_composite
                                       (functor_identity
                                          (pr1 C₁)) F)
                                    (pr2 F)
                                    (id_left F) FF xy₂)))) =
(#2 FF) fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
                 (idpath (F y₂))
                 (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                      (pr1 F) (pr2 F) (pr2 F)
                      (id_left F) FF xy₂)

      
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: pr1 C₁ ⟶ pr1 C₂
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁

g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
        (idpath (F y₁))
        (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
             (pr1 F) (pr2 F) (pr2 F) (id_left F) FF

                               (idpath (F x₁))
                               (idpath (F y₁))
                               (transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob

                                     (functor_identity
                                        (pr1 C₁)) F)
                                  (pr2 F) (id_left F)
                                  FF xy₁) ;;2 (#2 FF)
                                                fg ;;2 
                             idtoiso_twosided_disp
                               (idpath (F x₂))
                               (idpath (F y₂))
                               (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                                    (functor_composite_data

                                          (pr1 C₁)) F)
                                    (is_functor_composite
                                       (functor_identity
                                          (pr1 C₁)) F)
                                    (pr2 F)
                                    (id_left F) FF xy₂)))) =
(#2 FF) fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
                 (idpath (F y₂))
                 (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                      (pr1 F) (pr2 F) (pr2 F)
                      (id_left F) FF xy₂)

      
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: pr1 C₁ ⟶ pr1 C₂

xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂

trf₂ (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
              (idpath (F y₁))
              (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob

                                     (is_functor_composite
                                        (functor_identity
                                           (pr1 C₁)) F)
                                     (pr2 F)
                                     (id_left F) FF
                                     xy₁) ;;2 (#2 FF)
                                                fg ;;2

                                  (idpath (F y₂))
                                  (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                                       (functor_composite_data
                                          (functor_identity_data
                                             (pr1 C₁))
                                          F)
                                       (is_functor_composite
                                          (functor_identity
                                             (pr1 C₁))
                                          F) (pr2 F)
                                       (id_left F) FF
                                       xy₂)))) =

                 (idpath (F y₂))
                 (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                      (pr1 F) (pr2 F) (pr2 F)
                      (id_left F) FF xy₂)

                                             (id_left
                                                F) FF

C₁, C₂: setcategory

D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂

C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: pr1 C₁ ⟶ pr1 C₂
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁)) (idpath (F y₁))
  (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
       (pr1 F) (pr2 F) (pr2 F) (id_left F) FF xy₁) ;;2 
(idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁)) (idpath (F y₁))
   (transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
      (functor_composite_data
         (functor_identity_data (pr1 C₁)) F)
      (is_functor_composite
         (functor_identity (pr1 C₁)) F) (pr2 F)
      (id_left F) FF xy₁) ;;2 (#2 FF) fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                               (idpath
                                                 (F x₂))
                                               (idpath
                                                 (F y₂))
                                               (! 
                                                transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                                                 (functor_composite_data
                                                 (functor_identity_data
                                                 (pr1
                                                 C₁))
                                                 F)
                                                 (is_functor_composite
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 (pr1
                                                 C₁))
                                                 F)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 F)
                                                 (id_left
                                                 F) FF
                                                 xy₂)) =
?t2

        apply (assoc_two_disp (D := D₂)).

                      F)
                   (is_functor_composite
                      (functor_identity (pr1 C₁)) F)
                   (pr2 F) (id_left F) FF xy₂))) =

FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
        (idpath (F y₁))
        (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
             (pr1 F) (pr2 F) (pr2 F) (id_left F) FF
             xy₁) ;;2 (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                         (idpath (F x₁))
                         (idpath (F y₁))
                         (transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                            (functor_composite_data
                               (functor_identity_data
                                  (pr1 C₁)) F)
                            (is_functor_composite
                               (functor_identity
                                  (pr1 C₁)) F) (pr2 F)
                            (id_left F) FF xy₁) ;;2 
                       (#2 FF) fg) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                         (idpath
                                            (F x₂))
                                         (idpath
                                            (F y₂))
                                         (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                                              (functor_composite_data
                                                 (functor_identity_data
                                                 (pr1
                                                 C₁))
                                                 F)
                                              (is_functor_composite
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 (pr1
                                                 C₁))
                                                 F)
                                              (pr2 F)
                                              (id_left
                                                 F) FF
                                              xy₂)) =
?b

        
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: pr1 C₁ ⟶ pr1 C₂
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁)) (idpath (F y₁))
  (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
       (pr1 F) (pr2 F) (pr2 F) (id_left F) FF xy₁) ;;2 
(idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁)) (idpath (F y₁))
   (transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
      (functor_composite_data
         (functor_identity_data (pr1 C₁)) F)
      (is_functor_composite
         (functor_identity (pr1 C₁)) F) (pr2 F)
      (id_left F) FF xy₁) ;;2 (#2 FF) fg) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                (idpath
                                                 (F x₂))
                                                (idpath
                                                 (F y₂))
                                                (! 
                                                 transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                                                 (functor_composite_data
                                                 (functor_identity_data
                                                 (pr1
                                                 C₁))
                                                 F)
                                                 (is_functor_composite
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 (pr1
                                                 C₁))
                                                 F)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 F)
                                                 (id_left
                                                 F) FF
                                                 xy₂) =
?t2

        
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: pr1 C₁ ⟶ pr1 C₂
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁)) (idpath (F y₁))
  (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
       (pr1 F) (pr2 F) (pr2 F) (id_left F) FF xy₁) ;;2 
(idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁)) (idpath (F y₁))
   (transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
      (functor_composite_data
         (functor_identity_data (pr1 C₁)) F)
      (is_functor_composite
         (functor_identity (pr1 C₁)) F) (pr2 F)
      (id_left F) FF xy₁) ;;2 (#2 FF) fg) = ?y'

        apply (assoc_two_disp (D := D₂)).
      
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: pr1 C₁ ⟶ pr1 C₂
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ (trb₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
              (idpath (F y₁))
              (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                   (pr1 F) (pr2 F) (pr2 F) (id_left F)
                   FF xy₁) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                 (idpath (F x₁))
                                 (idpath (F y₁))
                                 (transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                                    (functor_composite_data
                                       (functor_identity_data
                                          (pr1 C₁)) F)
                                    (is_functor_composite
                                       (functor_identity
                                          (pr1 C₁)) F)
                                    (pr2 F)
                                    (id_left F) FF xy₁) ;;2 
            (#2 FF) fg) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                              (idpath (F x₂))
                              (idpath (F y₂))
                              (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                                   (functor_composite_data
                                      (functor_identity_data
                                         (pr1 C₁)) F)
                                   (is_functor_composite
                                      (functor_identity
                                         (pr1 C₁)) F)
                                   (pr2 F) (id_left F)
                                   FF xy₂)) =
(#2 FF) fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
                 (idpath (F y₂))
                 (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                      (pr1 F) (pr2 F) (pr2 F)
                      (id_left F) FF xy₂)

      
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: pr1 C₁ ⟶ pr1 C₂
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧

g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
              (idpath (F y₁))
              (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                   (pr1 F) (pr2 F) (pr2 F) (id_left F)
                   FF xy₁) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp

                                    (functor_composite_data

                                          (pr1 C₁)) F)
                                    (is_functor_composite
                                       (functor_identity
                                          (pr1 C₁)) F)
                                    (pr2 F)
                                    (id_left F) FF xy₁) ;;2 
            (#2 FF) fg) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                              (idpath (F x₂))
                              (idpath (F y₂))
                              (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                                   (functor_composite_data
                                      (functor_identity_data
                                         (pr1 C₁)) F)
                                   (is_functor_composite
                                      (functor_identity
                                         (pr1 C₁)) F)
                                   (pr2 F) (id_left F)
                                   FF xy₂)) =
(#2 FF) fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
                 (idpath (F y₂))
                 (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                      (pr1 F) (pr2 F) (pr2 F)
                      (id_left F) FF xy₂)

      
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: pr1 C₁ ⟶ pr1 C₂
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
              (idpath (F y₁))
              (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                   (pr1 F) (pr2 F) (pr2 F) (id_left F)
                   FF xy₁) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp

                                 (idpath (F y₁))

                                    (functor_composite_data
                                       (functor_identity_data
                                          (pr1 C₁)) F)
                                    (is_functor_composite
                                       (functor_identity
                                          (pr1 C₁)) F)
                                    (pr2 F)
                                    (id_left F) FF xy₁) ;;2 
            (#2 FF) fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                             (idpath (F x₂))
                             (idpath (F y₂))
                             (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
