                                     (functor_identity_data
                                        (pr1 C₁)) F)
                                  (is_functor_composite
                                     (functor_identity
                                        (pr1 C₁)) F)
                                  (pr2 F) (id_left F)
                                  FF xy₂))) =
(#2 FF) fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
                 (idpath (F y₂))
                 (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                      (pr1 F) (pr2 F) (pr2 F)
                      (id_left F) FF xy₂)

      
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: pr1 C₁ ⟶ pr1 C₂
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
        (idpath (F y₁))
        (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
             (pr1 F) (pr2 F) (pr2 F) (id_left F) FF
             xy₁) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                        (idpath (F x₁))
                        (idpath (F y₁))
                        (transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob

                              (functor_identity_data
                                 (pr1 C₁)) F)
                           (is_functor_composite
                              (functor_identity
                                 (pr1 C₁)) F) (pr2 F)
                           (id_left F) FF xy₁) ;;2 
      (#2 FF) fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                       (idpath (F x₂)) (idpath (F y₂))
                       (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob

                            (is_functor_composite
                               (functor_identity
                                  (pr1 C₁)) F) (pr2 F)
                            (id_left F) FF xy₂)) =
(#2 FF) fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
                 (idpath (F y₂))
                 (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                      (pr1 F) (pr2 F) (pr2 F)
                      (id_left F) FF xy₂)

      
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: pr1 C₁ ⟶ pr1 C₂
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
        (idpath (F y₁))
        (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
             (pr1 F) (pr2 F) (pr2 F) (id_left F) FF
             xy₁) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                        (idpath (F x₁))
                        (idpath (F y₁))
                        (transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                           (functor_composite_data
                              (functor_identity_data
                                 (pr1 C₁)) F)
                           (is_functor_composite
                              (functor_identity
                                 (pr1 C₁)) F) (pr2 F)
                           (id_left F) FF xy₁) ;;2 
      (#2 FF) fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                       (idpath (F x₂)) (idpath (F y₂))
                       (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                            (functor_composite_data
                               (functor_identity_data
                                  (pr1 C₁)) F)
                            (is_functor_composite
                               (functor_identity
                                  (pr1 C₁)) F) (pr2 F)
                            (id_left F) FF xy₂)) = 
?b
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: pr1 C₁ ⟶ pr1 C₂
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
?b =
(#2 FF) fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
                 (idpath (F y₂))
                 (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                      (pr1 F) (pr2 F) (pr2 F)
                      (id_left F) FF xy₂)

      
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: pr1 C₁ ⟶ pr1 C₂
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
        (idpath (F y₁))
        (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
             (pr1 F) (pr2 F) (pr2 F) (id_left F) FF
             xy₁) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                        (idpath (F x₁))
                        (idpath (F y₁))
                        (transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                           (functor_composite_data
                              (functor_identity_data
                                 (pr1 C₁)) F)
                           (is_functor_composite
                              (functor_identity
                                 (pr1 C₁)) F) (pr2 F)
                           (id_left F) FF xy₁) ;;2 
      (#2 FF) fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                       (idpath (F x₂)) (idpath (F y₂))
                       (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                            (functor_composite_data
                               (functor_identity_data
                                  (pr1 C₁)) F)
                            (is_functor_composite
                               (functor_identity
                                  (pr1 C₁)) F) (pr2 F)
                            (id_left F) FF xy₂)) = 
?b

        
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: pr1 C₁ ⟶ pr1 C₂
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁)) (idpath (F y₁))
  (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
       (pr1 F) (pr2 F) (pr2 F) (id_left F) FF xy₁) ;;2 
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁)) (idpath (F y₁))
  (transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
     (functor_composite_data
        (functor_identity_data (pr1 C₁)) F)
     (is_functor_composite (functor_identity (pr1 C₁))
        F) (pr2 F) (id_left F) FF xy₁) ;;2 (#2 FF) fg ;;2 
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂)) (idpath (F y₂))
  (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
       (functor_composite_data
          (functor_identity_data (pr1 C₁)) F)
       (is_functor_composite
          (functor_identity (pr1 C₁)) F) (pr2 F)
       (id_left F) FF xy₂) = ?t2

        
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: pr1 C₁ ⟶ pr1 C₂
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁)) (idpath (F y₁))
  (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
       (pr1 F) (pr2 F) (pr2 F) (id_left F) FF xy₁) ;;2 
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁)) (idpath (F y₁))
  (transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
     (functor_composite_data
        (functor_identity_data (pr1 C₁)) F)
     (is_functor_composite (functor_identity (pr1 C₁))
        F) (pr2 F) (id_left F) FF xy₁) = ?y'

        apply (idtoiso_twosided_disp_concat (D := D₂)).
      
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: pr1 C₁ ⟶ pr1 C₂
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ (trb₂ pr1
             (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
                (idpath (F y₁))
                (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                     (pr1 F) (pr2 F) (pr2 F)
                     (id_left F) FF xy₁ @
                 transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                   (functor_composite_data
                      (functor_identity_data (pr1 C₁))
                      F)
                   (is_functor_composite
                      (functor_identity (pr1 C₁)) F)
                   (pr2 F) (id_left F) FF xy₁)) ;;2 
      (#2 FF) fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                       (idpath (F x₂)) (idpath (F y₂))
                       (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                            (functor_composite_data
                               (functor_identity_data
                                  (pr1 C₁)) F)
                            (is_functor_composite
                               (functor_identity
                                  (pr1 C₁)) F) (pr2 F)
                            (id_left F) FF xy₂)) =
(#2 FF) fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
                 (idpath (F y₂))
                 (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                      (pr1 F) (pr2 F) (pr2 F)
                      (id_left F) FF xy₂)

      
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: pr1 C₁ ⟶ pr1 C₂
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ (trf₂ pr1
             (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
                (idpath (F y₁))
                (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                     (pr1 F) (pr2 F) (pr2 F)
                     (id_left F) FF xy₁ @
                 transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                   (functor_composite_data
                      (functor_identity_data (pr1 C₁))
                      F)
                   (is_functor_composite
                      (functor_identity (pr1 C₁)) F)
                   (pr2 F) (id_left F) FF xy₁)) ;;2 
      (#2 FF) fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                       (idpath (F x₂)) (idpath (F y₂))
                       (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                            (functor_composite_data
                               (functor_identity_data
                                  (pr1 C₁)) F)
                            (is_functor_composite
                               (functor_identity
                                  (pr1 C₁)) F) (pr2 F)
                            (id_left F) FF xy₂)) =
(#2 FF) fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
                 (idpath (F y₂))
                 (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                      (pr1 F) (pr2 F) (pr2 F)
                      (id_left F) FF xy₂)

      
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: pr1 C₁ ⟶ pr1 C₂
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ (trf₂ (pr1
              (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
                 (idpath (F y₁))
                 (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                      (pr1 F) (pr2 F) (pr2 F)
                      (id_left F) FF xy₁ @
                  transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                    (functor_composite_data
                       (functor_identity_data (pr1 C₁))
                       F)
                    (is_functor_composite
                       (functor_identity (pr1 C₁)) F)
                    (pr2 F) (id_left F) FF xy₁)) ;;2 
            (#2 FF) fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                             (idpath (F x₂))
                             (idpath (F y₂))
                             (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                                  (functor_composite_data
                                     (functor_identity_data
                                        (pr1 C₁)) F)
                                  (is_functor_composite
                                     (functor_identity
                                        (pr1 C₁)) F)
                                  (pr2 F) (id_left F)
                                  FF xy₂))) =
(#2 FF) fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
                 (idpath (F y₂))
                 (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                      (pr1 F) (pr2 F) (pr2 F)
                      (id_left F) FF xy₂)

      
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: pr1 C₁ ⟶ pr1 C₂
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ (pr1
        (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
           (idpath (F y₁))
           (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                (pr1 F) (pr2 F) (pr2 F) (id_left F) FF
                xy₁ @
            transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
              (functor_composite_data
                 (functor_identity_data (pr1 C₁)) F)
              (is_functor_composite
                 (functor_identity (pr1 C₁)) F)
              (pr2 F) (id_left F) FF xy₁)) ;;2 (#2 FF)
                                                 fg ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
        (idpath (F y₂))
        (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
             (functor_composite_data
                (functor_identity_data (pr1 C₁)) F)
             (is_functor_composite
                (functor_identity (pr1 C₁)) F) (pr2 F)
             (id_left F) FF xy₂)) =
(#2 FF) fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
                 (idpath (F y₂))
                 (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                      (pr1 F) (pr2 F) (pr2 F)
                      (id_left F) FF xy₂)

      
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: pr1 C₁ ⟶ pr1 C₂
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ (id_two_disp (FF x₁ y₁ xy₁) ;;2 (#2 FF) fg ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
        (idpath (F y₂))
        (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
             (functor_composite_data
                (functor_identity_data (pr1 C₁)) F)
             (is_functor_composite
                (functor_identity (pr1 C₁)) F) (pr2 F)
             (id_left F) FF xy₂)) =
(#2 FF) fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
                 (idpath (F y₂))
                 (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                      (pr1 F) (pr2 F) (pr2 F)
                      (id_left F) FF xy₂)

      
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: pr1 C₁ ⟶ pr1 C₂
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ (id_two_disp (FF x₁ y₁ xy₁) ;;2 (#2 FF) fg ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
        (idpath (F y₂))
        (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
             (functor_composite_data
                (functor_identity_data (pr1 C₁)) F)
             (is_functor_composite
                (functor_identity (pr1 C₁)) F) (pr2 F)
             (id_left F) FF xy₂)) = ?b
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: pr1 C₁ ⟶ pr1 C₂
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
?b =
(#2 FF) fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
                 (idpath (F y₂))
                 (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                      (pr1 F) (pr2 F) (pr2 F)
                      (id_left F) FF xy₂)

      
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: pr1 C₁ ⟶ pr1 C₂
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ (id_two_disp (FF x₁ y₁ xy₁) ;;2 (#2 FF) fg ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
        (idpath (F y₂))
        (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
             (functor_composite_data
                (functor_identity_data (pr1 C₁)) F)
             (is_functor_composite
                (functor_identity (pr1 C₁)) F) (pr2 F)
             (id_left F) FF xy₂)) = ?b

        
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: pr1 C₁ ⟶ pr1 C₂
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
id_two_disp (FF x₁ y₁ xy₁) ;;2 (#2 FF) fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                (idpath
                                                 (F x₂))
                                                (idpath
                                                 (F y₂))
                                                (! 
                                                 transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                                                 (functor_composite_data
                                                 (functor_identity_data
                                                 (pr1
                                                 C₁))
                                                 F)
                                                 (is_functor_composite
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 (pr1
                                                 C₁))
                                                 F)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 F)
                                                 (id_left
                                                 F) FF
                                                 xy₂) =
?t2

        
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: pr1 C₁ ⟶ pr1 C₂
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
id_two_disp (FF x₁ y₁ xy₁) ;;2 (#2 FF) fg = ?y'

        apply (id_two_disp_left (D := D₂)).
      
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: pr1 C₁ ⟶ pr1 C₂
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ (trb₂ (#2 FF) fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                            (idpath (F x₂))
                            (idpath (F y₂))
                            (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                                 (functor_composite_data
                                    (functor_identity_data
                                       (pr1 C₁)) F)
                                 (is_functor_composite
                                    (functor_identity
                                       (pr1 C₁)) F)
                                 (pr2 F) (id_left F)
                                 FF xy₂)) =
(#2 FF) fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
                 (idpath (F y₂))
                 (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                      (pr1 F) (pr2 F) (pr2 F)
                      (id_left F) FF xy₂)

      
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: pr1 C₁ ⟶ pr1 C₂
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ (trf₂ (#2 FF) fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                            (idpath (F x₂))
                            (idpath (F y₂))
                            (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                                 (functor_composite_data
                                    (functor_identity_data
                                       (pr1 C₁)) F)
                                 (is_functor_composite
                                    (functor_identity
                                       (pr1 C₁)) F)
                                 (pr2 F) (id_left F)
                                 FF xy₂)) =
(#2 FF) fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
                 (idpath (F y₂))
                 (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                      (pr1 F) (pr2 F) (pr2 F)
                      (id_left F) FF xy₂)

      
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: pr1 C₁ ⟶ pr1 C₂
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ (trf₂ ((#2 FF) fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                             (idpath (F x₂))
                             (idpath (F y₂))
                             (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                                  (functor_composite_data
                                     (functor_identity_data
                                        (pr1 C₁)) F)
                                  (is_functor_composite
                                     (functor_identity
                                        (pr1 C₁)) F)
                                  (pr2 F) (id_left F)
                                  FF xy₂))) =
(#2 FF) fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
                 (idpath (F y₂))
                 (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                      (pr1 F) (pr2 F) (pr2 F)
                      (id_left F) FF xy₂)

      
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: pr1 C₁ ⟶ pr1 C₂
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ ((#2 FF) fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                       (idpath (F x₂)) (idpath (F y₂))
                       (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                            (functor_composite_data
                               (functor_identity_data
                                  (pr1 C₁)) F)
                            (is_functor_composite
                               (functor_identity
                                  (pr1 C₁)) F) (pr2 F)
                            (id_left F) FF xy₂)) =
(#2 FF) fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
                 (idpath (F y₂))
                 (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                      (pr1 F) (pr2 F) (pr2 F)
                      (id_left F) FF xy₂)

      apply transportf_disp_mor2_idpath.
  
∏ (x y : cat_of_setcategory)
(f : cat_of_setcategory ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(xx : disp_cat_data_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat x)
(yy : pr1 disp_cat_data_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat y)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy),
(ff ;; id_disp yy)%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp xx yy) (id_right f) ff
 
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: pr1 C₁ ⟶ pr1 C₂
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
comp_twosided_disp_functor FF
  (twosided_disp_functor_identity D₂) =
transportb (mor_disp D₁ D₂) (id_right F) FF

    
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: pr1 C₁ ⟶ pr1 C₂
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
∏ (x y : C₁) (xy : D₁ x y),
comp_twosided_disp_functor FF
  (twosided_disp_functor_identity D₂) x y xy =
transportb (mor_disp D₁ D₂) (id_right F) FF x y xy
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: pr1 C₁ ⟶ pr1 C₂
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
∏ (x₁ x₂ : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧) (y₁ y₂ : C₁)
(g : C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁) (xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂)
(fg : xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂),
(#2 (comp_twosided_disp_functor FF
       (twosided_disp_functor_identity D₂))) fg ;;2 
idtoiso_twosided_disp
  (idpath ((F ∙ functor_identity (pr1 C₂)) x₂))
  (idpath ((F ∙ functor_identity (pr1 C₂)) y₂))
  (?p x₂ y₂ xy₂) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp
        (idpath ((F ∙ functor_identity (pr1 C₂)) x₁))
        (idpath ((F ∙ functor_identity (pr1 C₂)) y₁))
        (?p x₁ y₁ xy₁) ;;2 (#2 (transportb
                                  (mor_disp D₁ D₂)
                                  (id_right F) FF)) fg)

    
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: pr1 C₁ ⟶ pr1 C₂
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
∏ (x y : C₁) (xy : D₁ x y),
comp_twosided_disp_functor FF
  (twosided_disp_functor_identity D₂) x y xy =
transportb (mor_disp D₁ D₂) (id_right F) FF x y xy
 
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: pr1 C₁ ⟶ pr1 C₂
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
xy: D₁ x y
FF x y xy =
transportb (mor_disp D₁ D₂) (id_right F) FF x y xy

      exact (!(transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                 F _ _
                 (@id_right cat_of_setcategory _ _ F)
                 FF
                 xy)).
    
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: pr1 C₁ ⟶ pr1 C₂
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
∏ (x₁ x₂ : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧) (y₁ y₂ : C₁)
(g : C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁) (xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂)
(fg : xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂),
(#2 (comp_twosided_disp_functor FF
       (twosided_disp_functor_identity D₂))) fg ;;2 
idtoiso_twosided_disp
  (idpath ((F ∙ functor_identity (pr1 C₂)) x₂))
  (idpath ((F ∙ functor_identity (pr1 C₂)) y₂))
  ((λ (x y : C₁) (xy : D₁ x y),
    ! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
        F (is_functor_composite F (identity C₂))
        (pr2 F) (id_right F) FF xy
    :
    comp_twosided_disp_functor FF
      (twosided_disp_functor_identity D₂) x y xy =
    transportb (mor_disp D₁ D₂) (id_right F) FF x y xy)
     x₂ y₂ xy₂) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp
        (idpath ((F ∙ functor_identity (pr1 C₂)) x₁))
        (idpath ((F ∙ functor_identity (pr1 C₂)) y₁))
        ((λ (x y : C₁) (xy : D₁ x y),
          ! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
              F (is_functor_composite F (identity C₂))
              (pr2 F) (id_right F) FF xy
          :
          comp_twosided_disp_functor FF
            (twosided_disp_functor_identity D₂) x y xy =
          transportb (mor_disp D₁ D₂) (id_right F) FF
            x y xy) x₁ y₁ xy₁) ;;2 (#2 (transportb
                                          (mor_disp D₁
                                             D₂)
                                          (id_right F)
                                          FF)) fg)
 
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: pr1 C₁ ⟶ pr1 C₂
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
(#2 FF) fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
                 (idpath (F y₂))
                 (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                      F
                      (is_functor_composite F
                         (functor_identity (pr1 C₂)))
                      (pr2 F) (id_right F) FF xy₂) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
        (idpath (F y₁))
        (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
             F
             (is_functor_composite F
                (functor_identity (pr1 C₂))) (pr2 F)
             (id_right F) FF xy₁) ;;2 (#2 (transportb
                                             (mor_disp
                                                D₁ D₂)
                                             (id_right
                                                F) FF))
                                        fg)

xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
(#2 (transportb (mor_disp D₁ D₂) (id_right F) FF)) fg =
?t2

        apply (transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_mor
                 _
                 _ _
                 (id_right (C := cat_of_setcategory) F)).

                 (idpath (F y₂))

                                        (id_right F)
                                        FF xy₂)) = 
?t2

        apply (assoc_two_disp (D := D₂)).
      
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: pr1 C₁ ⟶ pr1 C₂
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ (trb₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
              (idpath (F y₁))
              (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                   F
                   (is_functor_composite F
                      (functor_identity (pr1 C₂)))
                   (pr2 F) (id_right F) FF xy₁) ;;2 
            (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
               (idpath (F y₁))
               (transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                  (functor_composite_data F
                     (functor_identity_data (pr1 C₂)))
                  (is_functor_composite F
                     (functor_identity (pr1 C₂)))
                  (pr2 F) (id_right F) FF xy₁) ;;2 
             (#2 FF) fg) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                               (idpath (F x₂))
                               (idpath (F y₂))
                               (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                                    (functor_composite_data
                                       F
                                       (functor_identity_data
                                          (pr1 C₂)))
                                    (is_functor_composite
                                       F
                                       (functor_identity
                                          (pr1 C₂)))
                                    (pr2 F)
                                    (id_right F) FF
                                    xy₂))) =
(#2 FF) fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
                 (idpath (F y₂))
                 (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                      F
                      (is_functor_composite F
                         (functor_identity (pr1 C₂)))
                      (pr2 F) (id_right F) FF xy₂)

      
C₁, C₂: setcategory

D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂

x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
              (idpath (F y₁))
              (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                   F
                   (is_functor_composite F
                      (functor_identity (pr1 C₂)))
                   (pr2 F) (id_right F) FF xy₁) ;;2

               (idpath (F y₁))
               (transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                  (functor_composite_data F
                     (functor_identity_data (pr1 C₂)))
                  (is_functor_composite F
                     (functor_identity (pr1 C₂)))
                  (pr2 F) (id_right F) FF xy₁) ;;2 
             (#2 FF) fg) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                               (idpath (F x₂))
                               (idpath (F y₂))
                               (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                                    (functor_composite_data
                                       F
                                       (functor_identity_data
                                          (pr1 C₂)))
                                    (is_functor_composite
                                       F
                                       (functor_identity
                                          (pr1 C₂)))
                                    (pr2 F)
                                    (id_right F) FF
                                    xy₂))) =
(#2 FF) fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
                 (idpath (F y₂))
                 (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                      F
                      (is_functor_composite F
                         (functor_identity (pr1 C₂)))
                      (pr2 F) (id_right F) FF xy₂)

      
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: pr1 C₁ ⟶ pr1 C₂
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
        (idpath (F y₁))
        (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
             F
             (is_functor_composite F
                (functor_identity (pr1 C₂))) (pr2 F)
             (id_right F) FF xy₁) ;;2 (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                         (idpath
                                            (F x₁))
                                         (idpath
                                            (F y₁))
                                         (transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                                            (functor_composite_data
                                               F
                                               (functor_identity_data
                                                 (pr1
                                                 C₂)))
                                            (is_functor_composite
                                               F
                                               (functor_identity
                                                 (pr1
                                                 C₂)))
                                            (pr2 F)
                                            (id_right
                                               F) FF
                                            xy₁) ;;2 
                                       (#2 FF) fg) ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
        (idpath (F y₂))
        (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
             (functor_composite_data F
                (functor_identity_data (pr1 C₂)))
             (is_functor_composite F
                (functor_identity (pr1 C₂))) (pr2 F)
             (id_right F) FF xy₂)) =
(#2 FF) fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
                 (idpath (F y₂))
                 (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                      F
                      (is_functor_composite F
                         (functor_identity (pr1 C₂)))
                      (pr2 F) (id_right F) FF xy₂)

      
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: pr1 C₁ ⟶ pr1 C₂
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
        (idpath (F y₁))
        (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
             F
             (is_functor_composite F
                (functor_identity (pr1 C₂))) (pr2 F)
             (id_right F) FF xy₁) ;;2 (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                         (idpath
                                            (F x₁))

                                            (F y₁))
                                         (transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                                            (functor_composite_data
                                               F
                                               (functor_identity_data
                                                 (pr1
                                                 C₂)))
                                            (is_functor_composite
                                               F
                                               (functor_identity
                                                 (pr1
                                                 C₂)))
                                            (pr2 F)
                                            (id_right
                                               F) FF
                                            xy₁) ;;2 
                                       (#2 FF) fg) ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
        (idpath (F y₂))
        (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
             (functor_composite_data F
                (functor_identity_data (pr1 C₂)))
             (is_functor_composite F
                (functor_identity (pr1 C₂))) (pr2 F)
             (id_right F) FF xy₂)) = ?b
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: pr1 C₁ ⟶ pr1 C₂
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
?b =
(#2 FF) fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
                 (idpath (F y₂))
                 (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                      F
                      (is_functor_composite F
                         (functor_identity (pr1 C₂)))
                      (pr2 F) (id_right F) FF xy₂)

        (idpath (F y₁))

y₁, y₂: C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁)) (idpath (F y₁))
  (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
       F
       (is_functor_composite F
          (functor_identity (pr1 C₂))) (pr2 F)
       (id_right F) FF xy₁) ;;2 (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                   (idpath (F x₁))
                                   (idpath (F y₁))
                                   (transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                                      (functor_composite_data
                                         F
                                         (functor_identity_data
                                            (pr1 C₂)))
                                      (is_functor_composite
                                         F
                                         (functor_identity
                                            (pr1 C₂)))
                                      (pr2 F)
                                      (id_right F) FF
                                      xy₁) ;;2 (#2 FF)
                                                 fg) ;;2 
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂)) (idpath (F y₂))
  (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
       (functor_composite_data F
          (functor_identity_data (pr1 C₂)))
       (is_functor_composite F
          (functor_identity (pr1 C₂))) (pr2 F)
       (id_right F) FF xy₂) = ?t2

  (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
       F

                                         F
                                         (functor_identity
                                            (pr1 C₂)))
                                      (pr2 F)
                                      (id_right F) FF
                                      xy₁) ;;2 (#2 FF)
                                                 fg) =
?y'

        apply (assoc_two_disp (D := D₂)).

F: pr1 C₁ ⟶ pr1 C₂
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
        (idpath (F y₁))
        (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
             F
             (is_functor_composite F
                (functor_identity (pr1 C₂))) (pr2 F)
             (id_right F) FF xy₁) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                        (idpath (F x₁))
                                        (idpath (F y₁))
                                        (transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                                           (functor_composite_data
                                              F
                                              (functor_identity_data
                                                 (pr1
                                                 C₂)))
                                           (is_functor_composite
                                              F
                                              (functor_identity
                                                 (pr1
                                                 C₂)))
                                           (pr2 F)
                                           (id_right F)
                                           FF xy₁) ;;2 
      (#2 FF) fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                       (idpath (F x₂)) (idpath (F y₂))
                       (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                            (functor_composite_data F
                               (functor_identity_data
                                  (pr1 C₂)))
                            (is_functor_composite F
                               (functor_identity
                                  (pr1 C₂))) (pr2 F)
                            (id_right F) FF xy₂)) = 
?b
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: pr1 C₁ ⟶ pr1 C₂
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
?b =
(#2 FF) fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
                 (idpath (F y₂))
                 (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                      F
                      (is_functor_composite F
                         (functor_identity (pr1 C₂)))
                      (pr2 F) (id_right F) FF xy₂)

        (idpath (F y₁))

                                                 C₂)))
                                           (pr2 F)
                                           (id_right F)
                                           FF xy₁) ;;2

                       (idpath (F x₂)) (idpath (F y₂))
                       (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                            (functor_composite_data F
                               (functor_identity_data
                                  (pr1 C₂)))
                            (is_functor_composite F
                               (functor_identity
                                  (pr1 C₂))) (pr2 F)
                            (id_right F) FF xy₂)) =

C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: pr1 C₁ ⟶ pr1 C₂
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁)) (idpath (F y₁))
  (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
       F
       (is_functor_composite F
          (functor_identity (pr1 C₂))) (pr2 F)
       (id_right F) FF xy₁) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                  (idpath (F x₁))
                                  (idpath (F y₁))
                                  (transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                                     (functor_composite_data
                                        F
                                        (functor_identity_data
                                           (pr1 C₂)))
                                     (is_functor_composite
                                        F
                                        (functor_identity
                                           (pr1 C₂)))
                                     (pr2 F)
                                     (id_right F) FF
                                     xy₁) ;;2 (#2 FF)
                                                fg ;;2 
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂)) (idpath (F y₂))
  (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
       (functor_composite_data F
          (functor_identity_data (pr1 C₂)))
       (is_functor_composite F
          (functor_identity (pr1 C₂))) (pr2 F)
       (id_right F) FF xy₂) = ?t2

        
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: pr1 C₁ ⟶ pr1 C₂
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
x₁, x₂: C₁

g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁)) (idpath (F y₁))
  (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
       F
       (is_functor_composite F
          (functor_identity (pr1 C₂))) (pr2 F)
       (id_right F) FF xy₁) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                  (idpath (F x₁))
                                  (idpath (F y₁))
                                  (transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                                     (functor_composite_data
                                        F
                                        (functor_identity_data
                                           (pr1 C₂)))
                                     (is_functor_composite
                                        F
                                        (functor_identity
                                           (pr1 C₂)))
                                     (pr2 F)
                                     (id_right F) FF
                                     xy₁) = ?y'

        apply (idtoiso_twosided_disp_concat (D := D₂)).
      
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: pr1 C₁ ⟶ pr1 C₂
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂

f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧

xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ (trb₂ pr1
             (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
                (idpath (F y₁))
                (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                     F
                     (is_functor_composite F
                        (functor_identity (pr1 C₂)))
                     (pr2 F) (id_right F) FF xy₁ @
                 transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                   (functor_composite_data F
                      (functor_identity_data (pr1 C₂)))
                   (is_functor_composite F
                      (functor_identity (pr1 C₂)))
                   (pr2 F) (id_right F) FF xy₁)) ;;2 
      (#2 FF) fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                       (idpath (F x₂)) (idpath (F y₂))
                       (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                            (functor_composite_data F
                               (functor_identity_data
                                  (pr1 C₂)))
                            (is_functor_composite F
                               (functor_identity
                                  (pr1 C₂))) (pr2 F)
                            (id_right F) FF xy₂)) =
(#2 FF) fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
                 (idpath (F y₂))
                 (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                      F
                      (is_functor_composite F
                         (functor_identity (pr1 C₂)))
                      (pr2 F) (id_right F) FF xy₂)

      
C₁, C₂: setcategory

trf₂ (trf₂ pr1
             (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
                (idpath (F y₁))
                (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                     F
                     (is_functor_composite F
                        (functor_identity (pr1 C₂)))
                     (pr2 F) (id_right F) FF xy₁ @
                 transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                   (functor_composite_data F
                      (functor_identity_data (pr1 C₂)))
                   (is_functor_composite F
                      (functor_identity (pr1 C₂)))
                   (pr2 F) (id_right F) FF xy₁)) ;;2 
      (#2 FF) fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                       (idpath (F x₂)) (idpath (F y₂))
                       (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                            (functor_composite_data F
                               (functor_identity_data
                                  (pr1 C₂)))
                            (is_functor_composite F
                               (functor_identity
                                  (pr1 C₂))) (pr2 F)
                            (id_right F) FF xy₂)) =

                 (idpath (F y₂))
                 (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                      F

                         (functor_identity (pr1 C₂)))
                      (pr2 F) (id_right F) FF xy₂)

      
C₁, C₂: setcategory

xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂

trf₂ (trf₂ (pr1
              (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
                 (idpath (F y₁))
                 (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                      F
                      (is_functor_composite F
                         (functor_identity (pr1 C₂)))
                      (pr2 F) (id_right F) FF xy₁ @
                  transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                    (functor_composite_data F
                       (functor_identity_data (pr1 C₂)))
                    (is_functor_composite F
                       (functor_identity (pr1 C₂)))
                    (pr2 F) (id_right F) FF xy₁)) ;;2 
            (#2 FF) fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                             (idpath (F x₂))
                             (idpath (F y₂))
                             (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                                  (functor_composite_data
                                     F
                                     (functor_identity_data
                                        (pr1 C₂)))
                                  (is_functor_composite
                                     F
                                     (functor_identity
                                        (pr1 C₂)))
                                  (pr2 F) (id_right F)
                                  FF xy₂))) =
(#2 FF) fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
                 (idpath (F y₂))
                 (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                      F
                      (is_functor_composite F
                         (functor_identity (pr1 C₂)))
                      (pr2 F) (id_right F) FF xy₂)

      
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: pr1 C₁ ⟶ pr1 C₂
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ (pr1
        (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
           (idpath (F y₁))
           (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                F
                (is_functor_composite F

                (pr2 F) (id_right F) FF xy₁ @
            transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
              (functor_composite_data F
                 (functor_identity_data (pr1 C₂)))
              (is_functor_composite F
                 (functor_identity (pr1 C₂))) (pr2 F)
              (id_right F) FF xy₁)) ;;2 (#2 FF) fg ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
        (idpath (F y₂))
        (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
             (functor_composite_data F
                (functor_identity_data (pr1 C₂)))
             (is_functor_composite F
                (functor_identity (pr1 C₂))) (pr2 F)
             (id_right F) FF xy₂)) =
(#2 FF) fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
                 (idpath (F y₂))
                 (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                      F
                      (is_functor_composite F
                         (functor_identity (pr1 C₂)))
                      (pr2 F) (id_right F) FF xy₂)

xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂

trf₂ (id_two_disp (FF x₁ y₁ xy₁) ;;2 (#2 FF) fg ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
        (idpath (F y₂))

             (is_functor_composite F
                (functor_identity (pr1 C₂))) (pr2 F)

                 (idpath (F y₂))
                 (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob

                      (pr2 F) (id_right F) FF xy₂)

xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂

        (idpath (F y₂))

                (functor_identity_data (pr1 C₂)))

xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
id_two_disp (FF x₁ y₁ xy₁) ;;2 (#2 FF) fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                (idpath
                                                 (F x₂))
                                                (idpath

                                                 transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob

                                                 F

                                                 F)

?t2

xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
id_two_disp (FF x₁ y₁ xy₁) ;;2 (#2 FF) fg = ?y'

        apply (id_two_disp_left (D := D₂)).
      
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: pr1 C₁ ⟶ pr1 C₂

trf₂ (trb₂ (#2 FF) fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                            (idpath (F x₂))

                                 (functor_composite_data
                                    F

                                       (pr1 C₂)))
