                                    F
                                    (functor_identity
                                       (pr1 C₂)))
                                 (pr2 F) (id_right F)
                                 FF xy₂)) =
(#2 FF) fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
                 (idpath (F y₂))
                 (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                      F
                      (is_functor_composite F
                         (functor_identity (pr1 C₂)))
                      (pr2 F) (id_right F) FF xy₂)

      
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: pr1 C₁ ⟶ pr1 C₂
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ (trf₂ (#2 FF) fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                            (idpath (F x₂))
                            (idpath (F y₂))
                            (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                                 (functor_composite_data
                                    F
                                    (functor_identity_data
                                       (pr1 C₂)))
                                 (is_functor_composite
                                    F
                                    (functor_identity
                                       (pr1 C₂)))
                                 (pr2 F) (id_right F)
                                 FF xy₂)) =
(#2 FF) fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
                 (idpath (F y₂))
                 (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                      F
                      (is_functor_composite F
                         (functor_identity (pr1 C₂)))
                      (pr2 F) (id_right F) FF xy₂)

      
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: pr1 C₁ ⟶ pr1 C₂
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ (trf₂ ((#2 FF) fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                             (idpath (F x₂))
                             (idpath (F y₂))
                             (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                                  (functor_composite_data
                                     F
                                     (functor_identity_data
                                        (pr1 C₂)))
                                  (is_functor_composite
                                     F
                                     (functor_identity
                                        (pr1 C₂)))
                                  (pr2 F) (id_right F)
                                  FF xy₂))) =
(#2 FF) fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
                 (idpath (F y₂))
                 (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                      F
                      (is_functor_composite F
                         (functor_identity (pr1 C₂)))
                      (pr2 F) (id_right F) FF xy₂)

      
C₁, C₂: setcategory
F: pr1 C₁ ⟶ pr1 C₂
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ ((#2 FF) fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                       (idpath (F x₂)) (idpath (F y₂))
                       (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                            (functor_composite_data F
                               (functor_identity_data
                                  (pr1 C₂)))
                            (is_functor_composite F
                               (functor_identity
                                  (pr1 C₂))) (pr2 F)
                            (id_right F) FF xy₂)) =
(#2 FF) fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
                 (idpath (F y₂))
                 (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                      F
                      (is_functor_composite F
                         (functor_identity (pr1 C₂)))
                      (pr2 F) (id_right F) FF xy₂)

      apply transportf_disp_mor2_idpath.
  
∏ (x y z w : cat_of_setcategory)
(f : cat_of_setcategory ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : cat_of_setcategory ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(h : cat_of_setcategory ⟦ z, w ⟧)
(xx : disp_cat_data_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat x)
(yy : disp_cat_data_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat y)
(zz : disp_cat_data_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat z)
(ww : disp_cat_data_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat w)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz)
(hh : zz -->[ h] ww),
(ff ;; (gg ;; hh))%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp xx ww) (assoc f g h)
  (ff ;; gg ;; hh)%mor_disp
 
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: setcategory
F: pr1 C₁ ⟶ pr1 C₂
G: pr1 C₂ ⟶ pr1 C₃
H: pr1 C₃ ⟶ pr1 C₄
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
D₄: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₄ C₄
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
HH: twosided_disp_functor H H D₃ D₄
comp_twosided_disp_functor FF
  (comp_twosided_disp_functor GG HH) =
transportb (mor_disp D₁ D₄) (assoc F G H)
  (comp_twosided_disp_functor
     (comp_twosided_disp_functor FF GG) HH)

    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: setcategory
F: pr1 C₁ ⟶ pr1 C₂
G: pr1 C₂ ⟶ pr1 C₃
H: pr1 C₃ ⟶ pr1 C₄
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
D₄: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₄ C₄
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
HH: twosided_disp_functor H H D₃ D₄
∏ (x y : C₁) (xy : D₁ x y),
comp_twosided_disp_functor FF
  (comp_twosided_disp_functor GG HH) x y xy =
transportb (mor_disp D₁ D₄) (assoc F G H)
  (comp_twosided_disp_functor
     (comp_twosided_disp_functor FF GG) HH) x y xy
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: setcategory
F: pr1 C₁ ⟶ pr1 C₂
G: pr1 C₂ ⟶ pr1 C₃
H: pr1 C₃ ⟶ pr1 C₄
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
D₄: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₄ C₄
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
HH: twosided_disp_functor H H D₃ D₄
∏ (x₁ x₂ : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧) (y₁ y₂ : C₁)
(g : C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁) (xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂)
(fg : xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂),
(#2 (comp_twosided_disp_functor FF
       (comp_twosided_disp_functor GG HH))) fg ;;2 
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath ((F ∙ (G ∙ H)) x₂))
  (idpath ((F ∙ (G ∙ H)) y₂)) (?p x₂ y₂ xy₂) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp
        (idpath ((F ∙ (G ∙ H)) x₁))
        (idpath ((F ∙ (G ∙ H)) y₁)) (?p x₁ y₁ xy₁) ;;2 
      (#2 (transportb (mor_disp D₁ D₄) (assoc F G H)
             (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                (comp_twosided_disp_functor FF GG) HH)))
        fg)

    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: setcategory
F: pr1 C₁ ⟶ pr1 C₂
G: pr1 C₂ ⟶ pr1 C₃
H: pr1 C₃ ⟶ pr1 C₄
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
D₄: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₄ C₄
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
HH: twosided_disp_functor H H D₃ D₄
∏ (x y : C₁) (xy : D₁ x y),
comp_twosided_disp_functor FF
  (comp_twosided_disp_functor GG HH) x y xy =
transportb (mor_disp D₁ D₄) (assoc F G H)
  (comp_twosided_disp_functor
     (comp_twosided_disp_functor FF GG) HH) x y xy
 
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: setcategory
F: pr1 C₁ ⟶ pr1 C₂
G: pr1 C₂ ⟶ pr1 C₃
H: pr1 C₃ ⟶ pr1 C₄
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
D₄: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₄ C₄
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
HH: twosided_disp_functor H H D₃ D₄
x, y: C₁
xy: D₁ x y
HH (G (F x)) (G (F y)) (GG (F x) (F y) (FF x y xy)) =
transportb (mor_disp D₁ D₄) (assoc F G H)
  (comp_twosided_disp_functor
     (comp_twosided_disp_functor FF GG) HH) x y xy

      exact (!(transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                 _ _ _
                 (@assoc cat_of_setcategory _ _ _ _ F G H)
                 (comp_twosided_disp_functor (comp_twosided_disp_functor FF GG) HH)
                 xy)).
    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: setcategory
F: pr1 C₁ ⟶ pr1 C₂
G: pr1 C₂ ⟶ pr1 C₃
H: pr1 C₃ ⟶ pr1 C₄
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
D₄: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₄ C₄
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
HH: twosided_disp_functor H H D₃ D₄
∏ (x₁ x₂ : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧) (y₁ y₂ : C₁)
(g : C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁) (xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂)
(fg : xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂),
(#2 (comp_twosided_disp_functor FF
       (comp_twosided_disp_functor GG HH))) fg ;;2 
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath ((F ∙ (G ∙ H)) x₂))
  (idpath ((F ∙ (G ∙ H)) y₂))
  ((λ (x y : C₁) (xy : D₁ x y),
    ! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
        (functor_composite_data F (G · H))
        (is_functor_composite F (G · H))
        (is_functor_composite (F · G) H) (assoc F G H)
        (comp_twosided_disp_functor
           (comp_twosided_disp_functor FF GG) HH) xy
    :
    comp_twosided_disp_functor FF
      (comp_twosided_disp_functor GG HH) x y xy =
    transportb (mor_disp D₁ D₄) (assoc F G H)
      (comp_twosided_disp_functor
         (comp_twosided_disp_functor FF GG) HH) x y xy)
     x₂ y₂ xy₂) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp
        (idpath ((F ∙ (G ∙ H)) x₁))
        (idpath ((F ∙ (G ∙ H)) y₁))
        ((λ (x y : C₁) (xy : D₁ x y),
          ! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
              (functor_composite_data F (G · H))
              (is_functor_composite F (G · H))
              (is_functor_composite (F · G) H)
              (assoc F G H)
              (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                 (comp_twosided_disp_functor FF GG) HH)
              xy
          :
          comp_twosided_disp_functor FF
            (comp_twosided_disp_functor GG HH) x y xy =
          transportb (mor_disp D₁ D₄) (assoc F G H)
            (comp_twosided_disp_functor
               (comp_twosided_disp_functor FF GG) HH)
            x y xy) x₁ y₁ xy₁) ;;2 (#2 (transportb
                                          (mor_disp D₁
                                             D₄)
                                          (assoc F G H)
                                          (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                                             (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                                                FF GG)
                                             HH))) fg)
 
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: setcategory
F: pr1 C₁ ⟶ pr1 C₂
G: pr1 C₂ ⟶ pr1 C₃
H: pr1 C₃ ⟶ pr1 C₄
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
D₄: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₄ C₄
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
HH: twosided_disp_functor H H D₃ D₄
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
(#2 (comp_twosided_disp_functor FF
       (comp_twosided_disp_functor GG HH))) fg ;;2 
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath ((F ∙ (G ∙ H)) x₂))
  (idpath ((F ∙ (G ∙ H)) y₂))
  ((λ (x y : C₁) (xy : D₁ x y),
    ! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
        (functor_composite_data F (G · H))
        (is_functor_composite F (G · H))
        (is_functor_composite (F · G) H) (assoc F G H)
        (comp_twosided_disp_functor
           (comp_twosided_disp_functor FF GG) HH) xy
    :
    comp_twosided_disp_functor FF
      (comp_twosided_disp_functor GG HH) x y xy =
    transportb (mor_disp D₁ D₄) (assoc F G H)
      (comp_twosided_disp_functor
         (comp_twosided_disp_functor FF GG) HH) x y xy)
     x₂ y₂ xy₂) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp
        (idpath ((F ∙ (G ∙ H)) x₁))
        (idpath ((F ∙ (G ∙ H)) y₁))
        ((λ (x y : C₁) (xy : D₁ x y),
          ! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
              (functor_composite_data F (G · H))
              (is_functor_composite F (G · H))
              (is_functor_composite (F · G) H)
              (assoc F G H)
              (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                 (comp_twosided_disp_functor FF GG) HH)
              xy
          :
          comp_twosided_disp_functor FF
            (comp_twosided_disp_functor GG HH) x y xy =
          transportb (mor_disp D₁ D₄) (assoc F G H)
            (comp_twosided_disp_functor
               (comp_twosided_disp_functor FF GG) HH)
            x y xy) x₁ y₁ xy₁) ;;2 (#2 (transportb
                                          (mor_disp D₁
                                             D₄)
                                          (assoc F G H)
                                          (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                                             (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                                                FF GG)
                                             HH))) fg)

      
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: setcategory
F: pr1 C₁ ⟶ pr1 C₂
G: pr1 C₂ ⟶ pr1 C₃
H: pr1 C₃ ⟶ pr1 C₄
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
D₄: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₄ C₄
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
HH: twosided_disp_functor H H D₃ D₄
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp
        (idpath ((F ∙ (G ∙ H)) x₁))
        (idpath ((F ∙ (G ∙ H)) y₁))
        (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
             (functor_composite_data F (G · H))
             (is_functor_composite F (G · H))
             (is_functor_composite (F · G) H)
             (assoc F G H)
             (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                (comp_twosided_disp_functor FF GG) HH)
             xy₁) ;;2 (#2 (transportb (mor_disp D₁ D₄)
                             (assoc F G H)
                             (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                                (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                                   FF GG) HH))) fg) =
(#2 (comp_twosided_disp_functor FF
       (comp_twosided_disp_functor GG HH))) fg ;;2 
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath ((F ∙ (G ∙ H)) x₂))
  (idpath ((F ∙ (G ∙ H)) y₂))
  (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
       (functor_composite_data F (G · H))
       (is_functor_composite F (G · H))
       (is_functor_composite (F · G) H) (assoc F G H)
       (comp_twosided_disp_functor
          (comp_twosided_disp_functor FF GG) HH) xy₂)

      
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: setcategory
F: pr1 C₁ ⟶ pr1 C₂
G: pr1 C₂ ⟶ pr1 C₃
H: pr1 C₃ ⟶ pr1 C₄
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
D₄: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₄ C₄
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
HH: twosided_disp_functor H H D₃ D₄
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp
        (idpath ((F ∙ (G ∙ H)) x₁))
        (idpath ((F ∙ (G ∙ H)) y₁))
        (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
             (functor_composite_data F (G · H))
             (is_functor_composite F (G · H))
             (is_functor_composite (F · G) H)
             (assoc F G H)
             (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                (comp_twosided_disp_functor FF GG) HH)
             xy₁) ;;2 (#2 (transportb (mor_disp D₁ D₄)
                             (assoc F G H)
                             (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                                (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                                   FF GG) HH))) fg) =
?b
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: setcategory
F: pr1 C₁ ⟶ pr1 C₂
G: pr1 C₂ ⟶ pr1 C₃
H: pr1 C₃ ⟶ pr1 C₄
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
D₄: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₄ C₄
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
HH: twosided_disp_functor H H D₃ D₄
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
?b =
(#2 (comp_twosided_disp_functor FF
       (comp_twosided_disp_functor GG HH))) fg ;;2 
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath ((F ∙ (G ∙ H)) x₂))
  (idpath ((F ∙ (G ∙ H)) y₂))
  (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
       (functor_composite_data F (G · H))
       (is_functor_composite F (G · H))
       (is_functor_composite (F · G) H) (assoc F G H)
       (comp_twosided_disp_functor
          (comp_twosided_disp_functor FF GG) HH) xy₂)

      
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: setcategory
F: pr1 C₁ ⟶ pr1 C₂
G: pr1 C₂ ⟶ pr1 C₃
H: pr1 C₃ ⟶ pr1 C₄
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
D₄: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₄ C₄
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
HH: twosided_disp_functor H H D₃ D₄
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp
        (idpath ((F ∙ (G ∙ H)) x₁))
        (idpath ((F ∙ (G ∙ H)) y₁))
        (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
             (functor_composite_data F (G · H))
             (is_functor_composite F (G · H))
             (is_functor_composite (F · G) H)
             (assoc F G H)
             (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                (comp_twosided_disp_functor FF GG) HH)
             xy₁) ;;2 (#2 (transportb (mor_disp D₁ D₄)
                             (assoc F G H)
                             (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                                (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                                   FF GG) HH))) fg) =
?b

        
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: setcategory
F: pr1 C₁ ⟶ pr1 C₂
G: pr1 C₂ ⟶ pr1 C₃
H: pr1 C₃ ⟶ pr1 C₄
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
D₄: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₄ C₄
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
HH: twosided_disp_functor H H D₃ D₄
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
(#2 (transportb (mor_disp D₁ D₄) (assoc F G H)
       (comp_twosided_disp_functor
          (comp_twosided_disp_functor FF GG) HH))) fg =
?t2

        apply (transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_mor
                 _
                 _ _
                 (assoc (C := cat_of_setcategory) F G H)).
      
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: setcategory
F: pr1 C₁ ⟶ pr1 C₂
G: pr1 C₂ ⟶ pr1 C₃
H: pr1 C₃ ⟶ pr1 C₄
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
D₄: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₄ C₄
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
HH: twosided_disp_functor H H D₃ D₄
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp
        (idpath ((F ∙ (G ∙ H)) x₁))
        (idpath ((F ∙ (G ∙ H)) y₁))
        (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
             (functor_composite_data F (G · H))
             (is_functor_composite F (G · H))
             (is_functor_composite (F · G) H)
             (assoc F G H)
             (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                (comp_twosided_disp_functor FF GG) HH)
             xy₁) ;;2 (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                               (idpath
                                  (make_functor
                                     (make_functor
                                        (functor_composite_data
                                           F (G · H))
                                        (is_functor_composite
                                           F (G · H)))
                                     (is_functor_composite
                                        F (G · H)) x₁))
                               (idpath
                                  (make_functor
                                     (make_functor
                                        (functor_composite_data
                                           F (G · H))
                                        (is_functor_composite
                                           F (G · H)))
                                     (is_functor_composite
                                        F (G · H)) y₁))
                               (transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                                  (make_functor
                                     (functor_composite_data
                                        F (G · H))
                                     (is_functor_composite
                                        F (G · H)))
                                  (is_functor_composite
                                     F (G · H))
                                  (is_functor_composite
                                     (F · G) H)
                                  (assoc F G H)
                                  (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                                     (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                                        FF GG) HH) xy₁) ;;2 
                             (#2 (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                                    (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                                       FF GG) HH)) fg ;;2 
                             idtoiso_twosided_disp
                               (idpath
                                  (make_functor
                                     (make_functor
                                        (functor_composite_data
                                           F (G · H))
                                        (is_functor_composite
                                           F (G · H)))
                                     (is_functor_composite
                                        F (G · H)) x₂))
                               (idpath
                                  (make_functor
                                     (make_functor
                                        (functor_composite_data
                                           F (G · H))
                                        (is_functor_composite
                                           F (G · H)))
                                     (is_functor_composite
                                        F (G · H)) y₂))
                               (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                                    (make_functor
                                       (functor_composite_data
                                          F (G · H))
                                       (is_functor_composite
                                          F (G · H)))
                                    (is_functor_composite
                                       F (G · H))
                                    (is_functor_composite
                                       (F · G) H)
                                    (assoc F G H)
                                    (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                                       (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                                          FF GG) HH)
                                    xy₂)))) =
(#2 (comp_twosided_disp_functor FF
       (comp_twosided_disp_functor GG HH))) fg ;;2 
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath ((F ∙ (G ∙ H)) x₂))
  (idpath ((F ∙ (G ∙ H)) y₂))
  (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
       (functor_composite_data F (G · H))
       (is_functor_composite F (G · H))
       (is_functor_composite (F · G) H) (assoc F G H)
       (comp_twosided_disp_functor
          (comp_twosided_disp_functor FF GG) HH) xy₂)

      
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: setcategory
F: pr1 C₁ ⟶ pr1 C₂
G: pr1 C₂ ⟶ pr1 C₃
H: pr1 C₃ ⟶ pr1 C₄
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
D₄: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₄ C₄
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
HH: twosided_disp_functor H H D₃ D₄
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (H (G (F x₁))))
        (idpath (H (G (F y₁))))
        (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
             (functor_composite_data F
                (functor_composite_data G H))
             (is_functor_composite F (G ∙ H))
             (is_functor_composite (F ∙ G) H)
             (assoc F G H)
             (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                (comp_twosided_disp_functor FF GG) HH)
             xy₁) ;;2 (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                               (idpath (H (G (F x₁))))
                               (idpath (H (G (F y₁))))
                               (transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                                  (functor_composite_data
                                     F
                                     (functor_composite_data
                                        G H))
                                  (is_functor_composite
                                     F (G ∙ H))
                                  (is_functor_composite
                                     (F ∙ G) H)
                                  (assoc F G H)
                                  (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                                     (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                                        FF GG) HH) xy₁) ;;2 
                             (#2 HH)
                               ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) fg)) ;;2 
                             idtoiso_twosided_disp
                               (idpath (H (G (F x₂))))
                               (idpath (H (G (F y₂))))
                               (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                                    (functor_composite_data
                                       F
                                       (functor_composite_data
                                          G H))
                                    (is_functor_composite
                                       F (G ∙ H))
                                    (is_functor_composite
                                       (F ∙ G) H)
                                    (assoc F G H)
                                    (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                                       (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                                          FF GG) HH)
                                    xy₂)))) =
(#2 HH) ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) fg)) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                     (idpath
                                        (H (G (F x₂))))
                                     (idpath
                                        (H (G (F y₂))))
                                     (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                                          (functor_composite_data
                                             F
                                             (functor_composite_data
                                                G H))
                                          (is_functor_composite
                                             F (G ∙ H))
                                          (is_functor_composite
                                             (F ∙ G) H)
                                          (assoc F G H)
                                          (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                                             (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                                                FF GG)
                                             HH) xy₂)

      
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: setcategory
F: pr1 C₁ ⟶ pr1 C₂
G: pr1 C₂ ⟶ pr1 C₃
H: pr1 C₃ ⟶ pr1 C₄
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
D₄: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₄ C₄
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
HH: twosided_disp_functor H H D₃ D₄
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp
              (idpath (H (G (F x₁))))
              (idpath (H (G (F y₁))))
              (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                   (functor_composite_data F
                      (functor_composite_data G H))
                   (is_functor_composite F (G ∙ H))
                   (is_functor_composite (F ∙ G) H)
                   (assoc F G H)
                   (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                      (comp_twosided_disp_functor FF
                         GG) HH) xy₁) ;;2 (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                             (idpath
                                                (H
                                                 (G
                                                 (F x₁))))
                                             (idpath
                                                (H
                                                 (G
                                                 (F y₁))))
                                             (transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                                                (functor_composite_data
                                                 F
                                                 (functor_composite_data
                                                 G H))
                                                (is_functor_composite
                                                 F
                                                 (G
                                                 ∙ H))
                                                (is_functor_composite
                                                 (F
                                                 ∙ G)
                                                 H)
                                                (assoc
                                                 F G H)
                                                (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                                                 (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                                                 FF GG)
                                                 HH)
                                                xy₁) ;;2 
                                           (#2 HH)
                                             ((#2 GG)
                                                ((#2 FF)
                                                 fg)) ;;2 
                                           idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                             (idpath
                                                (H
                                                 (G
                                                 (F x₂))))
                                             (idpath
                                                (H
                                                 (G
                                                 (F y₂))))
                                             (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                                                 (functor_composite_data
                                                 F
                                                 (functor_composite_data
                                                 G H))
                                                 (is_functor_composite
                                                 F
                                                 (G
                                                 ∙ H))
                                                 (is_functor_composite
                                                 (F
                                                 ∙ G)
                                                 H)
                                                 (assoc
                                                 F G H)
                                                 (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                                                 (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                                                 FF GG)
                                                 HH)
                                                 xy₂)))) =
(#2 HH) ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) fg)) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                     (idpath
                                        (H (G (F x₂))))
                                     (idpath
                                        (H (G (F y₂))))
                                     (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                                          (functor_composite_data
                                             F
                                             (functor_composite_data
                                                G H))
                                          (is_functor_composite
                                             F (G ∙ H))
                                          (is_functor_composite
                                             (F ∙ G) H)
                                          (assoc F G H)
                                          (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                                             (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                                                FF GG)
                                             HH) xy₂)

      
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: setcategory
F: pr1 C₁ ⟶ pr1 C₂
G: pr1 C₂ ⟶ pr1 C₃
H: pr1 C₃ ⟶ pr1 C₄
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃

FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
HH: twosided_disp_functor H H D₃ D₄
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (H (G (F x₁))))
        (idpath (H (G (F y₁))))
        (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
             (functor_composite_data F
                (functor_composite_data G H))
             (is_functor_composite F (G ∙ H))
             (is_functor_composite (F ∙ G) H)
             (assoc F G H)
             (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                (comp_twosided_disp_functor FF GG) HH)
             xy₁) ;;2 (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                         (idpath (H (G (F x₁))))
                         (idpath (H (G (F y₁))))
                         (transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                            (functor_composite_data F
                               (functor_composite_data
                                  G H))
                            (is_functor_composite F
                               (G ∙ H))
                            (is_functor_composite
                               (F ∙ G) H)
                            (assoc F G H)
                            (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                               (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                                  FF GG) HH) xy₁) ;;2 
                       (#2 HH) ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) fg)) ;;2 
                       idtoiso_twosided_disp
                         (idpath (H (G (F x₂))))
                         (idpath (H (G (F y₂))))
                         (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                              (functor_composite_data
                                 F
                                 (functor_composite_data
                                    G H))
                              (is_functor_composite F
                                 (G ∙ H))
                              (is_functor_composite
                                 (F ∙ G) H)
                              (assoc F G H)
                              (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                                 (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                                    FF GG) HH) xy₂))) =
(#2 HH) ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) fg)) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                     (idpath
                                        (H (G (F x₂))))
                                     (idpath
                                        (H (G (F y₂))))
                                     (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                                          (functor_composite_data
                                             F
                                             (functor_composite_data
                                                G H))
                                          (is_functor_composite
                                             F (G ∙ H))
                                          (is_functor_composite
                                             (F ∙ G) H)
                                          (assoc F G H)
                                          (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                                             (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                                                FF GG)
                                             HH) xy₂)

      
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: setcategory
F: pr1 C₁ ⟶ pr1 C₂
G: pr1 C₂ ⟶ pr1 C₃
H: pr1 C₃ ⟶ pr1 C₄
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
D₄: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₄ C₄
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
HH: twosided_disp_functor H H D₃ D₄
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (H (G (F x₁))))
        (idpath (H (G (F y₁))))
        (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
             (functor_composite_data F
                (functor_composite_data G H))
             (is_functor_composite F (G ∙ H))
             (is_functor_composite (F ∙ G) H)
             (assoc F G H)
             (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                (comp_twosided_disp_functor FF GG) HH)
             xy₁) ;;2 (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                         (idpath (H (G (F x₁))))
                         (idpath (H (G (F y₁))))
                         (transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                            (functor_composite_data F
                               (functor_composite_data
                                  G H))
                            (is_functor_composite F
                               (G ∙ H))
                            (is_functor_composite
                               (F ∙ G) H)
                            (assoc F G H)
                            (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                               (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                                  FF GG) HH) xy₁) ;;2 
                       (#2 HH) ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) fg)) ;;2 
                       idtoiso_twosided_disp
                         (idpath (H (G (F x₂))))
                         (idpath (H (G (F y₂))))
                         (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                              (functor_composite_data
                                 F
                                 (functor_composite_data
                                    G H))
                              (is_functor_composite F
                                 (G ∙ H))
                              (is_functor_composite
                                 (F ∙ G) H)
                              (assoc F G H)
                              (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                                 (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                                    FF GG) HH) xy₂))) =
?b
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: setcategory
F: pr1 C₁ ⟶ pr1 C₂
G: pr1 C₂ ⟶ pr1 C₃
H: pr1 C₃ ⟶ pr1 C₄
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
D₄: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₄ C₄
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
HH: twosided_disp_functor H H D₃ D₄
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
?b =
(#2 HH) ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) fg)) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                     (idpath
                                        (H (G (F x₂))))
                                     (idpath
                                        (H (G (F y₂))))
                                     (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                                          (functor_composite_data
                                             F
                                             (functor_composite_data
                                                G H))
                                          (is_functor_composite
                                             F (G ∙ H))
                                          (is_functor_composite
                                             (F ∙ G) H)
                                          (assoc F G H)
                                          (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                                             (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                                                FF GG)
                                             HH) xy₂)

      
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: setcategory
F: pr1 C₁ ⟶ pr1 C₂
G: pr1 C₂ ⟶ pr1 C₃
H: pr1 C₃ ⟶ pr1 C₄
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
D₄: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₄ C₄
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
HH: twosided_disp_functor H H D₃ D₄
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (H (G (F x₁))))
        (idpath (H (G (F y₁))))
        (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
             (functor_composite_data F
                (functor_composite_data G H))
             (is_functor_composite F (G ∙ H))
             (is_functor_composite (F ∙ G) H)
             (assoc F G H)
             (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                (comp_twosided_disp_functor FF GG) HH)
             xy₁) ;;2 (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                         (idpath (H (G (F x₁))))
                         (idpath (H (G (F y₁))))
                         (transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                            (functor_composite_data F
                               (functor_composite_data
                                  G H))
                            (is_functor_composite F
                               (G ∙ H))
                            (is_functor_composite
                               (F ∙ G) H)
                            (assoc F G H)
                            (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                               (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                                  FF GG) HH) xy₁) ;;2 
                       (#2 HH) ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) fg)) ;;2 
                       idtoiso_twosided_disp
                         (idpath (H (G (F x₂))))
                         (idpath (H (G (F y₂))))
                         (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                              (functor_composite_data
                                 F
                                 (functor_composite_data
                                    G H))
                              (is_functor_composite F
                                 (G ∙ H))
                              (is_functor_composite
                                 (F ∙ G) H)
                              (assoc F G H)
                              (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                                 (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                                    FF GG) HH) xy₂))) =
?b

        
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: setcategory
F: pr1 C₁ ⟶ pr1 C₂
G: pr1 C₂ ⟶ pr1 C₃
H: pr1 C₃ ⟶ pr1 C₄
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
D₄: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₄ C₄
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
HH: twosided_disp_functor H H D₃ D₄
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (H (G (F x₁))))
  (idpath (H (G (F y₁))))
  (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
       (functor_composite_data F
          (functor_composite_data G H))
       (is_functor_composite F (G ∙ H))
       (is_functor_composite (F ∙ G) H) (assoc F G H)
       (comp_twosided_disp_functor
          (comp_twosided_disp_functor FF GG) HH) xy₁) ;;2 
(idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (H (G (F x₁))))
   (idpath (H (G (F y₁))))
   (transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
      (functor_composite_data F
         (functor_composite_data G H))
      (is_functor_composite F (G ∙ H))
      (is_functor_composite (F ∙ G) H) (assoc F G H)
      (comp_twosided_disp_functor
         (comp_twosided_disp_functor FF GG) HH) xy₁) ;;2 
 (#2 HH) ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) fg)) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                      (idpath
                                         (H (G (F x₂))))
                                      (idpath
                                         (H (G (F y₂))))
                                      (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                                           (functor_composite_data
                                              F
                                              (functor_composite_data
                                                 G H))
                                           (is_functor_composite
                                              F
                                              (G ∙ H))
                                           (is_functor_composite
                                              (F ∙ G)
                                              H)
                                           (assoc F G
                                              H)
                                           (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                                              (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                                                 FF GG)
                                              HH) xy₂)) =
?t2

        apply (assoc_two_disp (D := D₄)).
      
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: setcategory
F: pr1 C₁ ⟶ pr1 C₂
G: pr1 C₂ ⟶ pr1 C₃
H: pr1 C₃ ⟶ pr1 C₄
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
D₄: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₄ C₄
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
HH: twosided_disp_functor H H D₃ D₄
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ (trb₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp
              (idpath (H (G (F x₁))))
              (idpath (H (G (F y₁))))
              (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                   (functor_composite_data F
                      (functor_composite_data G H))
                   (is_functor_composite F (G ∙ H))
                   (is_functor_composite (F ∙ G) H)
                   (assoc F G H)
                   (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                      (comp_twosided_disp_functor FF
                         GG) HH) xy₁) ;;2 (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                             (idpath
                                                (H
                                                 (G
                                                 (F x₁))))
                                             (idpath
                                                (H
                                                 (G
                                                 (F y₁))))
                                             (transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                                                (functor_composite_data
                                                 F
                                                 (functor_composite_data
                                                 G H))
                                                (is_functor_composite
                                                 F
                                                 (G
                                                 ∙ H))
                                                (is_functor_composite
                                                 (F
                                                 ∙ G)
                                                 H)
                                                (assoc
                                                 F G H)
                                                (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                                                 (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                                                 FF GG)
                                                 HH)
                                                xy₁) ;;2 
                                           (#2 HH)
                                             ((#2 GG)
                                                ((#2 FF)
                                                 fg))) ;;2 
            idtoiso_twosided_disp
              (idpath (H (G (F x₂))))
              (idpath (H (G (F y₂))))
              (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                   (functor_composite_data F
                      (functor_composite_data G H))
                   (is_functor_composite F (G ∙ H))
                   (is_functor_composite (F ∙ G) H)
                   (assoc F G H)
                   (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                      (comp_twosided_disp_functor FF
                         GG) HH) xy₂))) =
(#2 HH) ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) fg)) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                     (idpath
                                        (H (G (F x₂))))
                                     (idpath
                                        (H (G (F y₂))))
                                     (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                                          (functor_composite_data
                                             F
                                             (functor_composite_data
                                                G H))
                                          (is_functor_composite
                                             F (G ∙ H))
                                          (is_functor_composite
                                             (F ∙ G) H)
                                          (assoc F G H)
                                          (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                                             (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                                                FF GG)
                                             HH) xy₂)

                   (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                      (comp_twosided_disp_functor FF
                         GG) HH) xy₁) ;;2 (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                             (idpath
                                                (H

                                                 (F x₁))))

                                                (H

                                                 H)
                                                (assoc

                                                (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                                                 (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                                                 FF GG)
                                                 HH)
                                                xy₁) ;;2

                                                 fg))) ;;2 
            idtoiso_twosided_disp

                       (#2 HH) ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) fg))) ;;2

        (idpath (H (G (F y₁))))
        (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob

                (comp_twosided_disp_functor FF GG) HH)

                         (idpath (H (G (F x₁))))

                            (functor_composite_data F

                                  FF GG) HH) xy₁) ;;2 
                       (#2 HH) ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) fg))) ;;2

        (idpath (H (G (F y₂))))
        (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
             (functor_composite_data F
                (functor_composite_data G H))
             (is_functor_composite F (G ∙ H))
             (is_functor_composite (F ∙ G) H)
             (assoc F G H)
             (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                (comp_twosided_disp_functor FF GG) HH)
             xy₂)) = ?b
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: setcategory
F: pr1 C₁ ⟶ pr1 C₂
G: pr1 C₂ ⟶ pr1 C₃
H: pr1 C₃ ⟶ pr1 C₄

xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
?b =
(#2 HH) ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) fg)) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                     (idpath
                                        (H (G (F x₂))))

                                        (H (G (F y₂))))

                                       (idpath
                                          (H
                                             (G (F y₂))))
                                       (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                                            (functor_composite_data
                                               F
                                               (functor_composite_data
                                                 G H))
                                            (is_functor_composite
                                               F
                                               (G ∙ H))
                                            (is_functor_composite
                                               (F ∙ G)
                                               H)
                                            (assoc F G
                                               H)
                                            (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                                               (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                                                 FF GG)
                                               HH) xy₂) =
?t2

        
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: setcategory
F: pr1 C₁ ⟶ pr1 C₂
G: pr1 C₂ ⟶ pr1 C₃
H: pr1 C₃ ⟶ pr1 C₄
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
D₄: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₄ C₄
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
HH: twosided_disp_functor H H D₃ D₄
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (H (G (F x₁))))
  (idpath (H (G (F y₁))))
  (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
       (functor_composite_data F
          (functor_composite_data G H))
       (is_functor_composite F (G ∙ H))
       (is_functor_composite (F ∙ G) H) (assoc F G H)
       (comp_twosided_disp_functor
          (comp_twosided_disp_functor FF GG) HH) xy₁) ;;2 
(idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (H (G (F x₁))))
   (idpath (H (G (F y₁))))
   (transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
      (functor_composite_data F
         (functor_composite_data G H))
      (is_functor_composite F (G ∙ H))
      (is_functor_composite (F ∙ G) H) (assoc F G H)
      (comp_twosided_disp_functor
         (comp_twosided_disp_functor FF GG) HH) xy₁) ;;2 
 (#2 HH) ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) fg))) = ?y'

        apply (assoc_two_disp (D := D₄)).
      
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: setcategory
F: pr1 C₁ ⟶ pr1 C₂
G: pr1 C₂ ⟶ pr1 C₃
H: pr1 C₃ ⟶ pr1 C₄

D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂

FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
HH: twosided_disp_functor H H D₃ D₄
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ (trb₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp
              (idpath (H (G (F x₁))))
              (idpath (H (G (F y₁))))
              (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                   (functor_composite_data F
                      (functor_composite_data G H))
                   (is_functor_composite F (G ∙ H))
                   (is_functor_composite (F ∙ G) H)
                   (assoc F G H)
                   (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                      (comp_twosided_disp_functor FF
                         GG) HH) xy₁) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                            (idpath
                                               (H
                                                 (G
                                                 (F x₁))))
                                            (idpath
                                               (H
                                                 (G
                                                 (F y₁))))
                                            (transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                                               (functor_composite_data
                                                 F
                                                 (functor_composite_data
                                                 G H))
                                               (is_functor_composite
                                                 F
                                                 (G
                                                 ∙ H))
                                               (is_functor_composite
                                                 (F
                                                 ∙ G)
                                                 H)
                                               (assoc
                                                 F G H)
                                               (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                                                 (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                                                 FF GG)
                                                 HH)
                                               xy₁) ;;2 
            (#2 HH) ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) fg))) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (H
                                                 (G
                                                 (F x₂))))
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (H
                                                 (G
                                                 (F y₂))))
                                                 (! 
                                                 transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                                                 (functor_composite_data
                                                 F
                                                 (functor_composite_data
                                                 G H))
                                                 (is_functor_composite
                                                 F
                                                 (G
                                                 ∙ H))
                                                 (is_functor_composite
                                                 (F
                                                 ∙ G)
                                                 H)
                                                 (assoc
                                                 F G H)
                                                 (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                                                 (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                                                 FF GG)
                                                 HH)
                                                 xy₂)) =
(#2 HH) ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) fg)) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                     (idpath
                                        (H (G (F x₂))))
                                     (idpath
                                        (H (G (F y₂))))
                                     (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                                          (functor_composite_data
                                             F
                                             (functor_composite_data
                                                G H))
                                          (is_functor_composite
                                             F (G ∙ H))
                                          (is_functor_composite
                                             (F ∙ G) H)
                                          (assoc F G H)
                                          (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                                             (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                                                FF GG)
                                             HH) xy₂)

                                                 H)

                                                 FF GG)
                                                 HH)
                                               xy₁) ;;2 
            (#2 HH) ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) fg))) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (H
                                                 (G
                                                 (F x₂))))
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (H
                                                 (G
                                                 (F y₂))))

                                                 ∙ H))

                                                 H)

                                                 (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                                                 FF GG)
                                                 HH)
                                               xy₁) ;;2 
            (#2 HH) ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) fg)) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (H
                                                 (G
                                                 (F x₂))))
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (H

                                                 (F y₂))))

                                                 (functor_composite_data
                                                 F

                                                 G H))
                                                 (is_functor_composite

                                                 (G
                                                 ∙ H))
                                                 (is_functor_composite
                                                 (F
                                                 ∙ G)
                                                 H)
                                                 (assoc
                                                 F G H)
                                                 (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                                                 (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                                                 FF GG)
                                                 HH)
                                                 xy₂))) =
(#2 HH) ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) fg)) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                     (idpath
                                        (H (G (F x₂))))
                                     (idpath
                                        (H (G (F y₂))))

F: pr1 C₁ ⟶ pr1 C₂

FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
HH: twosided_disp_functor H H D₃ D₄
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧

fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂

        (idpath (H (G (F y₁))))
        (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
             (functor_composite_data F

             (assoc F G H)
             (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                (comp_twosided_disp_functor FF GG) HH)
             xy₁) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                        (idpath (H (G (F x₁))))
                        (idpath (H (G (F y₁))))
                        (transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                           (functor_composite_data F

                                 G H))
                           (is_functor_composite F
                              (G ∙ H))

                              (F ∙ G) H) (assoc F G H)
                           (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                              (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                                 FF GG) HH) xy₁) ;;2 
      (#2 HH) ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) fg)) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                           (idpath
                                              (H
                                                 (G
                                                 (F x₂))))
                                           (idpath
                                              (H
                                                 (G
                                                 (F y₂))))

                                                 G H))

                                                 FF GG)
                                                 HH)

                                          (assoc F G H)
                                          (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                                             (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                                                FF GG)
                                             HH) xy₂)

      
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: setcategory
F: pr1 C₁ ⟶ pr1 C₂
G: pr1 C₂ ⟶ pr1 C₃
H: pr1 C₃ ⟶ pr1 C₄
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
D₄: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₄ C₄
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
HH: twosided_disp_functor H H D₃ D₄
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (H (G (F x₁))))
        (idpath (H (G (F y₁))))
        (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
             (functor_composite_data F
                (functor_composite_data G H))
             (is_functor_composite F (G ∙ H))
             (is_functor_composite (F ∙ G) H)
             (assoc F G H)
             (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                (comp_twosided_disp_functor FF GG) HH)
             xy₁) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                        (idpath (H (G (F x₁))))
                        (idpath (H (G (F y₁))))
                        (transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                           (functor_composite_data F
                              (functor_composite_data
                                 G H))
                           (is_functor_composite F
                              (G ∙ H))
                           (is_functor_composite
                              (F ∙ G) H) (assoc F G H)
                           (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                              (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                                 FF GG) HH) xy₁) ;;2 
      (#2 HH) ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) fg)) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                           (idpath
                                              (H
                                                 (G
                                                 (F x₂))))
                                           (idpath
                                              (H
                                                 (G
                                                 (F y₂))))
                                           (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                                                (functor_composite_data
                                                 F
                                                 (functor_composite_data
                                                 G H))
                                                (is_functor_composite
                                                 F
                                                 (G
                                                 ∙ H))
                                                (is_functor_composite
                                                 (F
                                                 ∙ G)
                                                 H)
                                                (assoc
                                                 F G H)
                                                (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                                                 (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                                                 FF GG)
                                                 HH)
                                                xy₂)) =
?b
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: setcategory
F: pr1 C₁ ⟶ pr1 C₂
G: pr1 C₂ ⟶ pr1 C₃
H: pr1 C₃ ⟶ pr1 C₄
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
D₄: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₄ C₄
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
HH: twosided_disp_functor H H D₃ D₄
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
?b =
(#2 HH) ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) fg)) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                     (idpath
                                        (H (G (F x₂))))
                                     (idpath
                                        (H (G (F y₂))))
                                     (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                                          (functor_composite_data
                                             F
                                             (functor_composite_data
                                                G H))
                                          (is_functor_composite
                                             F (G ∙ H))
                                          (is_functor_composite
                                             (F ∙ G) H)
                                          (assoc F G H)
                                          (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                                             (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                                                FF GG)
                                             HH) xy₂)

F: pr1 C₁ ⟶ pr1 C₂
G: pr1 C₂ ⟶ pr1 C₃
H: pr1 C₃ ⟶ pr1 C₄

D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂

FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
HH: twosided_disp_functor H H D₃ D₄

f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₁

xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (H (G (F x₁))))
        (idpath (H (G (F y₁))))
        (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
             (functor_composite_data F
                (functor_composite_data G H))
             (is_functor_composite F (G ∙ H))
             (is_functor_composite (F ∙ G) H)
             (assoc F G H)
             (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                (comp_twosided_disp_functor FF GG) HH)
             xy₁) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                        (idpath (H (G (F x₁))))
                        (idpath (H (G (F y₁))))
                        (transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                           (functor_composite_data F
                              (functor_composite_data
                                 G H))
                           (is_functor_composite F
                              (G ∙ H))
                           (is_functor_composite
                              (F ∙ G) H) (assoc F G H)
                           (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                              (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                                 FF GG) HH) xy₁) ;;2 
      (#2 HH) ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) fg)) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                           (idpath
                                              (H
                                                 (G
                                                 (F x₂))))
                                           (idpath
                                              (H
                                                 (G
                                                 (F y₂))))
                                           (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                                                (functor_composite_data
                                                 F
                                                 (functor_composite_data
                                                 G H))
                                                (is_functor_composite
                                                 F
                                                 (G
                                                 ∙ H))
                                                (is_functor_composite
                                                 (F
                                                 ∙ G)
                                                 H)
                                                (assoc
                                                 F G H)
                                                (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                                                 (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                                                 FF GG)
                                                 HH)
                                                xy₂)) =
?b

        
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: setcategory
F: pr1 C₁ ⟶ pr1 C₂
G: pr1 C₂ ⟶ pr1 C₃
H: pr1 C₃ ⟶ pr1 C₄
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
D₄: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₄ C₄
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
HH: twosided_disp_functor H H D₃ D₄
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (H (G (F x₁))))
  (idpath (H (G (F y₁))))
  (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
       (functor_composite_data F
          (functor_composite_data G H))
       (is_functor_composite F (G ∙ H))
       (is_functor_composite (F ∙ G) H) (assoc F G H)
       (comp_twosided_disp_functor
          (comp_twosided_disp_functor FF GG) HH) xy₁) ;;2 
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (H (G (F x₁))))
  (idpath (H (G (F y₁))))
  (transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
     (functor_composite_data F
        (functor_composite_data G H))
     (is_functor_composite F (G ∙ H))
     (is_functor_composite (F ∙ G) H) (assoc F G H)
     (comp_twosided_disp_functor
        (comp_twosided_disp_functor FF GG) HH) xy₁) ;;2 
(#2 HH) ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) fg)) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                     (idpath
                                        (H (G (F x₂))))
                                     (idpath
                                        (H (G (F y₂))))
                                     (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                                          (functor_composite_data
                                             F
                                             (functor_composite_data
                                                G H))
                                          (is_functor_composite
                                             F (G ∙ H))
                                          (is_functor_composite
                                             (F ∙ G) H)
                                          (assoc F G H)
                                          (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                                             (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                                                FF GG)
                                             HH) xy₂) =
?t2

        
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: setcategory
F: pr1 C₁ ⟶ pr1 C₂

f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (H (G (F x₁))))
  (idpath (H (G (F y₁))))
  (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
       (functor_composite_data F
          (functor_composite_data G H))
       (is_functor_composite F (G ∙ H))
       (is_functor_composite (F ∙ G) H) (assoc F G H)
       (comp_twosided_disp_functor
          (comp_twosided_disp_functor FF GG) HH) xy₁) ;;2

  (idpath (H (G (F y₁))))
  (transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
     (functor_composite_data F
        (functor_composite_data G H))
     (is_functor_composite F (G ∙ H))
     (is_functor_composite (F ∙ G) H) (assoc F G H)
     (comp_twosided_disp_functor
        (comp_twosided_disp_functor FF GG) HH) xy₁) =
?y'

        apply (idtoiso_twosided_disp_concat (D := D₄)).
      
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: setcategory
F: pr1 C₁ ⟶ pr1 C₂
G: pr1 C₂ ⟶ pr1 C₃

D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
