xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ (trb₂ pr1
             (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                (idpath (H (G (F x₁))))
                (idpath (H (G (F y₁))))
                (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                     (functor_composite_data F
                        (functor_composite_data G H))
                     (is_functor_composite F (G ∙ H))
                     (is_functor_composite (F ∙ G) H)
                     (assoc F G H)
                     (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                        (comp_twosided_disp_functor FF
                           GG) HH) xy₁ @
                 transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                   (functor_composite_data F
                      (functor_composite_data G H))
                   (is_functor_composite F (G ∙ H))
                   (is_functor_composite (F ∙ G) H)
                   (assoc F G H)
                   (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                      (comp_twosided_disp_functor FF
                         GG) HH) xy₁)) ;;2 (#2 HH)
                                             ((#2 GG)
                                                ((#2 FF)
                                                 fg)) ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (H (G (F x₂))))
        (idpath (H (G (F y₂))))
        (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
             (functor_composite_data F
                (functor_composite_data G H))
             (is_functor_composite F (G ∙ H))
             (is_functor_composite (F ∙ G) H)
             (assoc F G H)
             (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                (comp_twosided_disp_functor FF GG) HH)
             xy₂)) =
(#2 HH) ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) fg)) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                     (idpath
                                        (H (G (F x₂))))
                                     (idpath
                                        (H (G (F y₂))))
                                     (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                                          (functor_composite_data
                                             F
                                             (functor_composite_data
                                                G H))
                                          (is_functor_composite
                                             F (G ∙ H))
                                          (is_functor_composite
                                             (F ∙ G) H)
                                          (assoc F G H)
                                          (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                                             (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                                                FF GG)
                                             HH) xy₂)

                         GG) HH) xy₁)) ;;2 (#2 HH)
                                             ((#2 GG)
                                                ((#2 FF)
                                                 fg)) ;;2

        (idpath (H (G (F y₂))))

trf₂ (trf₂ (pr1

                 (idpath (H (G (F x₁))))

                      (assoc F G H)
                      (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                         (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                            FF GG) HH) xy₁ @

                    (functor_composite_data F
                       (functor_composite_data G H))
                    (is_functor_composite F (G ∙ H))

                    (assoc F G H)
                    (comp_twosided_disp_functor

                                              ((#2 GG)
                                                 ((#2 FF)
                                                 fg)) ;;2 
            idtoiso_twosided_disp

                   (assoc F G H)

                      (comp_twosided_disp_functor FF
                         GG) HH) xy₂))) =
(#2 HH) ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) fg)) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                     (idpath

                                                 HH)
                                                xy₂)) =
?b
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: setcategory
F: pr1 C₁ ⟶ pr1 C₂
G: pr1 C₂ ⟶ pr1 C₃
H: pr1 C₃ ⟶ pr1 C₄
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
D₄: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₄ C₄
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
HH: twosided_disp_functor H H D₃ D₄
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
?b =
(#2 HH) ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) fg)) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                     (idpath
                                        (H (G (F x₂))))
                                     (idpath
                                        (H (G (F y₂))))
                                     (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                                          (functor_composite_data
                                             F
                                             (functor_composite_data
                                                G H))
                                          (is_functor_composite
                                             F (G ∙ H))
                                          (is_functor_composite
                                             (F ∙ G) H)
                                          (assoc F G H)
                                          (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                                             (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                                                FF GG)
                                             HH) xy₂)

      
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: setcategory
F: pr1 C₁ ⟶ pr1 C₂
G: pr1 C₂ ⟶ pr1 C₃
H: pr1 C₃ ⟶ pr1 C₄
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
D₄: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₄ C₄
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
HH: twosided_disp_functor H H D₃ D₄
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ (id_two_disp
        (HH (G (F x₁)) (G (F y₁))
           (GG (F x₁) (F y₁) (FF x₁ y₁ xy₁))) ;;2 
      (#2 HH) ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) fg)) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                           (idpath
                                              (H
                                                 (G
                                                 (F x₂))))
                                           (idpath
                                              (H
                                                 (G
                                                 (F y₂))))
                                           (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                                                (functor_composite_data
                                                 F
                                                 (functor_composite_data
                                                 G H))
                                                (is_functor_composite
                                                 F
                                                 (G
                                                 ∙ H))
                                                (is_functor_composite
                                                 (F
                                                 ∙ G)
                                                 H)
                                                (assoc
                                                 F G H)
                                                (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                                                 (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                                                 FF GG)
                                                 HH)
                                                xy₂)) =
?b

        
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: setcategory
F: pr1 C₁ ⟶ pr1 C₂
G: pr1 C₂ ⟶ pr1 C₃
H: pr1 C₃ ⟶ pr1 C₄
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
D₄: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₄ C₄
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
HH: twosided_disp_functor H H D₃ D₄
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
id_two_disp
  (HH (G (F x₁)) (G (F y₁))
     (GG (F x₁) (F y₁) (FF x₁ y₁ xy₁))) ;;2 (#2 HH)
                                              ((#2 GG)
                                                 ((#2 FF)
                                                 fg)) ;;2 
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (H (G (F x₂))))
  (idpath (H (G (F y₂))))
  (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
       (functor_composite_data F
          (functor_composite_data G H))
       (is_functor_composite F (G ∙ H))
       (is_functor_composite (F ∙ G) H) (assoc F G H)
       (comp_twosided_disp_functor
          (comp_twosided_disp_functor FF GG) HH) xy₂) =
?t2

        
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: setcategory
F: pr1 C₁ ⟶ pr1 C₂
G: pr1 C₂ ⟶ pr1 C₃
H: pr1 C₃ ⟶ pr1 C₄
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
D₄: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₄ C₄
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
HH: twosided_disp_functor H H D₃ D₄
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
id_two_disp
  (HH (G (F x₁)) (G (F y₁))
     (GG (F x₁) (F y₁) (FF x₁ y₁ xy₁))) ;;2 (#2 HH)
                                              ((#2 GG)
                                                 ((#2 FF)
                                                 fg)) =
?y'

        apply (id_two_disp_left (D := D₄)).
      
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: setcategory
F: pr1 C₁ ⟶ pr1 C₂
G: pr1 C₂ ⟶ pr1 C₃
H: pr1 C₃ ⟶ pr1 C₄
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
D₄: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₄ C₄
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
HH: twosided_disp_functor H H D₃ D₄
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ (trb₂ (#2 HH) ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) fg)) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                (idpath
                                                 (H
                                                 (G
                                                 (F x₂))))
                                                (idpath
                                                 (H
                                                 (G
                                                 (F y₂))))
                                                (! 
                                                 transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                                                 (functor_composite_data
                                                 F
                                                 (functor_composite_data
                                                 G H))
                                                 (is_functor_composite
                                                 F
                                                 (G
                                                 ∙ H))
                                                 (is_functor_composite
                                                 (F
                                                 ∙ G)
                                                 H)
                                                 (assoc
                                                 F G H)
                                                 (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                                                 (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                                                 FF GG)
                                                 HH)
                                                 xy₂)) =
(#2 HH) ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) fg)) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                     (idpath
                                        (H (G (F x₂))))
                                     (idpath
                                        (H (G (F y₂))))
                                     (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                                          (functor_composite_data
                                             F
                                             (functor_composite_data
                                                G H))
                                          (is_functor_composite
                                             F (G ∙ H))
                                          (is_functor_composite
                                             (F ∙ G) H)
                                          (assoc F G H)
                                          (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                                             (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                                                FF GG)
                                             HH) xy₂)

      
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: setcategory
F: pr1 C₁ ⟶ pr1 C₂
G: pr1 C₂ ⟶ pr1 C₃
H: pr1 C₃ ⟶ pr1 C₄
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
D₄: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₄ C₄
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
HH: twosided_disp_functor H H D₃ D₄
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ (trf₂ (#2 HH) ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) fg)) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                (idpath
                                                 (H
                                                 (G
                                                 (F x₂))))
                                                (idpath
                                                 (H
                                                 (G
                                                 (F y₂))))
                                                (! 
                                                 transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                                                 (functor_composite_data
                                                 F
                                                 (functor_composite_data
                                                 G H))
                                                 (is_functor_composite
                                                 F
                                                 (G
                                                 ∙ H))
                                                 (is_functor_composite
                                                 (F
                                                 ∙ G)
                                                 H)
                                                 (assoc
                                                 F G H)
                                                 (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                                                 (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                                                 FF GG)
                                                 HH)
                                                 xy₂)) =
(#2 HH) ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) fg)) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                     (idpath
                                        (H (G (F x₂))))
                                     (idpath
                                        (H (G (F y₂))))
                                     (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                                          (functor_composite_data
                                             F

                                                G H))
                                          (is_functor_composite
                                             F (G ∙ H))
                                          (is_functor_composite
                                             (F ∙ G) H)
                                          (assoc F G H)
                                          (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                                             (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                                                FF GG)
                                             HH) xy₂)

      
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: setcategory
F: pr1 C₁ ⟶ pr1 C₂
G: pr1 C₂ ⟶ pr1 C₃
H: pr1 C₃ ⟶ pr1 C₄
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
D₄: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₄ C₄
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
HH: twosided_disp_functor H H D₃ D₄
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ (trf₂ ((#2 HH) ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) fg)) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (H
                                                 (G
                                                 (F x₂))))
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (H
                                                 (G
                                                 (F y₂))))
                                                 (! 
                                                 transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                                                 (functor_composite_data
                                                 F
                                                 (functor_composite_data
                                                 G H))
                                                 (is_functor_composite
                                                 F
                                                 (G
                                                 ∙ H))
                                                 (is_functor_composite
                                                 (F
                                                 ∙ G)
                                                 H)
                                                 (assoc
                                                 F G H)
                                                 (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                                                 (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                                                 FF GG)
                                                 HH)
                                                 xy₂))) =
(#2 HH) ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) fg)) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                     (idpath
                                        (H (G (F x₂))))
                                     (idpath
                                        (H (G (F y₂))))
                                     (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                                          (functor_composite_data
                                             F
                                             (functor_composite_data
                                                G H))
                                          (is_functor_composite
                                             F (G ∙ H))
                                          (is_functor_composite
                                             (F ∙ G) H)
                                          (assoc F G H)
                                          (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                                             (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                                                FF GG)
                                             HH) xy₂)

      
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: setcategory
F: pr1 C₁ ⟶ pr1 C₂
G: pr1 C₂ ⟶ pr1 C₃
H: pr1 C₃ ⟶ pr1 C₄
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
D₄: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₄ C₄
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
HH: twosided_disp_functor H H D₃ D₄
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₁
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ ((#2 HH) ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) fg)) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                           (idpath
                                              (H
                                                 (G
                                                 (F x₂))))
                                           (idpath
                                              (H
                                                 (G
                                                 (F y₂))))
                                           (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                                                (functor_composite_data
                                                 F
                                                 (functor_composite_data
                                                 G H))
                                                (is_functor_composite
                                                 F
                                                 (G
                                                 ∙ H))
                                                (is_functor_composite
                                                 (F
                                                 ∙ G)
                                                 H)
                                                (assoc
                                                 F G H)
                                                (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                                                 (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                                                 FF GG)
                                                 HH)
                                                xy₂)) =
(#2 HH) ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) fg)) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                     (idpath
                                        (H (G (F x₂))))
                                     (idpath
                                        (H (G (F y₂))))
                                     (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                                          (functor_composite_data
                                             F
                                             (functor_composite_data
                                                G H))
                                          (is_functor_composite
                                             F (G ∙ H))
                                          (is_functor_composite
                                             (F ∙ G) H)
                                          (assoc F G H)
                                          (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                                             (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                                                FF GG)
                                             HH) xy₂)

      apply transportf_disp_mor2_idpath.
  
∏ (x y : cat_of_setcategory)
(f : cat_of_setcategory ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(xx : disp_cat_data_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat x)
(yy : disp_cat_data_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat y),
isaset (xx -->[ f] yy)
 
x, y: cat_of_setcategory
f: cat_of_setcategory ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: disp_cat_data_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat x
yy: disp_cat_data_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat y
isaset (xx -->[ f] yy)

    apply isaset_twosided_disp_functor.
Qed.

(** * 4. The displayed category of strict 2-sided displayed categories *)

disp_cat cat_of_setcategory


disp_cat cat_of_setcategory

  
disp_cat_data cat_of_setcategory
disp_cat_axioms cat_of_setcategory ?pr1

  
disp_cat_data cat_of_setcategory
 exact disp_cat_data_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat.
  
disp_cat_axioms cat_of_setcategory
  disp_cat_data_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat
 exact disp_cat_axioms_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat.
Defined.

Definition cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat
  : category
  := total_category disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat.

(** * 5. The proof that it is univalent *)

C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₁'
G: C₂ ⟶ C₂'
D: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₂
D': twosided_disp_cat C₁' C₂'
FG, FG': twosided_disp_functor F G D D'
p: FG = FG'
x: C₁
y: C₂
xy: D x y
FG x y xy = FG' x y xy


C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₁'
G: C₂ ⟶ C₂'
D: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₂
D': twosided_disp_cat C₁' C₂'
FG, FG': twosided_disp_functor F G D D'
p: FG = FG'
x: C₁
y: C₂
xy: D x y
FG x y xy = FG' x y xy

  
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₁'
G: C₂ ⟶ C₂'
D: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₂
D': twosided_disp_cat C₁' C₂'
FG: twosided_disp_functor F G D D'
x: C₁
y: C₂
xy: D x y
FG x y xy = FG x y xy

  apply idpath.
Defined.


C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₁'
G: C₂ ⟶ C₂'
D: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₂
D': twosided_disp_cat C₁' C₂'
FG, FG': twosided_disp_functor F G D D'
p: FG = FG'
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₂
g: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D x₁ y₁
xy₂: D x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
(#2 FG) fg =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
        (idpath (G y₁))
        (path_twosided_disp_functor_ob p xy₁) ;;2 
      (#2 FG') fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                        (idpath (F x₂))
                        (idpath (G y₂))
                        (! path_twosided_disp_functor_ob
                             p xy₂))


C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₁'
G: C₂ ⟶ C₂'
D: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₂
D': twosided_disp_cat C₁' C₂'
FG, FG': twosided_disp_functor F G D D'
p: FG = FG'
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₂
g: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D x₁ y₁
xy₂: D x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
(#2 FG) fg =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
        (idpath (G y₁))
        (path_twosided_disp_functor_ob p xy₁) ;;2 
      (#2 FG') fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                        (idpath (F x₂))
                        (idpath (G y₂))
                        (! path_twosided_disp_functor_ob
                             p xy₂))

  
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₁'
G: C₂ ⟶ C₂'
D: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₂
D': twosided_disp_cat C₁' C₂'
FG: twosided_disp_functor F G D D'
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₂
g: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D x₁ y₁
xy₂: D x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
(#2 FG) fg =
trf₂ (id_two_disp (FG x₁ y₁ xy₁) ;;2 (#2 FG) fg ;;2 
      id_two_disp (FG x₂ y₂ xy₂))

  
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₁'
G: C₂ ⟶ C₂'
D: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₂
D': twosided_disp_cat C₁' C₂'
FG: twosided_disp_functor F G D D'
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₂
g: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D x₁ y₁
xy₂: D x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
(#2 FG) fg =
trf₂ (trb₂ (id_two_disp (FG x₁ y₁ xy₁) ;;2 (#2 FG) fg))

  
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₁'
G: C₂ ⟶ C₂'
D: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₂
D': twosided_disp_cat C₁' C₂'
FG: twosided_disp_functor F G D D'
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₂
g: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D x₁ y₁
xy₂: D x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
(#2 FG) fg = trf₂ (trb₂ (trb₂ (#2 FG) fg))

  
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₁'
G: C₂ ⟶ C₂'
D: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₂
D': twosided_disp_cat C₁' C₂'
FG: twosided_disp_functor F G D D'
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₂
g: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D x₁ y₁
xy₂: D x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
(#2 FG) fg = trf₂ (trf₂ (trf₂ (#2 FG) fg))

  
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₁'
G: C₂ ⟶ C₂'
D: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₂
D': twosided_disp_cat C₁' C₂'
FG: twosided_disp_functor F G D D'
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₂
g: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D x₁ y₁
xy₂: D x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
(#2 FG) fg = trf₂ (#2 FG) fg

  
C₁, C₂, C₁', C₂': category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₁'
G: C₂ ⟶ C₂'
D: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₂
D': twosided_disp_cat C₁' C₂'
FG: twosided_disp_functor F G D D'
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₂
g: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D x₁ y₁
xy₂: D x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ (#2 FG) fg = (#2 FG) fg

  apply transportf_disp_mor2_idpath.
Qed.

Section StrictTwosidedDispCatIso.
  Context {C : setcategory}
          {D₁ D₂ : strict_twosided_disp_cat C C}
          (F : disp_functor
                 (functor_identity _)
                 (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
                 (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)).

  (** ** 5.1. Characterization of the isomorphisms *)
  Section FromIso.
    Context (HF : is_z_iso_disp
                    (D := disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat)
                    (@identity_z_iso cat_of_setcategory C)
                    (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
                       (disp_functor_over_pair F))).

    Let G : twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity _) (functor_identity _) D₂ D₁
      := inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF.

    
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso C)
  (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
     (disp_functor_over_pair F))
G:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x, y: C
xy: D₁ x y
G x y (F (x,, y) xy) = xy

    
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso C)
  (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
     (disp_functor_over_pair F))
G:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x, y: C
xy: D₁ x y
G x y (F (x,, y) xy) = xy

      
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso C)
  (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
     (disp_functor_over_pair F))
G:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x, y: C
xy: D₁ x y
p:= path_twosided_disp_functor_ob
  (inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp HF) xy: (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
   (disp_functor_over_pair F) ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                   HF)%mor_disp x
  y xy =
transportb (mor_disp D₁ D₁)
  (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (identity_z_iso C))
  (id_disp D₁) x y xy
G x y (F (x,, y) xy) = xy

      
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso C)
  (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
     (disp_functor_over_pair F))
G:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x, y: C
xy: D₁ x y
p:= path_twosided_disp_functor_ob
  (inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp HF) xy: inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF x y (F (x,, y) xy) =
transportb (mor_disp D₁ D₁)
  (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 C)))
  (twosided_disp_functor_identity D₁) x y xy
G x y (F (x,, y) xy) = xy

      
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso C)
  (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
     (disp_functor_over_pair F))
G:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x, y: C
xy: D₁ x y
p:= path_twosided_disp_functor_ob
  (inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp HF) xy: inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF x y (F (x,, y) xy) =
transportb (mor_disp D₁ D₁)
  (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 C)))
  (twosided_disp_functor_identity D₁) x y xy
transportb (mor_disp D₁ D₁)
  (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 C)))
  (twosided_disp_functor_identity D₁) x y xy = xy

      apply (transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
               (functor_identity _)).
    Qed.

    
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso C)
  (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
     (disp_functor_over_pair F))
G:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x, y: C
xy: D₂ x y
F (x,, y) (G x y xy) = xy

    
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso C)
  (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
     (disp_functor_over_pair F))
G:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x, y: C
xy: D₂ x y
F (x,, y) (G x y xy) = xy

      
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso C)
  (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
     (disp_functor_over_pair F))
G:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x, y: C
xy: D₂ x y
p:= path_twosided_disp_functor_ob
  (z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF) xy: (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF ;; disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
                                 (disp_functor_over_pair
                                    F))%mor_disp x
  y xy =
transportb (mor_disp D₂ D₂)
  (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv (identity_z_iso C))
  (id_disp D₂) x y xy
F (x,, y) (G x y xy) = xy

      
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso C)
  (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
     (disp_functor_over_pair F))
G:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x, y: C
xy: D₂ x y
p:= path_twosided_disp_functor_ob
  (z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF) xy: F (x,, y) (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF x y xy) =
transportb (mor_disp D₂ D₂)
  (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 C)))
  (twosided_disp_functor_identity D₂) x y xy
F (x,, y) (G x y xy) = xy

      
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso C)
  (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
     (disp_functor_over_pair F))
G:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x, y: C
xy: D₂ x y
p:= path_twosided_disp_functor_ob
  (z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF) xy: F (x,, y) (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF x y xy) =
transportb (mor_disp D₂ D₂)
  (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 C)))
  (twosided_disp_functor_identity D₂) x y xy
transportb (mor_disp D₂ D₂)
  (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 C)))
  (twosided_disp_functor_identity D₂) x y xy = xy

      apply (transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
               (functor_identity _)).
    Qed.

    (**
     Note the following: in the upcoming lemmas, we frequently
     pose an extra argument (see `fg'` below). The reason to
     do that, is to help the type checker of Coq type check
     the expression. The only thing that happens in the argument
     `fg'`, is that we provide extra type information.
     *)
    
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso C)
  (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
     (disp_functor_over_pair F))
G:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
xx:= x₁,, y₁: category_binproduct C C
yy:= x₂,, y₂: category_binproduct C C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
fg':= fg: xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂
(#2 G) ((♯ F)%mor_disp fg') =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp
        (idpath (functor_identity C x₁))
        (idpath (functor_identity C y₁))
        (two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob xy₁) ;;2 fg ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp
        (idpath (functor_identity C x₂))
        (idpath (functor_identity C y₂))
        (! two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob xy₂))

    
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso C)
  (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
     (disp_functor_over_pair F))
G:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
xx:= x₁,, y₁: category_binproduct C C
yy:= x₂,, y₂: category_binproduct C C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
fg':= fg: xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂
(#2 G) ((♯ F)%mor_disp fg') =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp
        (idpath (functor_identity C x₁))
        (idpath (functor_identity C y₁))
        (two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob xy₁) ;;2 fg ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp
        (idpath (functor_identity C x₂))
        (idpath (functor_identity C y₂))
        (! two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob xy₂))

      
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso C)
  (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
     (disp_functor_over_pair F))
G:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
xx:= x₁,, y₁: category_binproduct C C
yy:= x₂,, y₂: category_binproduct C C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
fg':= fg: xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂
(#2 G) ((♯ F)%mor_disp fg') = ?b
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso C)
  (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
     (disp_functor_over_pair F))
G:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
xx:= x₁,, y₁: category_binproduct C C
yy:= x₂,, y₂: category_binproduct C C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
fg':= fg: xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂
?b =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp
        (idpath (functor_identity C x₁))
        (idpath (functor_identity C y₁))
        (two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob xy₁) ;;2 fg ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp
        (idpath (functor_identity C x₂))
        (idpath (functor_identity C y₂))
        (! two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob xy₂))

      
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso C)
  (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
     (disp_functor_over_pair F))
G:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
xx:= x₁,, y₁: category_binproduct C C
yy:= x₂,, y₂: category_binproduct C C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
fg':= fg: xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂
(#2 G) ((♯ F)%mor_disp fg') = ?b

        apply (path_twosided_disp_functor_mor (inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp HF)).
      
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso C)
  (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
     (disp_functor_over_pair F))
G:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
xx:= x₁,, y₁: category_binproduct C C
yy:= x₂,, y₂: category_binproduct C C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
fg':= fg: xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp
        (idpath
           ((identity_z_iso C
             · inv_from_z_iso (identity_z_iso C))
              (pr1
                 (functor_identity
                    (category_binproduct C C) xx))))
        (idpath
           ((identity_z_iso C
             · inv_from_z_iso (identity_z_iso C))
              (pr2
                 (functor_identity
                    (category_binproduct C C) xx))))
        (path_twosided_disp_functor_ob
           (inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp HF) xy₁) ;;2 
      (#2 (transportb (mor_disp D₁ D₁)
             (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (identity_z_iso C))
             (id_disp D₁))) fg' ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                      (idpath
                                         ((identity_z_iso
                                             C
                                           · inv_from_z_iso
                                               (identity_z_iso
                                                 C))
                                            (pr1
                                               (functor_identity
                                                 (category_binproduct
                                                 C C)
                                                 yy))))
                                      (idpath
                                         ((identity_z_iso
                                             C
                                           · inv_from_z_iso
                                               (identity_z_iso
                                                 C))
                                            (pr2
                                               (functor_identity
                                                 (category_binproduct
                                                 C C)
                                                 yy))))
                                      (! path_twosided_disp_functor_ob
                                           (inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp
                                              HF) xy₂)) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp
        (idpath (functor_identity C x₁))
        (idpath (functor_identity C y₁))
        (two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob xy₁) ;;2 fg ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp
        (idpath (functor_identity C x₂))
        (idpath (functor_identity C y₂))
        (! two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob xy₂))

      
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso C)
  (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
     (disp_functor_over_pair F))
G:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
xx:= x₁,, y₁: category_binproduct C C
yy:= x₂,, y₂: category_binproduct C C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
fg':= fg: xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁) (idpath y₁)
        (path_twosided_disp_functor_ob
           (inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp HF) xy₁) ;;2 
      (#2 (transportb (mor_disp D₁ D₁)
             (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 C)))
             (twosided_disp_functor_identity D₁))) fg' ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₂) (idpath y₂)
        (! path_twosided_disp_functor_ob
             (inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp HF) xy₂)) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁) (idpath y₁)
        (two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob xy₁) ;;2 fg ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₂) (idpath y₂)
        (! two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob xy₂))

  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁

xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂

        (path_twosided_disp_functor_ob
           (inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp HF) xy₁) ;;2

        (! path_twosided_disp_functor_ob
             (inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp HF) xy₂)) = 
?b

yy:= x₂,, y₂: category_binproduct C C

x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
xx:= x₁,, y₁: category_binproduct C C
yy:= x₂,, y₂: category_binproduct C C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
fg':= fg: xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁) (idpath y₁)
        (path_twosided_disp_functor_ob
           (inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp HF) xy₁) ;;2 
      (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp
               (idpath
                  (make_functor
                     (make_functor
                        (functor_composite_data
                           (identity C)
                           (functor_identity C))
                        (is_functor_composite
                           (identity C)
                           (functor_identity C)))
                     (is_functor_composite
                        (identity C)
                        (functor_identity C)) x₁))
               (idpath
                  (make_functor
                     (make_functor
                        (functor_composite_data
                           (identity C)
                           (functor_identity C))
                        (is_functor_composite
                           (identity C)
                           (functor_identity C)))
                     (is_functor_composite
                        (identity C)
                        (functor_identity C)) y₁))
               (transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                  (make_functor
                     (functor_composite_data
                        (identity C)
                        (functor_identity C))
                     (is_functor_composite
                        (identity C)
                        (functor_identity C)))
                  (is_functor_composite (identity C)
                     (functor_identity C))
                  (is_functor_identity C)
                  (id_left (functor_identity C))
                  (twosided_disp_functor_identity D₁)
                  xy₁) ;;2 (#2 (twosided_disp_functor_identity
                                  D₁)) fg' ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (make_functor
                                                 (make_functor
                                                 (functor_composite_data
                                                 (identity
                                                 C)
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 C))
                                                 (is_functor_composite
                                                 (identity
                                                 C)
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 C)))
                                                 (is_functor_composite
                                                 (identity
                                                 C)
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 C))
                                                 x₂))
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (make_functor
                                                 (make_functor
                                                 (functor_composite_data
                                                 (identity
                                                 C)
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 C))
                                                 (is_functor_composite
                                                 (identity
                                                 C)
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 C)))
                                                 (is_functor_composite
                                                 (identity
                                                 C)
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 C))
                                                 y₂))
                                                 (! 
                                                 transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                                                 (make_functor
                                                 (functor_composite_data
                                                 (identity
                                                 C)
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 C))
                                                 (is_functor_composite
                                                 (identity
                                                 C)
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 C)))
                                                 (is_functor_composite
                                                 (identity
                                                 C)
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 C))
                                                 (is_functor_identity
                                                 C)
                                                 (id_left
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 C))
                                                 (twosided_disp_functor_identity
                                                 D₁)
                                                 xy₂))) ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₂) (idpath y₂)
        (! path_twosided_disp_functor_ob
             (inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp HF) xy₂)) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁) (idpath y₁)
        (two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob xy₁) ;;2 fg ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₂) (idpath y₂)
        (! two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob xy₂))

     (disp_functor_over_pair F))

  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
xx:= x₁,, y₁: category_binproduct C C
yy:= x₂,, y₂: category_binproduct C C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
fg':= fg: xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁) (idpath y₁)
        (path_twosided_disp_functor_ob
           (inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp HF) xy₁) ;;2 
      (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁)
               (idpath y₁)
               (transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                  (functor_composite_data
                     (functor_identity_data (pr1 C))
                     (functor_identity_data (pr1 C)))
                  (is_functor_composite
                     (functor_identity (pr1 C))
                     (functor_identity (pr1 C)))
                  (is_functor_identity (pr1 C))
                  (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 C)))
                  (twosided_disp_functor_identity D₁)
                  xy₁) ;;2 fg' ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                     (idpath x₂)
                                     (idpath y₂)
                                     (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                                          (functor_composite_data
                                             (functor_identity_data
                                                (pr1 C))
                                             (functor_identity_data
                                                (pr1 C)))
                                          (is_functor_composite
                                             (functor_identity
                                                (pr1 C))
                                             (functor_identity
                                                (pr1 C)))
                                          (is_functor_identity
                                             (pr1 C))
                                          (id_left
                                             (functor_identity
                                                (pr1 C)))
                                          (twosided_disp_functor_identity
                                             D₁) xy₂))) ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₂) (idpath y₂)
        (! path_twosided_disp_functor_ob
             (inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp HF) xy₂)) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁) (idpath y₁)
        (two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob xy₁) ;;2 fg ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₂) (idpath y₂)
        (! two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob xy₂))

  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
xx:= x₁,, y₁: category_binproduct C C
yy:= x₂,, y₂: category_binproduct C C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
fg':= fg: xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂
trf₂ (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁)
              (idpath y₁)
              (path_twosided_disp_functor_ob
                 (inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp HF) xy₁) ;;2 
            (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁)
               (idpath y₁)
               (transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                  (functor_composite_data
                     (functor_identity_data (pr1 C))
                     (functor_identity_data (pr1 C)))
                  (is_functor_composite
                     (functor_identity (pr1 C))
                     (functor_identity (pr1 C)))
                  (is_functor_identity (pr1 C))
                  (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 C)))
                  (twosided_disp_functor_identity D₁)
                  xy₁) ;;2 fg' ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                     (idpath x₂)
                                     (idpath y₂)
                                     (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                                          (functor_composite_data
                                             (functor_identity_data
                                                (pr1 C))
                                             (functor_identity_data
                                                (pr1 C)))
                                          (is_functor_composite
                                             (functor_identity
                                                (pr1 C))
                                             (functor_identity
                                                (pr1 C)))
                                          (is_functor_identity
                                             (pr1 C))
                                          (id_left
                                             (functor_identity
                                                (pr1 C)))
                                          (twosided_disp_functor_identity
                                             D₁) xy₂))) ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₂) (idpath y₂)
        (! path_twosided_disp_functor_ob
             (inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp HF) xy₂)) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁) (idpath y₁)
        (two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob xy₁) ;;2 fg ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₂) (idpath y₂)

  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso C)
  (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
     (disp_functor_over_pair F))
G:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
xx:= x₁,, y₁: category_binproduct C C
yy:= x₂,, y₂: category_binproduct C C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
fg':= fg: xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁) (idpath y₁)
        (path_twosided_disp_functor_ob
           (inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp HF) xy₁) ;;2 
      (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁) (idpath y₁)
         (transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
            (functor_composite_data
               (functor_identity_data (pr1 C))
               (functor_identity_data (pr1 C)))
            (is_functor_composite
               (functor_identity (pr1 C))
               (functor_identity (pr1 C)))
            (is_functor_identity (pr1 C))
            (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 C)))
            (twosided_disp_functor_identity D₁) xy₁) ;;2 fg' ;;2 
       idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₂) (idpath y₂)
         (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
              (functor_composite_data
                 (functor_identity_data (pr1 C))
                 (functor_identity_data (pr1 C)))
              (is_functor_composite
                 (functor_identity (pr1 C))
                 (functor_identity (pr1 C)))
              (is_functor_identity (pr1 C))
              (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 C)))
              (twosided_disp_functor_identity D₁) xy₂)) ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₂) (idpath y₂)
        (! path_twosided_disp_functor_ob
             (inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp HF) xy₂)) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁) (idpath y₁)
        (two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob xy₁) ;;2 fg ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₂) (idpath y₂)
        (! two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob xy₂))

      
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso C)
  (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
     (disp_functor_over_pair F))
G:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
xx:= x₁,, y₁: category_binproduct C C
yy:= x₂,, y₂: category_binproduct C C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
fg':= fg: xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂
trf₂ (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁)
              (idpath y₁)
              (path_twosided_disp_functor_ob
                 (inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp HF) xy₁) ;;2 
            (trf₂ (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                           (idpath x₁) (idpath y₁)
                           (transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                              (functor_composite_data
                                 (functor_identity_data
                                    (pr1 C))
                                 (functor_identity_data
                                    (pr1 C)))
                              (is_functor_composite
                                 (functor_identity
                                    (pr1 C))
                                 (functor_identity
                                    (pr1 C)))
                              (is_functor_identity
                                 (pr1 C))
                              (id_left
                                 (functor_identity
                                    (pr1 C)))
                              (twosided_disp_functor_identity
                                 D₁) xy₁) ;;2 (fg' ;;2 
                                               (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 x₂)
                                                 (idpath
                                                 y₂)
                                                 (! 
                                                 transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                                                 (functor_composite_data
                                                 (functor_identity_data
                                                 (pr1
                                                 C))
                                                 (functor_identity_data
                                                 (pr1
                                                 C)))
                                                 (is_functor_composite
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 (pr1
                                                 C))
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 (pr1
                                                 C)))
                                                 (is_functor_identity
                                                 (pr1
                                                 C))
                                                 (id_left
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 (pr1
                                                 C)))
                                                 (twosided_disp_functor_identity
                                                 D₁)
                                                 xy₂) ;;2 
                                                idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 x₂)
                                                 (idpath
                                                 y₂)
                                                 (! 
                                                 path_twosided_disp_functor_ob
                                                 (inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp
                                                 HF)
                                                 xy₂)))))))) =
trf₂ (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁)
              (idpath y₁)
              (two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob xy₁) ;;2 
            (fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₂)
                      (idpath y₂)
                      (! two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob
                           xy₂))))

x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C

yy:= x₂,, y₂: category_binproduct C C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧

xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
fg':= fg: xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂

        (path_twosided_disp_functor_ob
           (inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp HF) xy₁) ;;2

         (transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
            (functor_composite_data
               (functor_identity_data (pr1 C))
               (functor_identity_data (pr1 C)))

               (functor_identity (pr1 C))
               (functor_identity (pr1 C)))
            (is_functor_identity (pr1 C))
            (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 C)))
            (twosided_disp_functor_identity D₁) xy₁) ;;2 
       (fg' ;;2 (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₂)
                   (idpath y₂)
                   (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                        (functor_composite_data

                           (functor_identity_data

                           (functor_identity (pr1 C)))
                        (is_functor_identity (pr1 C))
                        (id_left
                           (functor_identity (pr1 C)))
                        (twosided_disp_functor_identity
                           D₁) xy₂) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                          (idpath x₂)
                                          (idpath y₂)
                                          (! path_twosided_disp_functor_ob
                                               (inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp
                                                 HF)
                                               xy₂))))) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁) (idpath y₁)
        (two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob xy₁) ;;2 (fg ;;2 
                                                 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 x₂)
                                                 (idpath
                                                 y₂)
                                                 (! 
                                                 two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob
                                                 xy₂)))

                                               (inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp
                                                 HF)

?b

yy:= x₂,, y₂: category_binproduct C C

                                                 idtoiso_twosided_disp

yy:= x₂,, y₂: category_binproduct C C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧

            (is_functor_composite

               (functor_identity (pr1 C)))
            (is_functor_identity (pr1 C))
            (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 C)))
            (twosided_disp_functor_identity D₁) xy₁) ;;2 
       (fg' ;;2 (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₂)
                   (idpath y₂)

                        (functor_composite_data

                           (functor_identity_data

                        (is_functor_composite

                           (functor_identity (pr1 C)))
                        (is_functor_identity (pr1 C))
                        (id_left
                           (functor_identity (pr1 C)))
                        (twosided_disp_functor_identity
                           D₁) xy₂) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                          (idpath x₂)
                                          (idpath y₂)
                                          (! path_twosided_disp_functor_ob

                                                 HF)

?b

  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso C)
  (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
     (disp_functor_over_pair F))
G:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
xx:= x₁,, y₁: category_binproduct C C
yy:= x₂,, y₂: category_binproduct C C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
fg':= fg: xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₂) (idpath y₂)
  (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
       (functor_composite_data
          (functor_identity_data (pr1 C))
          (functor_identity_data (pr1 C)))
       (is_functor_composite
          (functor_identity (pr1 C))
          (functor_identity (pr1 C)))
       (is_functor_identity (pr1 C))
       (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 C)))
       (twosided_disp_functor_identity D₁) xy₂) ;;2 
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₂) (idpath y₂)
  (! path_twosided_disp_functor_ob
       (inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp HF) xy₂) = ?t2

        apply (idtoiso_twosided_disp_concat (D := D₁)).

               (functor_identity (pr1 C)))

            (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 C)))
            (twosided_disp_functor_identity D₁) xy₁) ;;2 
       (fg' ;;2 (trb₂ pr1
                        (idtoiso_twosided_disp

                           (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob

                                   (functor_identity
                                      (pr1 C)))
                                (twosided_disp_functor_identity
                                   D₁) xy₂ @
                            ! path_twosided_disp_functor_ob
                                (inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp
                                   HF) xy₂)))))) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁) (idpath y₁)
        (two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob xy₁) ;;2 (fg ;;2 
                                                 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 x₂)
                                                 (idpath
                                                 y₂)
                                                 (! 
                                                 two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob
                                                 xy₂)))

        (path_twosided_disp_functor_ob
           (inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp HF) xy₁) ;;2

            (functor_composite_data
               (functor_identity_data (pr1 C))

               (functor_identity (pr1 C))
               (functor_identity (pr1 C)))
            (is_functor_identity (pr1 C))

            (twosided_disp_functor_identity D₁) xy₁) ;;2 
       (fg' ;;2 (trf₂ pr1

                                   (pr1 C))
                                (id_left

                                      (pr1 C)))
                                (twosided_disp_functor_identity
                                   D₁) xy₂ @

x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C

yy:= x₂,, y₂: category_binproduct C C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧

xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂

fg':= fg: xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂

              (idpath y₁)
              (path_twosided_disp_functor_ob
                 (inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp HF) xy₁) ;;2 
            (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁)

               (transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                  (functor_composite_data

                     (functor_identity_data (pr1 C)))

                     (functor_identity (pr1 C))
                     (functor_identity (pr1 C)))
                  (is_functor_identity (pr1 C))
                  (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 C)))
                  (twosided_disp_functor_identity D₁)
                  xy₁) ;;2 (fg' ;;2 pr1
                                      (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                         (idpath x₂)
                                         (idpath y₂)
                                         (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                                              (functor_composite_data
                                                 (functor_identity_data
                                                 (pr1
                                                 C))
                                                 (functor_identity_data
                                                 (pr1
                                                 C)))
                                              (is_functor_composite
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 (pr1
                                                 C))
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 (pr1
                                                 C)))
                                              (is_functor_identity
                                                 (pr1
                                                 C))
                                              (id_left
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 (pr1
                                                 C)))
                                              (twosided_disp_functor_identity
                                                 D₁)
                                              xy₂ @
                                          ! path_twosided_disp_functor_ob
                                              (inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp
                                                 HF)
                                              xy₂)))))) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁) (idpath y₁)
        (two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob xy₁) ;;2 (fg ;;2 
                                                 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 x₂)
                                                 (idpath
                                                 y₂)
                                                 (!

                                                 xy₂)))

F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))

  (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
     (disp_functor_over_pair F))
G:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
xx:= x₁,, y₁: category_binproduct C C
yy:= x₂,, y₂: category_binproduct C C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
fg':= fg: xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂
trf₂ (trb₂ (trb₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁)
                    (idpath y₁)
                    (path_twosided_disp_functor_ob
                       (inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp HF)
                       xy₁) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                  (idpath x₁)
                                  (idpath y₁)
                                  (transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                                     (functor_composite_data
                                        (functor_identity_data
                                           (pr1 C))
                                        (functor_identity_data
                                           (pr1 C)))
                                     (is_functor_composite
                                        (functor_identity
                                           (pr1 C))
                                        (functor_identity
                                           (pr1 C)))
                                     (is_functor_identity
                                        (pr1 C))
                                     (id_left
                                        (functor_identity
                                           (pr1 C)))
                                     (twosided_disp_functor_identity
                                        D₁) xy₁) ;;2 fg' ;;2 
                  pr1
                    (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₂)
                       (idpath y₂)
                       (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                            (functor_composite_data
                               (functor_identity_data
                                  (pr1 C))
                               (functor_identity_data
                                  (pr1 C)))
                            (is_functor_composite
                               (functor_identity
                                  (pr1 C))
                               (functor_identity
                                  (pr1 C)))
                            (is_functor_identity
                               (pr1 C))
                            (id_left
                               (functor_identity
                                  (pr1 C)))
                            (twosided_disp_functor_identity
                               D₁) xy₂ @
                        ! path_twosided_disp_functor_ob
                            (inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp
                               HF) xy₂))))) =
trf₂ (trb₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁)
              (idpath y₁)
              (two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob xy₁) ;;2 fg ;;2 
            idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₂)
              (idpath y₂)
              (! two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob xy₂)))

     (disp_functor_over_pair F))

  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
xx:= x₁,, y₁: category_binproduct C C
yy:= x₂,, y₂: category_binproduct C C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
fg':= fg: xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁) (idpath y₁)
        (path_twosided_disp_functor_ob
           (inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp HF) xy₁) ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁) (idpath y₁)
        (transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
           (functor_composite_data
              (functor_identity_data (pr1 C))
              (functor_identity_data (pr1 C)))
           (is_functor_composite
              (functor_identity (pr1 C))
              (functor_identity (pr1 C)))
           (is_functor_identity (pr1 C))
           (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 C)))
           (twosided_disp_functor_identity D₁) xy₁) ;;2 fg' ;;2 
      pr1
        (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₂) (idpath y₂)
           (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                (functor_composite_data
                   (functor_identity_data (pr1 C))
                   (functor_identity_data (pr1 C)))
                (is_functor_composite
                   (functor_identity (pr1 C))
                   (functor_identity (pr1 C)))
                (is_functor_identity (pr1 C))
                (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 C)))
                (twosided_disp_functor_identity D₁)
                xy₂ @
            ! path_twosided_disp_functor_ob
                (inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp HF) xy₂))) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁) (idpath y₁)
        (two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob xy₁) ;;2 fg ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₂) (idpath y₂)
        (! two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob xy₂))
