     (disp_functor_over_pair F))
G:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
xx:= x₁,, y₁: category_binproduct C C
yy:= x₂,, y₂: category_binproduct C C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
fg':= fg: xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁) (idpath y₁)
        (path_twosided_disp_functor_ob
           (inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp HF) xy₁) ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁) (idpath y₁)
        (transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
           (functor_composite_data
              (functor_identity_data (pr1 C))
              (functor_identity_data (pr1 C)))
           (is_functor_composite
              (functor_identity (pr1 C))
              (functor_identity (pr1 C)))
           (is_functor_identity (pr1 C))
           (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 C)))
           (twosided_disp_functor_identity D₁) xy₁) ;;2 fg' ;;2 
      pr1
        (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₂) (idpath y₂)
           (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                (functor_composite_data
                   (functor_identity_data (pr1 C))
                   (functor_identity_data (pr1 C)))
                (is_functor_composite
                   (functor_identity (pr1 C))
                   (functor_identity (pr1 C)))
                (is_functor_identity (pr1 C))
                (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 C)))
                (twosided_disp_functor_identity D₁)
                xy₂ @
            ! path_twosided_disp_functor_ob
                (inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp HF) xy₂))) =
?b
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso C)
  (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
     (disp_functor_over_pair F))
G:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
xx:= x₁,, y₁: category_binproduct C C
yy:= x₂,, y₂: category_binproduct C C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
fg':= fg: xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂
?b =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁) (idpath y₁)
        (two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob xy₁) ;;2 fg ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₂) (idpath y₂)
        (! two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob xy₂))

      
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso C)
  (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
     (disp_functor_over_pair F))
G:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
xx:= x₁,, y₁: category_binproduct C C
yy:= x₂,, y₂: category_binproduct C C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
fg':= fg: xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁) (idpath y₁)
        (path_twosided_disp_functor_ob
           (inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp HF) xy₁) ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁) (idpath y₁)
        (transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
           (functor_composite_data
              (functor_identity_data (pr1 C))
              (functor_identity_data (pr1 C)))
           (is_functor_composite
              (functor_identity (pr1 C))
              (functor_identity (pr1 C)))
           (is_functor_identity (pr1 C))
           (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 C)))
           (twosided_disp_functor_identity D₁) xy₁) ;;2 fg' ;;2 
      pr1
        (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₂) (idpath y₂)
           (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                (functor_composite_data
                   (functor_identity_data (pr1 C))
                   (functor_identity_data (pr1 C)))
                (is_functor_composite
                   (functor_identity (pr1 C))
                   (functor_identity (pr1 C)))
                (is_functor_identity (pr1 C))
                (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 C)))
                (twosided_disp_functor_identity D₁)
                xy₂ @
            ! path_twosided_disp_functor_ob
                (inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp HF) xy₂))) =
?b

  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)

  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
xx:= x₁,, y₁: category_binproduct C C
yy:= x₂,, y₂: category_binproduct C C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
fg':= fg: xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁) (idpath y₁)
  (path_twosided_disp_functor_ob
     (inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp HF) xy₁) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                              (idpath
                                                 x₁)
                                              (idpath
                                                 y₁)
                                              (transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                                                 (functor_composite_data
                                                 (functor_identity_data
                                                 (pr1
                                                 C))
                                                 (functor_identity_data
                                                 (pr1
                                                 C)))
                                                 (is_functor_composite
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 (pr1
                                                 C))
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 (pr1
                                                 C)))
                                                 (is_functor_identity
                                                 (pr1
                                                 C))
                                                 (id_left
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 (pr1
                                                 C)))
                                                 (twosided_disp_functor_identity
                                                 D₁)
                                                 xy₁) ;;2 fg' ;;2 
pr1
  (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₂) (idpath y₂)
     (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
          (functor_composite_data
             (functor_identity_data (pr1 C))
             (functor_identity_data (pr1 C)))
          (is_functor_composite
             (functor_identity (pr1 C))
             (functor_identity (pr1 C)))
          (is_functor_identity (pr1 C))
          (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 C)))
          (twosided_disp_functor_identity D₁) xy₂ @
      ! path_twosided_disp_functor_ob
          (inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp HF) xy₂)) = ?t2

yy:= x₂,, y₂: category_binproduct C C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧

        apply (idtoiso_twosided_disp_concat (D := D₁)).
      
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso C)
  (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
     (disp_functor_over_pair F))
G:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
xx:= x₁,, y₁: category_binproduct C C
yy:= x₂,, y₂: category_binproduct C C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
fg':= fg: xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂
trf₂ (trb₂ pr1
             (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁)
                (idpath y₁)
                (path_twosided_disp_functor_ob
                   (inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp HF) xy₁ @
                 transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                   (functor_composite_data
                      (functor_identity_data (pr1 C))
                      (functor_identity_data (pr1 C)))
                   (is_functor_composite
                      (functor_identity (pr1 C))
                      (functor_identity (pr1 C)))
                   (is_functor_identity (pr1 C))
                   (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 C)))
                   (twosided_disp_functor_identity D₁)
                   xy₁)) ;;2 fg' ;;2 pr1
                                       (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                          (idpath x₂)
                                          (idpath y₂)
                                          (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                                               (functor_composite_data
                                                 (functor_identity_data
                                                 (pr1
                                                 C))
                                                 (functor_identity_data
                                                 (pr1
                                                 C)))
                                               (is_functor_composite
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 (pr1
                                                 C))
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 (pr1
                                                 C)))
                                               (is_functor_identity
                                                 (pr1
                                                 C))
                                               (id_left
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 (pr1
                                                 C)))
                                               (twosided_disp_functor_identity
                                                 D₁)
                                               xy₂ @
                                           ! path_twosided_disp_functor_ob
                                               (inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp
                                                 HF)
                                               xy₂))) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁) (idpath y₁)
        (two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob xy₁) ;;2 fg ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₂) (idpath y₂)
        (! two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob xy₂))

D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C

x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
xx:= x₁,, y₁: category_binproduct C C
yy:= x₂,, y₂: category_binproduct C C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧

xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
fg':= fg: xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂
trf₂ (trf₂ pr1
             (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁)
                (idpath y₁)
                (path_twosided_disp_functor_ob
                   (inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp HF) xy₁ @
                 transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                   (functor_composite_data
                      (functor_identity_data (pr1 C))
                      (functor_identity_data (pr1 C)))
                   (is_functor_composite
                      (functor_identity (pr1 C))
                      (functor_identity (pr1 C)))
                   (is_functor_identity (pr1 C))
                   (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 C)))
                   (twosided_disp_functor_identity D₁)
                   xy₁)) ;;2 fg' ;;2 pr1
                                       (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                          (idpath x₂)
                                          (idpath y₂)
                                          (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                                               (functor_composite_data
                                                 (functor_identity_data
                                                 (pr1
                                                 C))
                                                 (functor_identity_data

                                                 C)))
                                               (is_functor_composite
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 (pr1
                                                 C))
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 (pr1
                                                 C)))
                                               (is_functor_identity
                                                 (pr1
                                                 C))
                                               (id_left
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 (pr1
                                                 C)))
                                               (twosided_disp_functor_identity
                                                 D₁)
                                               xy₂ @
                                           ! path_twosided_disp_functor_ob
                                               (inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp
                                                 HF)
                                               xy₂))) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁) (idpath y₁)
        (two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob xy₁) ;;2 fg ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₂) (idpath y₂)
        (! two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob xy₂))

  (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
     (disp_functor_over_pair F))

  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
xx:= x₁,, y₁: category_binproduct C C
yy:= x₂,, y₂: category_binproduct C C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
fg':= fg: xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂
trf₂ (trf₂ (pr1
              (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁)
                 (idpath y₁)
                 (path_twosided_disp_functor_ob
                    (inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp HF) xy₁ @
                  transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                    (functor_composite_data
                       (functor_identity_data (pr1 C))
                       (functor_identity_data (pr1 C)))
                    (is_functor_composite
                       (functor_identity (pr1 C))
                       (functor_identity (pr1 C)))
                    (is_functor_identity (pr1 C))
                    (id_left
                       (functor_identity (pr1 C)))
                    (twosided_disp_functor_identity D₁)
                    xy₁)) ;;2 fg' ;;2 pr1
                                        (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                           (idpath x₂)
                                           (idpath y₂)
                                           (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                                                (functor_composite_data
                                                 (functor_identity_data
                                                 (pr1
                                                 C))
                                                 (functor_identity_data
                                                 (pr1
                                                 C)))
                                                (is_functor_composite
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 (pr1
                                                 C))
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 (pr1
                                                 C)))
                                                (is_functor_identity
                                                 (pr1
                                                 C))
                                                (id_left
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 (pr1
                                                 C)))
                                                (twosided_disp_functor_identity
                                                 D₁)
                                                xy₂ @
                                            ! path_twosided_disp_functor_ob
                                                (inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp
                                                 HF)
                                                xy₂)))) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁) (idpath y₁)
        (two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob xy₁) ;;2 fg ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₂) (idpath y₂)

D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C

  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))

  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso C)
  (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
     (disp_functor_over_pair F))
G:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
xx:= x₁,, y₁: category_binproduct C C
yy:= x₂,, y₂: category_binproduct C C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
fg':= fg: xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂
trf₂ (pr1
        (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁) (idpath y₁)
           (path_twosided_disp_functor_ob
              (inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp HF) xy₁ @
            transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
              (functor_composite_data
                 (functor_identity_data (pr1 C))
                 (functor_identity_data (pr1 C)))
              (is_functor_composite
                 (functor_identity (pr1 C))
                 (functor_identity (pr1 C)))
              (is_functor_identity (pr1 C))
              (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 C)))
              (twosided_disp_functor_identity D₁) xy₁)) ;;2 fg' ;;2 
      pr1
        (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₂) (idpath y₂)
           (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                (functor_composite_data
                   (functor_identity_data (pr1 C))
                   (functor_identity_data (pr1 C)))
                (is_functor_composite
                   (functor_identity (pr1 C))
                   (functor_identity (pr1 C)))
                (is_functor_identity (pr1 C))
                (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 C)))
                (twosided_disp_functor_identity D₁)
                xy₂ @
            ! path_twosided_disp_functor_ob
                (inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp HF) xy₂))) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁) (idpath y₁)
        (two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob xy₁) ;;2 fg ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₂) (idpath y₂)
        (! two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob xy₂))

      
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso C)
  (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
     (disp_functor_over_pair F))
G:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
xx:= x₁,, y₁: category_binproduct C C
yy:= x₂,, y₂: category_binproduct C C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
fg':= fg: xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂
pr1
  (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁) (idpath y₁)
     (path_twosided_disp_functor_ob
        (inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp HF) xy₁ @
      transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_identity_data (pr1 C))
           (functor_identity_data (pr1 C)))
        (is_functor_composite
           (functor_identity (pr1 C))
           (functor_identity (pr1 C)))
        (is_functor_identity (pr1 C))
        (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 C)))
        (twosided_disp_functor_identity D₁) xy₁)) ;;2 fg' ;;2 
pr1
  (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₂) (idpath y₂)
     (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
          (functor_composite_data
             (functor_identity_data (pr1 C))
             (functor_identity_data (pr1 C)))
          (is_functor_composite
             (functor_identity (pr1 C))
             (functor_identity (pr1 C)))
          (is_functor_identity (pr1 C))
          (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 C)))
          (twosided_disp_functor_identity D₁) xy₂ @
      ! path_twosided_disp_functor_ob
          (inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp HF) xy₂)) =
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁) (idpath y₁)
  (two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob xy₁) ;;2 fg ;;2 
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₂) (idpath y₂)
  (! two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob xy₂)

      use idtoiso_twosided_disp_triple_concat.
    Qed.

    
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso C)
  (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
     (disp_functor_over_pair F))
G:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
xx:= x₁,, y₁: category_binproduct C C
yy:= x₂,, y₂: category_binproduct C C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h:= f,, g: category_binproduct C C ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
xy₁: D₂ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₂ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
fg':= (#2 G) fg: G x₁ y₁ xy₁ -->[ h] G x₂ y₂ xy₂
(♯ F)%mor_disp fg' =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp
        (idpath
           (pr1
              (functor_identity
                 (category_binproduct C C) (x₁,, y₁))))
        (idpath
           (pr2
              (functor_identity
                 (category_binproduct C C) (x₁,, y₁))))
        (two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob_alt xy₁) ;;2 fg ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp
        (idpath
           (pr1
              (functor_identity
                 (category_binproduct C C) (x₂,, y₂))))
        (idpath
           (pr2
              (functor_identity
                 (category_binproduct C C) (x₂,, y₂))))
        (! two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob_alt xy₂))

    
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso C)
  (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
     (disp_functor_over_pair F))
G:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
xx:= x₁,, y₁: category_binproduct C C
yy:= x₂,, y₂: category_binproduct C C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h:= f,, g: category_binproduct C C ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
xy₁: D₂ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₂ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
fg':= (#2 G) fg: G x₁ y₁ xy₁ -->[ h] G x₂ y₂ xy₂
(♯ F)%mor_disp fg' =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp
        (idpath
           (pr1
              (functor_identity
                 (category_binproduct C C) (x₁,, y₁))))
        (idpath
           (pr2
              (functor_identity
                 (category_binproduct C C) (x₁,, y₁))))
        (two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob_alt xy₁) ;;2 fg ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp
        (idpath
           (pr1
              (functor_identity
                 (category_binproduct C C) (x₂,, y₂))))
        (idpath
           (pr2
              (functor_identity
                 (category_binproduct C C) (x₂,, y₂))))
        (! two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob_alt xy₂))

      
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso C)
  (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
     (disp_functor_over_pair F))
G:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
xx:= x₁,, y₁: category_binproduct C C
yy:= x₂,, y₂: category_binproduct C C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h:= f,, g: category_binproduct C C ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
xy₁: D₂ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₂ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
fg':= (#2 G) fg: G x₁ y₁ xy₁ -->[ h] G x₂ y₂ xy₂
(♯ F)%mor_disp fg' = ?b

?b =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp
        (idpath
           (pr1
              (functor_identity

        (idpath

              (functor_identity

        (idpath
           (pr1
              (functor_identity
                 (category_binproduct C C) (x₂,, y₂))))
        (idpath
           (pr2
              (functor_identity
                 (category_binproduct C C) (x₂,, y₂))))
        (! two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob_alt xy₂))

x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
xx:= x₁,, y₁: category_binproduct C C
yy:= x₂,, y₂: category_binproduct C C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧

(♯ F)%mor_disp fg' = ?b

        apply (path_twosided_disp_functor_mor (z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF)).
      
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso C)
  (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
     (disp_functor_over_pair F))
G:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
xx:= x₁,, y₁: category_binproduct C C
yy:= x₂,, y₂: category_binproduct C C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h:= f,, g: category_binproduct C C ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
xy₁: D₂ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₂ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
fg':= (#2 G) fg: G x₁ y₁ xy₁ -->[ h] G x₂ y₂ xy₂
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp
        (idpath
           ((inv_from_z_iso (identity_z_iso C)
             · identity_z_iso C) x₁))
        (idpath
           ((inv_from_z_iso (identity_z_iso C)
             · identity_z_iso C) y₁))
        (path_twosided_disp_functor_ob
           (z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF) xy₁) ;;2 
      (#2 (transportb (mor_disp D₂ D₂)
             (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv (identity_z_iso C))
             (id_disp D₂))) fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                     (idpath
                                        ((inv_from_z_iso
                                            (identity_z_iso
                                               C)
                                          · identity_z_iso
                                              C) x₂))
                                     (idpath
                                        ((inv_from_z_iso
                                            (identity_z_iso
                                               C)
                                          · identity_z_iso
                                              C) y₂))
                                     (! path_twosided_disp_functor_ob
                                          (z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor
                                             HF) xy₂)) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp
        (idpath
           (pr1
              (functor_identity
                 (category_binproduct C C) (x₁,, y₁))))
        (idpath
           (pr2
              (functor_identity
                 (category_binproduct C C) (x₁,, y₁))))
        (two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob_alt xy₁) ;;2 fg ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp
        (idpath
           (pr1
              (functor_identity
                 (category_binproduct C C) (x₂,, y₂))))
        (idpath
           (pr2
              (functor_identity
                 (category_binproduct C C) (x₂,, y₂))))
        (! two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob_alt xy₂))

x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C

yy:= x₂,, y₂: category_binproduct C C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h:= f,, g: category_binproduct C C ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
xy₁: D₂ x₁ y₁

fg':= (#2 G) fg: G x₁ y₁ xy₁ -->[ h] G x₂ y₂ xy₂
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁) (idpath y₁)
        (path_twosided_disp_functor_ob
           (z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF) xy₁) ;;2 
      (#2 (transportb (mor_disp D₂ D₂)
             (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 C)))
             (twosided_disp_functor_identity D₂))) fg ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₂) (idpath y₂)
        (! path_twosided_disp_functor_ob
             (z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF) xy₂)) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁) (idpath y₁)
        (two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob_alt xy₁) ;;2 fg ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₂) (idpath y₂)
        (! two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob_alt xy₂))

yy:= x₂,, y₂: category_binproduct C C

                 _

C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C

  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)

  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
xx:= x₁,, y₁: category_binproduct C C
yy:= x₂,, y₂: category_binproduct C C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h:= f,, g: category_binproduct C C ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
xy₁: D₂ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₂ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
fg':= (#2 G) fg: G x₁ y₁ xy₁ -->[ h] G x₂ y₂ xy₂
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁) (idpath y₁)
        (path_twosided_disp_functor_ob
           (z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF) xy₁) ;;2 
      (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp
               (idpath
                  (make_functor
                     (make_functor
                        (functor_composite_data
                           (identity C)
                           (functor_identity C))
                        (is_functor_composite
                           (identity C)
                           (functor_identity C)))
                     (is_functor_composite
                        (identity C)
                        (functor_identity C)) x₁))
               (idpath
                  (make_functor
                     (make_functor
                        (functor_composite_data
                           (identity C)
                           (functor_identity C))
                        (is_functor_composite
                           (identity C)
                           (functor_identity C)))
                     (is_functor_composite
                        (identity C)
                        (functor_identity C)) y₁))
               (transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                  (make_functor
                     (functor_composite_data
                        (identity C)
                        (functor_identity C))
                     (is_functor_composite
                        (identity C)
                        (functor_identity C)))
                  (is_functor_composite (identity C)
                     (functor_identity C))
                  (is_functor_identity C)
                  (id_left (functor_identity C))
                  (twosided_disp_functor_identity D₂)
                  xy₁) ;;2 (#2 (twosided_disp_functor_identity
                                  D₂)) fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                (idpath
                                                 (make_functor
                                                 (make_functor
                                                 (functor_composite_data
                                                 (identity
                                                 C)
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 C))
                                                 (is_functor_composite
                                                 (identity
                                                 C)
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 C)))
                                                 (is_functor_composite
                                                 (identity
                                                 C)
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 C))
                                                 x₂))
                                                (idpath
                                                 (make_functor
                                                 (make_functor
                                                 (functor_composite_data
                                                 (identity
                                                 C)
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 C))
                                                 (is_functor_composite
                                                 (identity
                                                 C)
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 C)))
                                                 (is_functor_composite
                                                 (identity
                                                 C)
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 C))
                                                 y₂))
                                                (! 
                                                 transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                                                 (make_functor
                                                 (functor_composite_data
                                                 (identity
                                                 C)
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 C))
                                                 (is_functor_composite
                                                 (identity
                                                 C)
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 C)))
                                                 (is_functor_composite
                                                 (identity
                                                 C)
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 C))
                                                 (is_functor_identity
                                                 C)
                                                 (id_left
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 C))
                                                 (twosided_disp_functor_identity
                                                 D₂)
                                                 xy₂))) ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₂) (idpath y₂)
        (! path_twosided_disp_functor_ob
             (z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF) xy₂)) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁) (idpath y₁)
        (two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob_alt xy₁) ;;2 fg ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₂) (idpath y₂)
        (! two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob_alt xy₂))

D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C

     (disp_functor_over_pair F))

  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
xx:= x₁,, y₁: category_binproduct C C
yy:= x₂,, y₂: category_binproduct C C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h:= f,, g: category_binproduct C C ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
xy₁: D₂ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₂ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
fg':= (#2 G) fg: G x₁ y₁ xy₁ -->[ h] G x₂ y₂ xy₂
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁) (idpath y₁)
        (path_twosided_disp_functor_ob
           (z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF) xy₁) ;;2 
      (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁)
               (idpath y₁)
               (transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                  (functor_composite_data
                     (functor_identity_data (pr1 C))
                     (functor_identity_data (pr1 C)))
                  (is_functor_composite
                     (functor_identity (pr1 C))
                     (functor_identity (pr1 C)))
                  (is_functor_identity (pr1 C))
                  (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 C)))
                  (twosided_disp_functor_identity D₂)
                  xy₁) ;;2 fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                    (idpath x₂)
                                    (idpath y₂)
                                    (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                                         (functor_composite_data
                                            (functor_identity_data
                                               (pr1 C))
                                            (functor_identity_data
                                               (pr1 C)))
                                         (is_functor_composite
                                            (functor_identity
                                               (pr1 C))
                                            (functor_identity
                                               (pr1 C)))
                                         (is_functor_identity
                                            (pr1 C))
                                         (id_left
                                            (functor_identity
                                               (pr1 C)))
                                         (twosided_disp_functor_identity
                                            D₂) xy₂))) ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₂) (idpath y₂)
        (! path_twosided_disp_functor_ob
             (z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF) xy₂)) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁) (idpath y₁)
        (two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob_alt xy₁) ;;2 fg ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₂) (idpath y₂)
        (! two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob_alt xy₂))

                (idpath y₂)
                (! two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob_alt
                     xy₂)))

      
C: setcategory

F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)

  (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
     (disp_functor_over_pair F))
G:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
xx:= x₁,, y₁: category_binproduct C C
yy:= x₂,, y₂: category_binproduct C C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h:= f,, g: category_binproduct C C ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
xy₁: D₂ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₂ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
fg':= (#2 G) fg: G x₁ y₁ xy₁ -->[ h] G x₂ y₂ xy₂
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁) (idpath y₁)
        (path_twosided_disp_functor_ob
           (z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF) xy₁) ;;2 
      (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁) (idpath y₁)
         (transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
            (functor_composite_data
               (functor_identity_data (pr1 C))
               (functor_identity_data (pr1 C)))
            (is_functor_composite
               (functor_identity (pr1 C))
               (functor_identity (pr1 C)))
            (is_functor_identity (pr1 C))
            (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 C)))
            (twosided_disp_functor_identity D₂) xy₁) ;;2 
       (fg ;;2 (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₂)
                  (idpath y₂)
                  (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                       (functor_composite_data
                          (functor_identity_data
                             (pr1 C))
                          (functor_identity_data
                             (pr1 C)))
                       (is_functor_composite
                          (functor_identity (pr1 C))
                          (functor_identity (pr1 C)))
                       (is_functor_identity (pr1 C))
                       (id_left
                          (functor_identity (pr1 C)))
                       (twosided_disp_functor_identity
                          D₂) xy₂) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                         (idpath x₂)
                                         (idpath y₂)
                                         (! path_twosided_disp_functor_ob
                                              (z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor
                                                 HF)
                                              xy₂))))) =
?b

  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))

  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)

  (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
     (disp_functor_over_pair F))

  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
xx:= x₁,, y₁: category_binproduct C C
yy:= x₂,, y₂: category_binproduct C C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h:= f,, g: category_binproduct C C ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
xy₁: D₂ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₂ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
fg':= (#2 G) fg: G x₁ y₁ xy₁ -->[ h] G x₂ y₂ xy₂
?b =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁) (idpath y₁)
        (two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob_alt xy₁) ;;2 
      (fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₂)
                (idpath y₂)
                (! two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob_alt
                     xy₂)))

yy:= x₂,, y₂: category_binproduct C C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h:= f,, g: category_binproduct C C ⟦ xx, yy ⟧

        (path_twosided_disp_functor_ob
           (z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF) xy₁) ;;2

            (functor_composite_data
               (functor_identity_data (pr1 C))
               (functor_identity_data (pr1 C)))

               (functor_identity (pr1 C))
               (functor_identity (pr1 C)))
            (is_functor_identity (pr1 C))
            (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 C)))
            (twosided_disp_functor_identity D₂) xy₁) ;;2

                  (idpath y₂)

                       (functor_composite_data

                          (functor_identity_data

                          (functor_identity (pr1 C)))
                       (is_functor_identity (pr1 C))
                       (id_left
                          (functor_identity (pr1 C)))
                       (twosided_disp_functor_identity
                          D₂) xy₂) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                         (idpath x₂)
                                         (idpath y₂)
                                         (! path_twosided_disp_functor_ob
                                              (z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor

                                              xy₂))))) =
?b

D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C

  (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
     (disp_functor_over_pair F))
G:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
xx:= x₁,, y₁: category_binproduct C C
yy:= x₂,, y₂: category_binproduct C C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h:= f,, g: category_binproduct C C ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
xy₁: D₂ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₂ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
fg':= (#2 G) fg: G x₁ y₁ xy₁ -->[ h] G x₂ y₂ xy₂
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₂) (idpath y₂)
  (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
       (functor_composite_data
          (functor_identity_data (pr1 C))
          (functor_identity_data (pr1 C)))
       (is_functor_composite
          (functor_identity (pr1 C))
          (functor_identity (pr1 C)))
       (is_functor_identity (pr1 C))
       (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 C)))
       (twosided_disp_functor_identity D₂) xy₂) ;;2 
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₂) (idpath y₂)
  (! path_twosided_disp_functor_ob
       (z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF) xy₂) = ?t2

        apply (idtoiso_twosided_disp_concat (D := D₂)).

     (disp_functor_over_pair F))

  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C

yy:= x₂,, y₂: category_binproduct C C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧

                    (idpath y₁)
                    (path_twosided_disp_functor_ob
                       (z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF)
                       xy₁) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp

                                        D₂) xy₁) ;;2 fg ;;2 
                  pr1
                    (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₂)
                       (idpath y₂)
                       (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                            (functor_composite_data
                               (functor_identity_data
                                  (pr1 C))
                               (functor_identity_data
                                  (pr1 C)))
                            (is_functor_composite
                               (functor_identity
                                  (pr1 C))
                               (functor_identity
                                  (pr1 C)))
                            (is_functor_identity
                               (pr1 C))
                            (id_left
                               (functor_identity
                                  (pr1 C)))
                            (twosided_disp_functor_identity
                               D₂) xy₂ @
                        ! path_twosided_disp_functor_ob
                            (z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor
                               HF) xy₂))))) =
trf₂ (trb₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁)
              (idpath y₁)
              (two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob_alt xy₁) ;;2 fg ;;2 
            idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₂)
              (idpath y₂)
              (! two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob_alt
                   xy₂)))

F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)

  (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
     (disp_functor_over_pair F))
G:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
xx:= x₁,, y₁: category_binproduct C C
yy:= x₂,, y₂: category_binproduct C C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h:= f,, g: category_binproduct C C ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
xy₁: D₂ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₂ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
fg':= (#2 G) fg: G x₁ y₁ xy₁ -->[ h] G x₂ y₂ xy₂
trf₂ (trf₂ (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁)
                    (idpath y₁)
                    (path_twosided_disp_functor_ob
                       (z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF)
                       xy₁) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                  (idpath x₁)
                                  (idpath y₁)
                                  (transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                                     (functor_composite_data
                                        (functor_identity_data
                                           (pr1 C))
                                        (functor_identity_data
                                           (pr1 C)))
                                     (is_functor_composite
                                        (functor_identity
                                           (pr1 C))
                                        (functor_identity
                                           (pr1 C)))
                                     (is_functor_identity
                                        (pr1 C))
                                     (id_left
                                        (functor_identity
                                           (pr1 C)))
                                     (twosided_disp_functor_identity
                                        D₂) xy₁) ;;2 fg ;;2 
                  pr1
                    (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₂)
                       (idpath y₂)
                       (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                            (functor_composite_data
                               (functor_identity_data
                                  (pr1 C))
                               (functor_identity_data
                                  (pr1 C)))
                            (is_functor_composite
                               (functor_identity
                                  (pr1 C))
                               (functor_identity
                                  (pr1 C)))
                            (is_functor_identity
                               (pr1 C))
                            (id_left
                               (functor_identity
                                  (pr1 C)))
                            (twosided_disp_functor_identity
                               D₂) xy₂ @
                        ! path_twosided_disp_functor_ob
                            (z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor
                               HF) xy₂))))) =
trf₂ (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁)
              (idpath y₁)
              (two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob_alt xy₁) ;;2 fg ;;2 
            idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₂)
              (idpath y₂)
              (! two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob_alt
                   xy₂)))

      
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso C)
  (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
     (disp_functor_over_pair F))
G:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
xx:= x₁,, y₁: category_binproduct C C
yy:= x₂,, y₂: category_binproduct C C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h:= f,, g: category_binproduct C C ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
xy₁: D₂ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₂ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
fg':= (#2 G) fg: G x₁ y₁ xy₁ -->[ h] G x₂ y₂ xy₂
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁) (idpath y₁)
        (path_twosided_disp_functor_ob
           (z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF) xy₁) ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁) (idpath y₁)
        (transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
           (functor_composite_data
              (functor_identity_data (pr1 C))
              (functor_identity_data (pr1 C)))
           (is_functor_composite
              (functor_identity (pr1 C))
              (functor_identity (pr1 C)))
           (is_functor_identity (pr1 C))
           (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 C)))
           (twosided_disp_functor_identity D₂) xy₁) ;;2 fg ;;2 
      pr1
        (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₂) (idpath y₂)
           (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                (functor_composite_data
                   (functor_identity_data (pr1 C))
                   (functor_identity_data (pr1 C)))
                (is_functor_composite
                   (functor_identity (pr1 C))
                   (functor_identity (pr1 C)))
                (is_functor_identity (pr1 C))
                (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 C)))
                (twosided_disp_functor_identity D₂)
                xy₂ @
            ! path_twosided_disp_functor_ob
                (z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF) xy₂))) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁) (idpath y₁)
        (two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob_alt xy₁) ;;2 fg ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₂) (idpath y₂)
        (! two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob_alt xy₂))

yy:= x₂,, y₂: category_binproduct C C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧

              (functor_identity_data (pr1 C))

              (functor_identity (pr1 C)))

                (is_functor_identity (pr1 C))

                (twosided_disp_functor_identity D₂)
                xy₂ @
            ! path_twosided_disp_functor_ob
                (z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF) xy₂))) =
?b

yy:= x₂,, y₂: category_binproduct C C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧

f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧

              (functor_identity (pr1 C)))

                   (functor_identity_data (pr1 C)))

                   (functor_identity (pr1 C)))
                (is_functor_identity (pr1 C))
                (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 C)))
                (twosided_disp_functor_identity D₂)
                xy₂ @
            ! path_twosided_disp_functor_ob
                (z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF) xy₂))) =

fg':= (#2 G) fg: G x₁ y₁ xy₁ -->[ h] G x₂ y₂ xy₂
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁) (idpath y₁)
  (path_twosided_disp_functor_ob
     (z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF) xy₁) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                              (idpath
                                                 x₁)

                                                 (twosided_disp_functor_identity
                                                 D₂)
                                                 xy₁) ;;2 fg ;;2 
pr1
  (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₂) (idpath y₂)
     (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
          (functor_composite_data
             (functor_identity_data (pr1 C))

          (twosided_disp_functor_identity D₂) xy₂ @
      ! path_twosided_disp_functor_ob
          (z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF) xy₂)) = ?t2

                                                 D₂)
                                                 xy₁) =
?y'

        apply (idtoiso_twosided_disp_concat (D := D₂)).

                      (functor_identity_data (pr1 C)))
                   (is_functor_composite
                      (functor_identity (pr1 C))
                      (functor_identity (pr1 C)))
                   (is_functor_identity (pr1 C))
                   (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 C)))
                   (twosided_disp_functor_identity D₂)
                   xy₁)) ;;2 fg ;;2 pr1
                                      (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                         (idpath x₂)
                                         (idpath y₂)
                                         (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                                              (functor_composite_data
                                                 (functor_identity_data
                                                 (pr1
                                                 C))
                                                 (functor_identity_data
                                                 (pr1
                                                 C)))
                                              (is_functor_composite
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 (pr1
                                                 C))
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 (pr1
                                                 C)))
                                              (is_functor_identity
                                                 (pr1
                                                 C))
                                              (id_left
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 (pr1
                                                 C)))
                                              (twosided_disp_functor_identity
                                                 D₂)
                                              xy₂ @
                                          ! path_twosided_disp_functor_ob
                                              (z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor
                                                 HF)
                                              xy₂))) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁) (idpath y₁)
        (two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob_alt xy₁) ;;2 fg ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₂) (idpath y₂)
        (! two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob_alt xy₂))

      
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso C)
  (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
     (disp_functor_over_pair F))
G:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
xx:= x₁,, y₁: category_binproduct C C
yy:= x₂,, y₂: category_binproduct C C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h:= f,, g: category_binproduct C C ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
xy₁: D₂ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₂ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
fg':= (#2 G) fg: G x₁ y₁ xy₁ -->[ h] G x₂ y₂ xy₂
trf₂ (trf₂ (pr1
              (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁)
                 (idpath y₁)
                 (path_twosided_disp_functor_ob
                    (z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF) xy₁ @
                  transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                    (functor_composite_data
                       (functor_identity_data (pr1 C))
                       (functor_identity_data (pr1 C)))
                    (is_functor_composite
                       (functor_identity (pr1 C))
                       (functor_identity (pr1 C)))
                    (is_functor_identity (pr1 C))
                    (id_left
                       (functor_identity (pr1 C)))
                    (twosided_disp_functor_identity D₂)
                    xy₁)) ;;2 fg ;;2 pr1
                                       (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                          (idpath x₂)
                                          (idpath y₂)
                                          (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                                               (functor_composite_data
                                                 (functor_identity_data
                                                 (pr1
                                                 C))
                                                 (functor_identity_data
                                                 (pr1
                                                 C)))
                                               (is_functor_composite
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 (pr1
                                                 C))
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 (pr1
                                                 C)))
                                               (is_functor_identity
                                                 (pr1
                                                 C))
                                               (id_left
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 (pr1
                                                 C)))
                                               (twosided_disp_functor_identity
                                                 D₂)
                                               xy₂ @
                                           ! path_twosided_disp_functor_ob
                                               (z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor
                                                 HF)
                                               xy₂)))) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁) (idpath y₁)
        (two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob_alt xy₁) ;;2 fg ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₂) (idpath y₂)
        (! two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob_alt xy₂))

      
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso C)
  (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
     (disp_functor_over_pair F))
G:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
xx:= x₁,, y₁: category_binproduct C C
yy:= x₂,, y₂: category_binproduct C C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h:= f,, g: category_binproduct C C ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
xy₁: D₂ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₂ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
fg':= (#2 G) fg: G x₁ y₁ xy₁ -->[ h] G x₂ y₂ xy₂
trf₂ (pr1
        (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁) (idpath y₁)
           (path_twosided_disp_functor_ob
              (z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF) xy₁ @
            transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
              (functor_composite_data
                 (functor_identity_data (pr1 C))
                 (functor_identity_data (pr1 C)))
              (is_functor_composite
                 (functor_identity (pr1 C))
                 (functor_identity (pr1 C)))
              (is_functor_identity (pr1 C))
              (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 C)))
              (twosided_disp_functor_identity D₂) xy₁)) ;;2 fg ;;2 
      pr1
        (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₂) (idpath y₂)
           (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                (functor_composite_data
                   (functor_identity_data (pr1 C))
                   (functor_identity_data (pr1 C)))
                (is_functor_composite
                   (functor_identity (pr1 C))
                   (functor_identity (pr1 C)))
                (is_functor_identity (pr1 C))
                (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 C)))
                (twosided_disp_functor_identity D₂)
                xy₂ @
            ! path_twosided_disp_functor_ob
                (z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF) xy₂))) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁) (idpath y₁)
        (two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob_alt xy₁) ;;2 fg ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₂) (idpath y₂)
        (! two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob_alt xy₂))

      
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso C)
  (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
     (disp_functor_over_pair F))
G:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
xx:= x₁,, y₁: category_binproduct C C
yy:= x₂,, y₂: category_binproduct C C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h:= f,, g: category_binproduct C C ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
xy₁: D₂ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₂ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
fg':= (#2 G) fg: G x₁ y₁ xy₁ -->[ h] G x₂ y₂ xy₂
pr1
  (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁) (idpath y₁)
     (path_twosided_disp_functor_ob
        (z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF) xy₁ @
      transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_identity_data (pr1 C))
           (functor_identity_data (pr1 C)))
        (is_functor_composite
           (functor_identity (pr1 C))
           (functor_identity (pr1 C)))
        (is_functor_identity (pr1 C))
        (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 C)))
        (twosided_disp_functor_identity D₂) xy₁)) ;;2 fg ;;2 
pr1
  (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₂) (idpath y₂)
     (! transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
          (functor_composite_data
             (functor_identity_data (pr1 C))
             (functor_identity_data (pr1 C)))
          (is_functor_composite
             (functor_identity (pr1 C))
             (functor_identity (pr1 C)))
          (is_functor_identity (pr1 C))
          (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 C)))
          (twosided_disp_functor_identity D₂) xy₂ @
      ! path_twosided_disp_functor_ob
          (z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF) xy₂)) =
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁) (idpath y₁)
  (two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob_alt xy₁) ;;2 fg ;;2 
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₂) (idpath y₂)
  (! two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob_alt xy₂)

      use idtoiso_twosided_disp_triple_concat.
    Qed.

    
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso C)
  (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
     (disp_functor_over_pair F))
G:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: C
xx:= x₁,, y₁: category_binproduct C C
yy:= x₂,, y₂: category_binproduct C C
zz:= x₃,, y₃: category_binproduct C C
f₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
xy₃: D₁ x₃ y₃
fg₁: xy₁ -->[ f₁ ][ g₁] xy₂
fg₁':= fg₁: xy₁ -->[ f₁,, g₁] xy₂
fg₂: xy₂ -->[ f₂ ][ g₂] xy₃
fg₂':= fg₂: xy₂ -->[ f₂,, g₂] xy₃
h:= fg₁ ;;2 fg₂: xy₁ -->[ f₁ · f₂,, g₁ · g₂] xy₃
(♯ F)%mor_disp h =
(♯ F)%mor_disp fg₁' ;;2 (♯ F)%mor_disp fg₂'

    
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso C)
  (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
     (disp_functor_over_pair F))
G:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: C
xx:= x₁,, y₁: category_binproduct C C
yy:= x₂,, y₂: category_binproduct C C
zz:= x₃,, y₃: category_binproduct C C
f₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
xy₃: D₁ x₃ y₃
fg₁: xy₁ -->[ f₁ ][ g₁] xy₂
fg₁':= fg₁: xy₁ -->[ f₁,, g₁] xy₂
fg₂: xy₂ -->[ f₂ ][ g₂] xy₃
fg₂':= fg₂: xy₂ -->[ f₂,, g₂] xy₃
h:= fg₁ ;;2 fg₂: xy₁ -->[ f₁ · f₂,, g₁ · g₂] xy₃
(♯ F)%mor_disp h =
(♯ F)%mor_disp fg₁' ;;2 (♯ F)%mor_disp fg₂'

      exact (disp_functor_comp F fg₁' fg₂').
    Qed.

    
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso C)
  (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
     (disp_functor_over_pair F))
G:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
xx:= x₁,, y₁: category_binproduct C C
yy:= x₂,, y₂: category_binproduct C C
f, f': C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g, g': C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
p: f = f'
q: g = g'
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
fg':= fg: xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂
φ:= trf₂ fg': xy₁ -->[ f',, g'] xy₂
(♯ F)%mor_disp φ = trf₂ (♯ F)%mor_disp fg'

    
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso C)
  (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
     (disp_functor_over_pair F))
G:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
xx:= x₁,, y₁: category_binproduct C C
yy:= x₂,, y₂: category_binproduct C C
f, f': C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g, g': C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
p: f = f'
q: g = g'
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
fg':= fg: xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂
φ:= trf₂ fg': xy₁ -->[ f',, g'] xy₂
(♯ F)%mor_disp φ = trf₂ (♯ F)%mor_disp fg'

      
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso C)
  (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
     (disp_functor_over_pair F))
G:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
xx:= x₁,, y₁: category_binproduct C C
yy:= x₂,, y₂: category_binproduct C C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
fg':= fg: xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂
φ:= trf₂ fg': xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂
(♯ F)%mor_disp φ = trf₂ (♯ F)%mor_disp fg'

      
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso C)
  (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
     (disp_functor_over_pair F))
G:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
xx:= x₁,, y₁: category_binproduct C C
yy:= x₂,, y₂: category_binproduct C C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
fg':= fg: xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂
φ:= trf₂ fg': xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂
trf₂ (♯ F)%mor_disp fg' = (♯ F)%mor_disp φ

      apply transportf_disp_mor2_idpath.
    Qed.

    
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso C)
  (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
     (disp_functor_over_pair F))
G:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x, y: C
xx:= x,, y: category_binproduct C C
xy₁, xy₂: D₁ x y
p: xy₁ = xy₂
f:= idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x) (idpath y) p: xy₁ -->[ identity x ][ identity y] xy₂
φ:= f: xy₁ -->[
identity (pr1 xx),, identity (pr2 xx)] xy₂
ψ:= idtoiso_twosided_disp
  (idpath
     (pr1
        (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C)
           xx)))
  (idpath
     (pr2
        (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C)
           xx))) (maponpaths (F xx) p): F xx xy₁ -->[
identity
  (pr1
     (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C)
        xx))
][ identity
     (pr2
        (functor_identity
           (category_binproduct C C) xx))] F xx
                                             xy₂
(♯ F)%mor_disp φ = ψ

    
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso C)
  (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
     (disp_functor_over_pair F))
G:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x, y: C
xx:= x,, y: category_binproduct C C
xy₁, xy₂: D₁ x y
p: xy₁ = xy₂
f:= idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x) (idpath y) p: xy₁ -->[ identity x ][ identity y] xy₂
φ:= f: xy₁ -->[
identity (pr1 xx),, identity (pr2 xx)] xy₂
ψ:= idtoiso_twosided_disp
  (idpath
     (pr1
        (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C)
           xx)))
  (idpath
     (pr2
        (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C)
           xx))) (maponpaths (F xx) p): F xx xy₁ -->[
identity
  (pr1
     (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C)
        xx))
][ identity
     (pr2
        (functor_identity
           (category_binproduct C C) xx))] F xx
                                             xy₂
(♯ F)%mor_disp φ = ψ

      
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso C)
  (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
     (disp_functor_over_pair F))
G:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x, y: C
xx:= x,, y: category_binproduct C C
xy₁: D₁ x y
f:= idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x) (idpath y)
  (idpath xy₁): xy₁ -->[ identity x ][ identity y] xy₁
φ:= f: xy₁ -->[
identity (pr1 xx),, identity (pr2 xx)] xy₁
ψ:= idtoiso_twosided_disp
  (idpath
     (pr1
        (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C)
           xx)))
  (idpath
     (pr2
        (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C)
           xx))) (maponpaths (F xx) (idpath xy₁)): F xx xy₁ -->[
identity
  (pr1
     (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C)
        xx))
][ identity
     (pr2
        (functor_identity
           (category_binproduct C C) xx))] F xx
                                             xy₁
(♯ F)%mor_disp (id_two_disp xy₁) =
id_two_disp (F xx xy₁)

      exact (disp_functor_id F (x := xx) xy₁).
    Qed.

    
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso C)
  (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
     (disp_functor_over_pair F))
G:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
disp_functor_ff F

yy: twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁ y

isweq (λ ff : xx -->[ f] yy, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)

D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))

     (disp_functor_over_pair F))

  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x, y: category_binproduct C C
xx: twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁ x
yy: twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁ y
f: category_binproduct C C ⟦ x, y ⟧
∏ x0 : xx -->[ f] yy,
?g ((λ ff : xx -->[ f] yy, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff) x0) = x0
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso C)
  (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
     (disp_functor_over_pair F))
G:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x, y: category_binproduct C C
xx: twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁ x
yy: twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁ y
f: category_binproduct C C ⟦ x, y ⟧
∏
y0 : F x xx -->[
     # (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C)) f] 
     F y yy,
(λ ff : xx -->[ f] yy, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff) (?g y0) = y0

      
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso C)
  (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
     (disp_functor_over_pair F))
G:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x, y: category_binproduct C C
xx: twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁ x
yy: twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁ y
f: category_binproduct C C ⟦ x, y ⟧
F x xx -->[
# (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C)) f] 
F y yy → xx -->[ f] yy
 exact (λ ff,
               transportf_disp_mor2
                 (id_right _ @ id_left _)
                 (id_right _ @ id_left _)
                 (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                    (idpath _) (idpath _)
                    (!(two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob _))
                  ;;2 #2 G ff
                  ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                        (idpath _) (idpath _)
                        (two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob _))).
      
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso C)
  (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
     (disp_functor_over_pair F))
G:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x, y: category_binproduct C C
xx: twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁ x
yy: twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁ y
f: category_binproduct C C ⟦ x, y ⟧
∏ x0 : xx -->[ f] yy,
(λ ff : F x xx -->[
        # (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
          f] F y yy,
 trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp
         (idpath
            (functor_identity C
               (pr1
                  (functor_identity
                     (category_binproduct C C) x))))
         (idpath
            (functor_identity C
               (pr2
                  (functor_identity
                     (category_binproduct C C) x))))
         (! two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob
              (transportf
                 (λ z : C,
                  D₁ z
                    (functor_identity C
                       (pr2
                          (functor_identity
                             (category_binproduct C C)
                             x))))
                 (idpath
                    (functor_identity C
                       (pr1
                          (functor_identity
                             (category_binproduct C C)
                             x))))
                 (transportf
                    (λ z : C,
                     D₁
                       (functor_identity C
                          (pr1
                             (functor_identity
                                (category_binproduct C
                                   C) x))) z)
                    (idpath
                       (functor_identity C
                          (pr2
                             (functor_identity
                                (category_binproduct C
                                   C) x)))) xx))) ;;2 
       (#2 G) ff ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                       (idpath
                          (functor_identity C
                             (pr1
                                (functor_identity
                                   (category_binproduct
                                      C C) y))))
                       (idpath
                          (functor_identity C
                             (pr2
                                (functor_identity
                                   (category_binproduct
                                      C C) y))))
                       (two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob
                          yy)))
  ((λ ff : xx -->[ f] yy, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff) x0) = x0
 
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso C)
  (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
     (disp_functor_over_pair F))
G:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x, y: category_binproduct C C
xx: twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁ x
yy: twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁ y
f: category_binproduct C C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (pr1 x))
        (idpath (pr2 x))
        (! two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob xx) ;;2 
      (#2 G) ((♯ F)%mor_disp ff) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                       (idpath (pr1 y))
                                       (idpath (pr2 y))
                                       (two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob
                                          yy)) = ff

  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x, y: category_binproduct C C
xx: twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁ x
yy: twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁ y
f: category_binproduct C C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (pr1 x))
        (idpath (pr2 x))
        (! two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob xx) ;;2 
      (#2 G) ((♯ F)%mor_disp ff) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                       (idpath (pr1 y))
                                       (idpath (pr2 y))
                                       (two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob
                                          yy)) = ?b

yy: twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁ y
f: category_binproduct C C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
?b = ff
