yy: twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁ y
f: category_binproduct C C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (pr1 x))
        (idpath (pr2 x))
        (! two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob xx) ;;2 
      (#2 G) ((♯ F)%mor_disp ff) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp

C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)

  (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
     (disp_functor_over_pair F))

  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x, y: category_binproduct C C
xx: twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁ x
yy: twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁ y
f: category_binproduct C C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (pr1 x))
  (idpath (pr2 x))
  (! two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob xx) ;;2 (#2 G)
                                              ((♯ F)%mor_disp
                                                 ff) ;;2 
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (pr1 y))
  (idpath (pr2 y)) (two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob yy) =
?t2

          
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C

  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)

  (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
     (disp_functor_over_pair F))
G:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x, y: category_binproduct C C
xx: twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁ x
yy: twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁ y
f: category_binproduct C C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (pr1 x))
  (idpath (pr2 x))
  (! two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob xx) ;;2 (#2 G)
                                              ((♯ F)%mor_disp
                                                 ff) =
?y'

          
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso C)
  (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
     (disp_functor_over_pair F))
G:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x, y: category_binproduct C C
xx: twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁ x
yy: twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁ y
f: category_binproduct C C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
(#2 G) ((♯ F)%mor_disp ff) = ?t2

          exact (two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_mor ff).
        
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso C)
  (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
     (disp_functor_over_pair F))
G:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x, y: category_binproduct C C
xx: twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁ x
yy: twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁ y
f: category_binproduct C C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (pr1 x))
        (idpath (pr2 x))
        (! two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob xx) ;;2 
      (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp
               (idpath (functor_identity C (pr1 x)))
               (idpath (functor_identity C (pr2 x)))
               (two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob xx) ;;2 ff ;;2 
             idtoiso_twosided_disp
               (idpath (functor_identity C (pr1 y)))
               (idpath (functor_identity C (pr2 y)))
               (! two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob yy))) ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (pr1 y))
        (idpath (pr2 y))
        (two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob yy)) = ff

        
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso C)
  (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
     (disp_functor_over_pair F))
G:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x, y: category_binproduct C C
xx: twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁ x
yy: twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁ y
f: category_binproduct C C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
trf₂ (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (pr1 x))
              (idpath (pr2 x))
              (! two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob xx) ;;2 
            (idtoiso_twosided_disp
               (idpath (functor_identity C (pr1 x)))
               (idpath (functor_identity C (pr2 x)))
               (two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob xx) ;;2 ff ;;2 
             idtoiso_twosided_disp
               (idpath (functor_identity C (pr1 y)))
               (idpath (functor_identity C (pr2 y)))
               (! two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob yy))) ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (pr1 y))
        (idpath (pr2 y))
        (two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob yy)) = ff

        
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso C)
  (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
     (disp_functor_over_pair F))
G:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x, y: category_binproduct C C
xx: twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁ x
yy: twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁ y
f: category_binproduct C C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
trf₂ (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (pr1 x))
              (idpath (pr2 x))
              (! two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob xx) ;;2 
            (idtoiso_twosided_disp
               (idpath (functor_identity C (pr1 x)))
               (idpath (functor_identity C (pr2 x)))
               (two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob xx) ;;2 ff ;;2 
             idtoiso_twosided_disp
               (idpath (functor_identity C (pr1 y)))
               (idpath (functor_identity C (pr2 y)))
               (! two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob yy)) ;;2 
            idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (pr1 y))
              (idpath (pr2 y))
              (two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob yy))) =
ff

        
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso C)
  (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
     (disp_functor_over_pair F))
G:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x, y: category_binproduct C C
xx: twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁ x
yy: twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁ y
f: category_binproduct C C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (pr1 x))
        (idpath (pr2 x))
        (! two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob xx) ;;2 
      (idtoiso_twosided_disp
         (idpath (functor_identity C (pr1 x)))
         (idpath (functor_identity C (pr2 x)))
         (two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob xx) ;;2 ff ;;2 
       idtoiso_twosided_disp
         (idpath (functor_identity C (pr1 y)))
         (idpath (functor_identity C (pr2 y)))
         (! two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob yy)) ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (pr1 y))
        (idpath (pr2 y))
        (two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob yy)) = ff

        
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso C)
  (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
     (disp_functor_over_pair F))
G:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x, y: category_binproduct C C
xx: twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁ x
yy: twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁ y
f: category_binproduct C C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
trf₂ (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (pr1 x))
              (idpath (pr2 x))
              (! two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob xx) ;;2 
            (trf₂ (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                           (idpath
                              (functor_identity C
                                 (pr1 x)))
                           (idpath
                              (functor_identity C
                                 (pr2 x)))
                           (two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob
                              xx) ;;2 (ff ;;2 (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 C
                                                 (pr1
                                                 y)))
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 C
                                                 (pr2
                                                 y)))
                                                 (! 
                                                 two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob
                                                 yy) ;;2 
                                               idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (pr1
                                                 y))
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (pr2
                                                 y))
                                                 (two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob
                                                 yy)))))))) =
ff

trf₂ (trf₂ (trf₂ (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                          (idpath (pr1 x))
                          (idpath (pr2 x))
                          (! two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob

                                                 C

                                                 y)))

                                                 yy) ;;2

                                                 (idpath
                                                 (pr1
                                                 y))
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (pr2
                                                 y))
                                                 (two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob
                                                 yy)))))))) =
ff

ff: xx -->[ f] yy
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (pr1 x))
        (idpath (pr2 x))
        (! two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob xx) ;;2 
      (idtoiso_twosided_disp
         (idpath (functor_identity C (pr1 x)))
         (idpath (functor_identity C (pr2 x)))
         (two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob xx) ;;2 (trb₂ ff))) =
ff

trf₂ (trb₂ ff) = ff

D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso C)
  (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
     (disp_functor_over_pair F))
G:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x, y: category_binproduct C C
xx: twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁ x
yy: twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁ y
f: category_binproduct C C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
trf₂ (trf₂ ff) = ff

        
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso C)
  (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
     (disp_functor_over_pair F))
G:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x, y: category_binproduct C C
xx: twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁ x
yy: twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁ y
f: category_binproduct C C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
trf₂ ff = ff

        apply transportf_disp_mor2_idpath.
      
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso C)
  (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
     (disp_functor_over_pair F))
G:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x, y: category_binproduct C C
xx: twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁ x
yy: twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁ y
f: category_binproduct C C ⟦ x, y ⟧
∏
y0 : F x xx -->[
     # (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C)) f] 
     F y yy,
(λ ff : xx -->[ f] yy, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  ((λ ff : F x xx -->[
           # (functor_identity
                (category_binproduct C C)) f] F y yy,
    trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp
            (idpath
               (functor_identity C
                  (pr1
                     (functor_identity
                        (category_binproduct C C) x))))
            (idpath
               (functor_identity C
                  (pr2
                     (functor_identity
                        (category_binproduct C C) x))))
            (! two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob
                 (transportf
                    (λ z : C,
                     D₁ z
                       (functor_identity C
                          (pr2
                             (functor_identity
                                (category_binproduct C
                                   C) x))))
                    (idpath
                       (functor_identity C
                          (pr1
                             (functor_identity
                                (category_binproduct C
                                   C) x))))
                    (transportf
                       (λ z : C,
                        D₁
                          (functor_identity C
                             (pr1
                                (functor_identity
                                   (category_binproduct
                                      C C) x))) z)
                       (idpath
                          (functor_identity C
                             (pr2
                                (functor_identity
                                   (category_binproduct
                                      C C) x)))) xx))) ;;2 
          (#2 G) ff ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                          (idpath
                             (functor_identity C
                                (pr1
                                   (functor_identity
                                      (category_binproduct
                                         C C) y))))
                          (idpath
                             (functor_identity C
                                (pr2
                                   (functor_identity
                                      (category_binproduct
                                         C C) y))))
                          (two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob
                             yy))) y0) = y0
 
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso C)
  (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
     (disp_functor_over_pair F))
G:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x, y: category_binproduct C C
xx: twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁ x
yy: twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁ y
f: category_binproduct C C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[
# (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C)) f] 
F y yy
(♯ F)%mor_disp
  (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (pr1 x))
           (idpath (pr2 x))
           (! two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob xx) ;;2 
         (#2 G) ff ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                         (idpath (pr1 y))
                         (idpath (pr2 y))
                         (two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob
                            yy))) = ff

       (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (pr1 x))
          (idpath (pr2 x))
          (! two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob xx) ;;2 
        (#2 G) ff ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                        (idpath (pr1 y))
                        (idpath (pr2 y))
                        (two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob
                           yy)) = ff

                                          (idpath
                                             (pr1 y))
                                          (idpath
                                             (pr2 y))
                                          (two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob
                                             yy))) =
ff

(♯ F)%mor_disp

     (idpath (pr2 y))
     (two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob yy)) = ?t2

?y'

          
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)

     (disp_functor_over_pair F))

  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁

yy: twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁ y
f: category_binproduct C C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[
# (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C)) f] 
F y yy
(♯ F)%mor_disp ((#2 G) ff) = ?t2

          apply two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_mor_alt.
        
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso C)
  (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
     (disp_functor_over_pair F))
G:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x, y: category_binproduct C C
xx: twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁ x
yy: twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁ y
f: category_binproduct C C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[
# (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C)) f] 
F y yy
trf₂ ((♯ F)%mor_disp
        (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (pr1 x))
           (idpath (pr2 x))
           (! two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob xx)) ;;2 
      (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp
               (idpath
                  (pr1
                     (functor_identity
                        (category_binproduct C C)
                        (pr1 x,, pr2 x))))
               (idpath
                  (pr2
                     (functor_identity
                        (category_binproduct C C)
                        (pr1 x,, pr2 x))))
               (two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob_alt
                  (F (pr1 x,, pr2 x) xx)) ;;2 ff ;;2 
             idtoiso_twosided_disp
               (idpath
                  (pr1
                     (functor_identity
                        (category_binproduct C C)
                        (pr1 y,, pr2 y))))
               (idpath
                  (pr2
                     (functor_identity
                        (category_binproduct C C)
                        (pr1 y,, pr2 y))))
               (! two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob_alt
                    (F y yy)))) ;;2 (♯ F)%mor_disp
                                      (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                         (idpath
                                            (pr1 y))
                                         (idpath
                                            (pr2 y))
                                         (two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob
                                            yy))) = ff

ff: F x xx -->[
# (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C)) f] 
F y yy
trf₂ ((♯ F)%mor_disp
        (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (pr1 x))
           (idpath (pr2 x))
           (! two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob xx)) ;;2 
      (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (pr1 x))
               (idpath (pr2 x))
               (two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob_alt
                  (F (pr1 x,, pr2 x) xx)) ;;2 ff ;;2 
             idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (pr1 y))
               (idpath (pr2 y))
               (! two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob_alt
                    (F y yy)))) ;;2 (♯ F)%mor_disp
                                      (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                         (idpath
                                            (pr1 y))
                                         (idpath
                                            (pr2 y))
                                         (two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob
                                            yy))) = ff

               (idpath (pr2 y))
               (! two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob_alt
                    (F y yy))) ;;2 (♯ F)%mor_disp
                                     (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                        (idpath
                                           (pr1 y))

C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso C)
  (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
     (disp_functor_over_pair F))
G:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x, y: category_binproduct C C
xx: twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁ x
yy: twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁ y
f: category_binproduct C C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[
# (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C)) f] 
F y yy
trf₂ ((♯ F)%mor_disp
        (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (pr1 x))
           (idpath (pr2 x))
           (! two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob xx)) ;;2 
      (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (pr1 x))
         (idpath (pr2 x))
         (two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob_alt
            (F (pr1 x,, pr2 x) xx)) ;;2 ff ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (pr1
                                                 y))
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (pr2
                                                 y))
                                                 (! 
                                                 two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob_alt
                                                 (F y
                                                 yy))) ;;2 
      (♯ F)%mor_disp
        (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (pr1 y))
           (idpath (pr2 y))
           (two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob yy))) = ff

  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x, y: category_binproduct C C
xx: twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁ x
yy: twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁ y
f: category_binproduct C C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[
# (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C)) f] 
F y yy
(♯ F)%mor_disp
  (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (pr1 y))
     (idpath (pr2 y))
     (two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob yy)) = ?t2

C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso C)
  (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
     (disp_functor_over_pair F))
G:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x, y: category_binproduct C C
xx: twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁ x
yy: twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁ y
f: category_binproduct C C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[
# (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C)) f] 
F y yy
trf₂ ((♯ F)%mor_disp
        (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (pr1 x))
           (idpath (pr2 x))
           (! two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob xx)) ;;2 
      (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (pr1 x))
         (idpath (pr2 x))
         (two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob_alt
            (F (pr1 x,, pr2 x) xx)) ;;2 ff ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (pr1
                                                 y))
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (pr2
                                                 y))
                                                 (! 
                                                 two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob_alt
                                                 (F y
                                                 yy))) ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp
        (idpath
           (pr1
              (functor_identity
                 (category_binproduct C C)
                 (pr1 y,, pr2 y))))
        (idpath
           (pr2
              (functor_identity
                 (category_binproduct C C)
                 (pr1 y,, pr2 y))))
        (maponpaths (F (pr1 y,, pr2 y))
           (two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob yy))) = ff

  (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (pr1 x))

     (! two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob xx)) ;;2 (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                 (idpath

           (pr1 y,, pr2 y))))
  (idpath
     (pr2
        (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C)

  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x, y: category_binproduct C C
xx: twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁ x
yy: twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁ y
f: category_binproduct C C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[
# (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C)) f] 
F y yy
(♯ F)%mor_disp
  (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (pr1 x))
     (idpath (pr2 x))
     (! two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob xx)) = ?y'

          apply disp_functor_idtoiso_twosided_disp.
        
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso C)
  (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
     (disp_functor_over_pair F))
G:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x, y: category_binproduct C C
xx: twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁ x
yy: twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁ y
f: category_binproduct C C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[
# (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C)) f] 
F y yy
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp
        (idpath
           (pr1
              (functor_identity
                 (category_binproduct C C)
                 (pr1 x,, pr2 x))))
        (idpath
           (pr2
              (functor_identity
                 (category_binproduct C C)
                 (pr1 x,, pr2 x))))
        (maponpaths (F (pr1 x,, pr2 x))
           (! two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob xx)) ;;2 
      (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (pr1 x))
         (idpath (pr2 x))
         (two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob_alt
            (F (pr1 x,, pr2 x) xx)) ;;2 ff ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (pr1
                                                 y))
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (pr2
                                                 y))
                                                 (! 
                                                 two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob_alt
                                                 (F y
                                                 yy))) ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp
        (idpath
           (pr1
              (functor_identity
                 (category_binproduct C C)
                 (pr1 y,, pr2 y))))
        (idpath
           (pr2
              (functor_identity
                 (category_binproduct C C)
                 (pr1 y,, pr2 y))))
        (maponpaths (F (pr1 y,, pr2 y))
           (two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob yy))) = ff

        
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso C)
  (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
     (disp_functor_over_pair F))
G:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x, y: category_binproduct C C
xx: twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁ x
yy: twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁ y
f: category_binproduct C C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[
# (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C)) f] 
F y yy
trf₂ (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp
              (idpath
                 (pr1
                    (functor_identity
                       (category_binproduct C C)
                       (pr1 x,, pr2 x))))
              (idpath
                 (pr2
                    (functor_identity
                       (category_binproduct C C)
                       (pr1 x,, pr2 x))))
              (maponpaths (F (pr1 x,, pr2 x))
                 (! two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob xx)) ;;2 
            (trf₂ (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                           (idpath (pr1 x))
                           (idpath (pr2 x))
                           (two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob_alt
                              (F (pr1 x,, pr2 x) xx)) ;;2 
                         (ff ;;2 (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                    (idpath (pr1 y))
                                    (idpath (pr2 y))
                                    (! two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob_alt
                                         (F y yy)) ;;2 
                                  idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                    (idpath
                                       (pr1
                                          (functor_identity
                                             (category_binproduct
                                                C C)
                                             (pr1 y,,
                                              pr2 y))))
                                    (idpath
                                       (pr2
                                          (functor_identity
                                             (category_binproduct
                                                C C)
                                             (pr1 y,,
                                              pr2 y))))
                                    (maponpaths
                                       (F
                                          (pr1 y,,
                                           pr2 y))
                                       (two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob
                                          yy))))))))) =
ff

        
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C

  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso C)
  (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
     (disp_functor_over_pair F))
G:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x, y: category_binproduct C C
xx: twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁ x
yy: twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁ y
f: category_binproduct C C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[
# (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C)) f] 
F y yy
trf₂ (trf₂ (trf₂ (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                          (idpath
                             (pr1
                                (functor_identity
                                   (category_binproduct
                                      C C)
                                   (pr1 x,, pr2 x))))
                          (idpath
                             (pr2
                                (functor_identity
                                   (category_binproduct
                                      C C)
                                   (pr1 x,, pr2 x))))
                          (maponpaths
                             (F (pr1 x,, pr2 x))
                             (! two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob
                                  xx)) ;;2 (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                              (idpath
                                                 (pr1
                                                 x))
                                              (idpath
                                                 (pr2
                                                 x))
                                              (two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob_alt
                                                 (F
                                                 (pr1
                                                 x,,
                                                 pr2 x)
                                                 xx)) ;;2 
                                            (ff ;;2 
                                             (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                (idpath
                                                 (pr1
                                                 y))
                                                (idpath
                                                 (pr2
                                                 y))
                                                (! 
                                                 two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob_alt
                                                 (F y
                                                 yy)) ;;2 
                                              idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                (idpath
                                                 (pr1
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 (category_binproduct
                                                 C C)
                                                 (pr1
                                                 y,,
                                                 pr2 y))))
                                                (idpath
                                                 (pr2
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 (category_binproduct
                                                 C C)
                                                 (pr1
                                                 y,,
                                                 pr2 y))))
                                                (maponpaths
                                                 (F
                                                 (pr1
                                                 y,,
                                                 pr2 y))
                                                 (two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob
                                                 yy))))))))) =
ff

        
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso C)
  (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
     (disp_functor_over_pair F))
G:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x, y: category_binproduct C C
xx: twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁ x
yy: twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁ y
f: category_binproduct C C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[
# (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C)) f] 
F y yy
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp
        (idpath
           (pr1
              (functor_identity
                 (category_binproduct C C)
                 (pr1 x,, pr2 x))))
        (idpath
           (pr2
              (functor_identity
                 (category_binproduct C C)
                 (pr1 x,, pr2 x))))
        (maponpaths (F (pr1 x,, pr2 x))
           (! two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob xx)) ;;2 
      (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (pr1 x))
         (idpath (pr2 x))
         (two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob_alt
            (F (pr1 x,, pr2 x) xx)) ;;2 (ff ;;2 (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (pr1
                                                 y))
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (pr2
                                                 y))
                                                 (! 
                                                 two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob_alt
                                                 (F y
                                                 yy)) ;;2 
                                                 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (pr1
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 (category_binproduct
                                                 C C)
                                                 (pr1
                                                 y,,
                                                 pr2 y))))
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (pr2
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 (category_binproduct
                                                 C C)
                                                 (pr1
                                                 y,,
                                                 pr2 y))))
                                                 (maponpaths
                                                 (F
                                                 (pr1
                                                 y,,
                                                 pr2 y))
                                                 (two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob
                                                 yy)))))) =
ff

  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x, y: category_binproduct C C
xx: twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁ x
yy: twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁ y
f: category_binproduct C C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[
# (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C)) f] 
F y yy
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp
        (idpath
           (pr1
              (functor_identity
                 (category_binproduct C C)
                 (pr1 x,, pr2 x))))
        (idpath
           (pr2
              (functor_identity
                 (category_binproduct C C)
                 (pr1 x,, pr2 x))))
        (maponpaths (F (pr1 x,, pr2 x))
           (! two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob xx)) ;;2 
      (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (pr1 x))
         (idpath (pr2 x))
         (two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob_alt
            (F (pr1 x,, pr2 x) xx)) ;;2 (ff ;;2 (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                 (idpath

                                                 y))

                                                 (pr2

                                                 (maponpaths
                                                 (F
                                                 (pr1
                                                 y,,
                                                 pr2 y))
                                                 (two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob
                                                 yy)))))) =
?b

         (idpath (pr2 x))

            (F (pr1 x,, pr2 x) xx)) ;;2 (ff ;;2 (idtoiso_twosided_disp

D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))

     (disp_functor_over_pair F))

  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x, y: category_binproduct C C
xx: twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁ x
yy: twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁ y
f: category_binproduct C C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[
# (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C)) f] 
F y yy
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (pr1 y))
  (idpath (pr2 y))
  (! two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob_alt (F y yy)) ;;2 
idtoiso_twosided_disp
  (idpath
     (pr1
        (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C)
           (pr1 y,, pr2 y))))
  (idpath
     (pr2
        (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C)
           (pr1 y,, pr2 y))))
  (maponpaths (F (pr1 y,, pr2 y))
     (two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob yy)) = ?t2

          apply (idtoiso_twosided_disp_concat (D := D₂)).

  (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
     (disp_functor_over_pair F))
G:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x, y: category_binproduct C C
xx: twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁ x
yy: twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁ y
f: category_binproduct C C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[
# (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C)) f] 
F y yy
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp
        (idpath
           (pr1
              (functor_identity
                 (category_binproduct C C)
                 (pr1 x,, pr2 x))))
        (idpath
           (pr2
              (functor_identity
                 (category_binproduct C C)
                 (pr1 x,, pr2 x))))
        (maponpaths (F (pr1 x,, pr2 x))
           (! two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob xx)) ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (pr1 x))
        (idpath (pr2 x))
        (two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob_alt
           (F (pr1 x,, pr2 x) xx)) ;;2 ff ;;2 pr1
                                                (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (pr1
                                                 y))
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (pr2
                                                 y))
                                                 (! 
                                                 two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob_alt
                                                 (F y
                                                 yy) @
                                                 maponpaths
                                                 (F
                                                 (pr1
                                                 y,,
                                                 pr2 y))
                                                 (two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob
                                                 yy)))) =
ff

        
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)

     (disp_functor_over_pair F))

  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁

xx: twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁ x
yy: twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁ y
f: category_binproduct C C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[
# (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C)) f] 
F y yy
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp
        (idpath
           (pr1
              (functor_identity
                 (category_binproduct C C)
                 (pr1 x,, pr2 x))))
        (idpath
           (pr2
              (functor_identity
                 (category_binproduct C C)
                 (pr1 x,, pr2 x))))
        (maponpaths (F (pr1 x,, pr2 x))
           (! two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob xx)) ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (pr1 x))
        (idpath (pr2 x))
        (two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob_alt
           (F (pr1 x,, pr2 x) xx)) ;;2 ff ;;2 pr1
                                                (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (pr1
                                                 y))
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (pr2
                                                 y))
                                                 (! 
                                                 two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob_alt
                                                 (F y
                                                 yy) @
                                                 maponpaths
                                                 (F
                                                 (pr1
                                                 y,,
                                                 pr2 y))
                                                 (two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob
                                                 yy)))) =
?b

f: category_binproduct C C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[
# (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C)) f] 
F y yy
?b = ff

        (idpath

        (idpath

C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)

  (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
     (disp_functor_over_pair F))
G:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x, y: category_binproduct C C
xx: twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁ x
yy: twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁ y
f: category_binproduct C C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[
# (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C)) f] 
F y yy
idtoiso_twosided_disp
  (idpath
     (pr1
        (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C)
           (pr1 x,, pr2 x))))
  (idpath
     (pr2
        (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C)
           (pr1 x,, pr2 x))))
  (maponpaths (F (pr1 x,, pr2 x))
     (! two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob xx)) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (pr1
                                                 x))
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (pr2
                                                 x))
                                                 (two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob_alt
                                                 (F
                                                 (pr1
                                                 x,,
                                                 pr2 x)
                                                 xx)) ;;2 ff ;;2 
pr1
  (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (pr1 y))
     (idpath (pr2 y))
     (! two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob_alt (F y yy) @
      maponpaths (F (pr1 y,, pr2 y))
        (two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob yy))) = ?t2

D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)

  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x, y: category_binproduct C C
xx: twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁ x
yy: twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁ y
f: category_binproduct C C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[
# (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C)) f] 
F y yy
idtoiso_twosided_disp
  (idpath
     (pr1
        (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C)
           (pr1 x,, pr2 x))))
  (idpath
     (pr2
        (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C)
           (pr1 x,, pr2 x))))
  (maponpaths (F (pr1 x,, pr2 x))
     (! two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob xx)) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (pr1
                                                 x))
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (pr2
                                                 x))
                                                 (two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob_alt
                                                 (F
                                                 (pr1
                                                 x,,
                                                 pr2 x)
                                                 xx)) =
?y'

          apply (idtoiso_twosided_disp_concat (D := D₂)).

D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor

f: category_binproduct C C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[
# (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C)) f] 
F y yy
trf₂ (trb₂ pr1
             (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (pr1 x))
                (idpath (pr2 x))
                (maponpaths (F (pr1 x,, pr2 x))
                   (! two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob
                        xx) @
                 two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob_alt
                   (F (pr1 x,, pr2 x) xx))) ;;2 ff ;;2 
      pr1

           (idpath (pr2 y))
           (! two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob_alt
                (F y yy) @
            maponpaths (F (pr1 y,, pr2 y))
              (two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob yy)))) =
ff

  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso C)
  (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
     (disp_functor_over_pair F))
G:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x, y: category_binproduct C C
xx: twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁ x
yy: twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁ y
f: category_binproduct C C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: F x xx -->[
# (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C)) f] 
F y yy
?b = ff

F y yy
trf₂ (trb₂ (id_two_disp (F (pr1 x,, pr2 x) xx) ;;2 ff)) =
?b

D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C

y : twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂
      (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C) x),
F x (?g y) = y

      
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso C)
  (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
     (disp_functor_over_pair F))
G:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x: C × C
twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C) x)
→ twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁ x
 exact (λ xx, G _ _ xx).
      
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso C)
  (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
     (disp_functor_over_pair F))
G:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x: C × C
∏ x0 : twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁ x,
(λ xx : twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂
          (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C)
             x),
 G
   (pr1 (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C) x))
   (pr2 (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C) x))
   xx) (F x x0) = x0
 
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso C)
  (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
     (disp_functor_over_pair F))
G:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x: C × C
xx: twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁ x
G (pr1 x) (pr2 x) (F x xx) = xx

        apply two_sided_disp_cat_iso_path_ob.
      
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso C)
  (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
     (disp_functor_over_pair F))
G:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x: C × C
∏
y : twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂
      (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C) x),
F x
  ((λ xx : twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂
             (functor_identity
                (category_binproduct C C) x),
    G
      (pr1
         (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C) x))
      (pr2
         (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C) x))
      xx) y) = y
 
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso C)
  (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
     (disp_functor_over_pair F))
G:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x: C × C
xx: twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C) x)
F x (G (pr1 x) (pr2 x) xx) = xx

        
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso C)
  (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
     (disp_functor_over_pair F))
G:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x: C × C
xx: twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C) x)
p:= path_twosided_disp_functor_ob
  (z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF) xx: (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF ;; disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
                                 (disp_functor_over_pair
                                    F))%mor_disp
  (pr1
     (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C) x))
  (pr2
     (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C) x))
  xx =
transportb (mor_disp D₂ D₂)
  (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv (identity_z_iso C))
  (id_disp D₂)
  (pr1
     (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C) x))
  (pr2
     (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C) x))
  xx
F x (G (pr1 x) (pr2 x) xx) = xx

        
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso C)
  (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
     (disp_functor_over_pair F))
G:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x: C × C
xx: twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C) x)
p:= path_twosided_disp_functor_ob
  (z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF) xx: F (pr1 x,, pr2 x)
  (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF (pr1 x) (pr2 x) xx) =
transportb (mor_disp D₂ D₂)
  (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 C)))
  (twosided_disp_functor_identity D₂) (pr1 x)
  (pr2 x) xx
F x (G (pr1 x) (pr2 x) xx) = xx

        
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso C)
  (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
     (disp_functor_over_pair F))
G:= inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x: C × C
xx: twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C) x)
p:= path_twosided_disp_functor_ob
  (z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor HF) xx: F (pr1 x,, pr2 x)
  (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso HF (pr1 x) (pr2 x) xx) =
transportb (mor_disp D₂ D₂)
  (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 C)))
  (twosided_disp_functor_identity D₂) (pr1 x)
  (pr2 x) xx
transportb (mor_disp D₂ D₂)
  (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 C)))
  (twosided_disp_functor_identity D₂) (pr1 x) (pr2 x)
  xx = xx

        apply (transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                 (functor_identity _)).
    Qed.
  End FromIso.

  Section ToIso.
    Context (HF_ff : disp_functor_ff F)
            (HF_weq : ∏ (x : C × C), isweq (F x)).

    Let φ₀ : ∏ (x y : C), D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
      := λ x y, make_weq _ (HF_weq (x ,, y)).

    Let φ₁ : ∏ {x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C}
               (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁) (xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂)
               (f : x₁ --> x₂) (g : y₁ --> y₂),
             xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂ ≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
      := λ x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ xy₁ xy₂ f g,
         make_weq _ (HF_ff (x₁ ,, y₁) (x₂ ,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f ,, g)).

    
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
twosided_disp_functor_data (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁

    
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
twosided_disp_functor_data (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁

      
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
∏ x y : C,
D₂ x y
→ D₁ (functor_identity C x) (functor_identity C y)
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
(λ FGob : ∏ x y : C,
          D₂ x y
          → D₁ (functor_identity C x)
              (functor_identity C y),
 ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₂ x₁ y₁) 
 (xy₂ : D₂ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
 (g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
 xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
 → FGob x₁ y₁ xy₁ -->[ # (functor_identity C) f
   ][ # (functor_identity C) g] 
   FGob x₂ y₂ xy₂) ?pr1

      
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
∏ x y : C,
D₂ x y
→ D₁ (functor_identity C x) (functor_identity C y)
 exact (λ x y xy, invmap (φ₀ x y) xy).
      
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
(λ FGob : ∏ x y : C,
          D₂ x y
          → D₁ (functor_identity C x)
              (functor_identity C y),
 ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₂ x₁ y₁) (xy₂ : D₂ x₂ y₂)
 (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧) (g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
 xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
 → FGob x₁ y₁ xy₁ -->[ # (functor_identity C) f
   ][ # (functor_identity C) g] FGob x₂ y₂ xy₂)
  (λ (x y : C) (xy : D₂ x y), invmap (φ₀ x y) xy)
 exact (λ x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ xy₁ xy₂ f g fg,
               invmap
                 (φ₁ (invmap (φ₀ x₁ y₁) xy₁) (invmap (φ₀ x₂ y₂) xy₂) f g)
                 (transportf_disp_mor2
                    (id_right _ @ id_left _)
                    (id_right _ @ id_left _)
                    (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                       (idpath _) (idpath _)
                       (homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₁ y₁) _)
                     ;;2 fg
                     ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                           (idpath _) (idpath _)
                           (!(homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₂ y₂)) _)))).
    Defined.

    
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
twosided_disp_functor_laws (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
  to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv_data

    
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
twosided_disp_functor_laws (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
  to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv_data

      
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
twosided_disp_functor_id_law (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
  to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv_data
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
twosided_disp_functor_comp_law 
  (functor_identity C) (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
  to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv_data

      
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
twosided_disp_functor_id_law (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
  to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv_data
 
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
x, y: C
xy: D₂ x y
invmap
  (φ₁ (invmap (φ₀ x y) xy) (invmap (φ₀ x y) xy)
     (identity x) (identity y))
  (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x) (idpath y)
           (homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x y) xy) ;;2 id_two_disp
                                              xy ;;2 
         idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x) (idpath y)
           (! homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x y) xy))) =
id_two_disp (invmap (φ₀ x y) xy)

        
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
x, y: C
xy: D₂ x y
φ₁ (invmap (φ₀ x y) xy) (invmap (φ₀ x y) xy)
  (identity x) (identity y)
  (invmap
     (φ₁ (invmap (φ₀ x y) xy) (invmap (φ₀ x y) xy)
        (identity x) (identity y))
     (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x)
              (idpath y) (homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x y) xy) ;;2 
            id_two_disp xy ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                 (idpath x) (idpath y)
                                 (! homotweqinvweq
                                      (φ₀ x y) xy)))) =
φ₁ (invmap (φ₀ x y) xy) (invmap (φ₀ x y) xy)
  (identity x) (identity y)
  (id_two_disp (invmap (φ₀ x y) xy))

        
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
x, y: C
xy: D₂ x y
φ₁ (invmap (φ₀ x y) xy) (invmap (φ₀ x y) xy)
  (identity x) (identity y)
  (invmap
     (φ₁ (invmap (φ₀ x y) xy) (invmap (φ₀ x y) xy)
        (identity x) (identity y))
     (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x)
              (idpath y) (homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x y) xy) ;;2 
            id_two_disp xy ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                 (idpath x) (idpath y)
                                 (! homotweqinvweq
                                      (φ₀ x y) xy)))) =
?b
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
x, y: C
xy: D₂ x y
?b =
φ₁ (invmap (φ₀ x y) xy) 
  (invmap (φ₀ x y) xy) (identity x) 
  (identity y) (id_two_disp (invmap (φ₀ x y) xy))

        
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
x, y: C
xy: D₂ x y
φ₁ (invmap (φ₀ x y) xy) (invmap (φ₀ x y) xy)
  (identity x) (identity y)
  (invmap
     (φ₁ (invmap (φ₀ x y) xy) (invmap (φ₀ x y) xy)
        (identity x) (identity y))
     (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x)
              (idpath y) (homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x y) xy) ;;2 
            id_two_disp xy ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                 (idpath x) (idpath y)
                                 (! homotweqinvweq
                                      (φ₀ x y) xy)))) =
?b

          apply homotweqinvweq.
        
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
x, y: C
xy: D₂ x y
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x) (idpath y)
        (homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x y) xy) ;;2 id_two_disp
                                           xy ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x) (idpath y)
        (! homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x y) xy)) =
φ₁ (invmap (φ₀ x y) xy) (invmap (φ₀ x y) xy)
  (identity x) (identity y)
  (id_two_disp (invmap (φ₀ x y) xy))

        
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
x, y: C
xy: D₂ x y
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x) (idpath y)
        (homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x y) xy) ;;2 id_two_disp
                                           xy ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x) (idpath y)
        (! homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x y) xy)) =
(♯ F)%mor_disp (id_two_disp (invmap (φ₀ x y) xy))

F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))

trf₂ (trb₂ idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x) (idpath y)
             (homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x y) xy) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                (idpath
                                                 x)
                                                (idpath
                                                 y)
                                                (! 
                                                 homotweqinvweq
                                                 (φ₀ x
                                                 y) xy)) =
(♯ F)%mor_disp (id_two_disp (invmap (φ₀ x y) xy))

  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)

φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂

xy: D₂ x y
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x) (idpath y)
        (homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x y) xy) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                           (idpath x)
                                           (idpath y)
                                           (! homotweqinvweq
                                                (φ₀ x
                                                 y) xy)) =
?b
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
x, y: C
xy: D₂ x y
?b = (♯ F)%mor_disp (id_two_disp (invmap (φ₀ x y) xy))

        
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
