HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
x, y: C
xy: D₂ x y
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x) (idpath y)
        (homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x y) xy) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                           (idpath x)
                                           (idpath y)
                                           (! homotweqinvweq
                                                (φ₀ x
                                                 y) xy)) =
?b

          
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
x, y: C
xy: D₂ x y
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x) (idpath y)
  (homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x y) xy) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                     (idpath x)
                                     (idpath y)
                                     (! homotweqinvweq
                                          (φ₀ x y) xy) =
?t2

          apply (idtoiso_twosided_disp_concat (D := D₂)).
        
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
x, y: C
xy: D₂ x y
trf₂ (trb₂ pr1
             (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x)
                (idpath y)
                (homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x y) xy @
                 ! homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x y) xy))) =
(♯ F)%mor_disp (id_two_disp (invmap (φ₀ x y) xy))

        
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
x, y: C
xy: D₂ x y
trf₂ (trf₂ pr1
             (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x)
                (idpath y)
                (homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x y) xy @
                 ! homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x y) xy))) =
(♯ F)%mor_disp (id_two_disp (invmap (φ₀ x y) xy))

        
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
x, y: C
xy: D₂ x y
trf₂ pr1
       (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x) (idpath y)
          (homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x y) xy @
           ! homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x y) xy)) =
(♯ F)%mor_disp (id_two_disp (invmap (φ₀ x y) xy))

        
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
x, y: C
xy: D₂ x y
trf₂ pr1
       (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x) (idpath y)
          (idpath (F (x,, y) (invmap (φ₀ x y) xy)))) =
(♯ F)%mor_disp (id_two_disp (invmap (φ₀ x y) xy))

  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)

φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y

(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)

(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
x, y: C
xy: D₂ x y
trf₂ id_two_disp (F (x,, y) (invmap (φ₀ x y) xy)) =
(♯ F)%mor_disp (id_two_disp (invmap (φ₀ x y) xy))

  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)

φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
x, y: C
xy: D₂ x y
(♯ F)%mor_disp (id_two_disp (invmap (φ₀ x y) xy)) =
trf₂ id_two_disp (F (x,, y) (invmap (φ₀ x y) xy))

D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C

  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))

φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
x, y: C
xy: D₂ x y
(♯ F)%mor_disp (id_two_disp (invmap (φ₀ x y) xy)) = ?b
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
x, y: C
xy: D₂ x y
?b = trf₂ id_two_disp (F (x,, y) (invmap (φ₀ x y) xy))

        
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
x, y: C
xy: D₂ x y
(♯ F)%mor_disp (id_two_disp (invmap (φ₀ x y) xy)) = ?b

          exact (@disp_functor_id _ _ _ _ _ F (_ ,, _) (invmap (φ₀ x y) xy)).
        
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
x, y: C
xy: D₂ x y
transportb
  (mor_disp (F (x,, y) (invmap (φ₀ x y) xy))
     (F (x,, y) (invmap (φ₀ x y) xy)))
  (functor_id
     (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
     (x,, y))
  (id_disp (F (x,, y) (invmap (φ₀ x y) xy))) =
trf₂ id_two_disp (F (x,, y) (invmap (φ₀ x y) xy))

        
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
x, y: C
xy: D₂ x y
id_two_disp (F (x,, y) (invmap (φ₀ x y) xy)) =
trf₂ id_two_disp (F (x,, y) (invmap (φ₀ x y) xy))

        
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
x, y: C
xy: D₂ x y
trf₂ id_two_disp (F (x,, y) (invmap (φ₀ x y) xy)) =
id_two_disp (F (x,, y) (invmap (φ₀ x y) xy))

        apply transportf_disp_mor2_idpath.
      
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
twosided_disp_functor_comp_law (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
  to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv_data
 
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: C
xy₁: D₂ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₂ x₂ y₂
xy₃: D₂ x₃ y₃
f₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
fg₁: xy₁ -->[ f₁ ][ g₁] xy₂
f₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
fg₂: xy₂ -->[ f₂ ][ g₂] xy₃
(#2 to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv_data)
  (fg₁ ;;2 fg₂) =
trb₂ ((#2 to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv_data)
        fg₁ ;;2 (#2 to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv_data)
                  fg₂)

        
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: C
xy₁: D₂ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₂ x₂ y₂
xy₃: D₂ x₃ y₃
f₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
fg₁: xy₁ -->[ f₁ ][ g₁] xy₂
f₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
fg₂: xy₂ -->[ f₂ ][ g₂] xy₃
invmap
  (φ₁ (invmap (φ₀ x₁ y₁) xy₁) (invmap (φ₀ x₃ y₃) xy₃)
     (f₁ · f₂) (g₁ · g₂))
  (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁) (idpath y₁)
           (homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₁ y₁) xy₁) ;;2 (fg₁ ;;2 fg₂) ;;2 
         idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₃) (idpath y₃)
           (! homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₃ y₃) xy₃))) =
invmap
  (φ₁ (invmap (φ₀ x₁ y₁) xy₁) (invmap (φ₀ x₂ y₂) xy₂)
     f₁ g₁)
  (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁) (idpath y₁)
           (homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₁ y₁) xy₁) ;;2 fg₁ ;;2 
         idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₂) (idpath y₂)
           (! homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₂ y₂) xy₂))) ;;2 
invmap
  (φ₁ (invmap (φ₀ x₂ y₂) xy₂) (invmap (φ₀ x₃ y₃) xy₃)
     f₂ g₂)
  (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₂) (idpath y₂)
           (homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₂ y₂) xy₂) ;;2 fg₂ ;;2 
         idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₃) (idpath y₃)
           (! homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₃ y₃) xy₃)))

        
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: C
xy₁: D₂ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₂ x₂ y₂
xy₃: D₂ x₃ y₃
f₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
fg₁: xy₁ -->[ f₁ ][ g₁] xy₂
f₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
fg₂: xy₂ -->[ f₂ ][ g₂] xy₃
φ₁ (invmap (φ₀ x₁ y₁) xy₁) (invmap (φ₀ x₃ y₃) xy₃)
  (f₁ · f₂) (g₁ · g₂)
  (invmap
     (φ₁ (invmap (φ₀ x₁ y₁) xy₁)
        (invmap (φ₀ x₃ y₃) xy₃) (f₁ · f₂) (g₁ · g₂))
     (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁)
              (idpath y₁)
              (homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₁ y₁) xy₁) ;;2 
            (fg₁ ;;2 fg₂) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                (idpath x₃)
                                (idpath y₃)
                                (! homotweqinvweq
                                     (φ₀ x₃ y₃) xy₃)))) =
φ₁ (invmap (φ₀ x₁ y₁) xy₁) (invmap (φ₀ x₃ y₃) xy₃)
  (f₁ · f₂) (g₁ · g₂)
  (invmap
     (φ₁ (invmap (φ₀ x₁ y₁) xy₁)
        (invmap (φ₀ x₂ y₂) xy₂) f₁ g₁)
     (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁)
              (idpath y₁)
              (homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₁ y₁) xy₁) ;;2 fg₁ ;;2 
            idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₂)
              (idpath y₂)
              (! homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₂ y₂) xy₂))) ;;2 
   invmap
     (φ₁ (invmap (φ₀ x₂ y₂) xy₂)
        (invmap (φ₀ x₃ y₃) xy₃) f₂ g₂)
     (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₂)
              (idpath y₂)
              (homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₂ y₂) xy₂) ;;2 fg₂ ;;2 
            idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₃)
              (idpath y₃)
              (! homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₃ y₃) xy₃))))

        
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: C
xy₁: D₂ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₂ x₂ y₂
xy₃: D₂ x₃ y₃
f₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
fg₁: xy₁ -->[ f₁ ][ g₁] xy₂
f₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
fg₂: xy₂ -->[ f₂ ][ g₂] xy₃
φ₁ (invmap (φ₀ x₁ y₁) xy₁) (invmap (φ₀ x₃ y₃) xy₃)
  (f₁ · f₂) (g₁ · g₂)
  (invmap
     (φ₁ (invmap (φ₀ x₁ y₁) xy₁)
        (invmap (φ₀ x₃ y₃) xy₃) (f₁ · f₂) (g₁ · g₂))
     (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁)
              (idpath y₁)
              (homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₁ y₁) xy₁) ;;2 
            (fg₁ ;;2 fg₂) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                (idpath x₃)
                                (idpath y₃)
                                (! homotweqinvweq
                                     (φ₀ x₃ y₃) xy₃)))) =
?b
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: C
xy₁: D₂ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₂ x₂ y₂
xy₃: D₂ x₃ y₃
f₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
fg₁: xy₁ -->[ f₁ ][ g₁] xy₂
f₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
fg₂: xy₂ -->[ f₂ ][ g₂] xy₃
?b =
φ₁ (invmap (φ₀ x₁ y₁) xy₁) 
  (invmap (φ₀ x₃ y₃) xy₃) 
  (f₁ · f₂) (g₁ · g₂)
  (invmap
     (φ₁ (invmap (φ₀ x₁ y₁) xy₁)
        (invmap (φ₀ x₂ y₂) xy₂) f₁ g₁)
     (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp 
              (idpath x₁) 
              (idpath y₁)
              (homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₁ y₁) xy₁) ;;2 fg₁ ;;2 
            idtoiso_twosided_disp 
              (idpath x₂) 
              (idpath y₂)
              (! homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₂ y₂) xy₂))) ;;2 
   invmap
     (φ₁ (invmap (φ₀ x₂ y₂) xy₂)
        (invmap (φ₀ x₃ y₃) xy₃) f₂ g₂)
     (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp 
              (idpath x₂) 
              (idpath y₂)
              (homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₂ y₂) xy₂) ;;2 fg₂ ;;2 
            idtoiso_twosided_disp 
              (idpath x₃) 
              (idpath y₃)
              (! homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₃ y₃) xy₃))))

        
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: C
xy₁: D₂ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₂ x₂ y₂
xy₃: D₂ x₃ y₃
f₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
fg₁: xy₁ -->[ f₁ ][ g₁] xy₂
f₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
fg₂: xy₂ -->[ f₂ ][ g₂] xy₃
φ₁ (invmap (φ₀ x₁ y₁) xy₁) (invmap (φ₀ x₃ y₃) xy₃)
  (f₁ · f₂) (g₁ · g₂)
  (invmap
     (φ₁ (invmap (φ₀ x₁ y₁) xy₁)
        (invmap (φ₀ x₃ y₃) xy₃) (f₁ · f₂) (g₁ · g₂))
     (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁)
              (idpath y₁)
              (homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₁ y₁) xy₁) ;;2 
            (fg₁ ;;2 fg₂) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                (idpath x₃)
                                (idpath y₃)
                                (! homotweqinvweq
                                     (φ₀ x₃ y₃) xy₃)))) =
?b

          apply homotweqinvweq.
        
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: C
xy₁: D₂ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₂ x₂ y₂
xy₃: D₂ x₃ y₃
f₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
fg₁: xy₁ -->[ f₁ ][ g₁] xy₂
f₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
fg₂: xy₂ -->[ f₂ ][ g₂] xy₃
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁) (idpath y₁)
        (homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₁ y₁) xy₁) ;;2 (fg₁ ;;2 fg₂) ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₃) (idpath y₃)
        (! homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₃ y₃) xy₃)) =
φ₁ (invmap (φ₀ x₁ y₁) xy₁) (invmap (φ₀ x₃ y₃) xy₃)
  (f₁ · f₂) (g₁ · g₂)
  (invmap
     (φ₁ (invmap (φ₀ x₁ y₁) xy₁)
        (invmap (φ₀ x₂ y₂) xy₂) f₁ g₁)
     (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁)
              (idpath y₁)
              (homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₁ y₁) xy₁) ;;2 fg₁ ;;2 
            idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₂)
              (idpath y₂)
              (! homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₂ y₂) xy₂))) ;;2 
   invmap
     (φ₁ (invmap (φ₀ x₂ y₂) xy₂)
        (invmap (φ₀ x₃ y₃) xy₃) f₂ g₂)
     (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₂)
              (idpath y₂)
              (homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₂ y₂) xy₂) ;;2 fg₂ ;;2 
            idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₃)
              (idpath y₃)
              (! homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₃ y₃) xy₃))))

        
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: C
xy₁: D₂ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₂ x₂ y₂
xy₃: D₂ x₃ y₃
f₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
fg₁: xy₁ -->[ f₁ ][ g₁] xy₂
f₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
fg₂: xy₂ -->[ f₂ ][ g₂] xy₃
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁) (idpath y₁)
        (homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₁ y₁) xy₁) ;;2 (fg₁ ;;2 fg₂) ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₃) (idpath y₃)
        (! homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₃ y₃) xy₃)) =
(♯ F)%mor_disp
  (invmap
     (φ₁ (invmap (φ₀ x₁ y₁) xy₁)
        (invmap (φ₀ x₂ y₂) xy₂) f₁ g₁)
     (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁)
              (idpath y₁)
              (homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₁ y₁) xy₁) ;;2 fg₁ ;;2 
            idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₂)
              (idpath y₂)
              (! homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₂ y₂) xy₂))) ;;2 
   invmap
     (φ₁ (invmap (φ₀ x₂ y₂) xy₂)
        (invmap (φ₀ x₃ y₃) xy₃) f₂ g₂)
     (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₂)
              (idpath y₂)
              (homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₂ y₂) xy₂) ;;2 fg₂ ;;2 
            idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₃)
              (idpath y₃)
              (! homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₃ y₃) xy₃))))

        
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: C
xy₁: D₂ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₂ x₂ y₂
xy₃: D₂ x₃ y₃
f₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
fg₁: xy₁ -->[ f₁ ][ g₁] xy₂
f₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
fg₂: xy₂ -->[ f₂ ][ g₂] xy₃
(♯ F)%mor_disp
  (invmap
     (φ₁ (invmap (φ₀ x₁ y₁) xy₁)
        (invmap (φ₀ x₂ y₂) xy₂) f₁ g₁)
     (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁)
              (idpath y₁)
              (homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₁ y₁) xy₁) ;;2 fg₁ ;;2 
            idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₂)
              (idpath y₂)
              (! homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₂ y₂) xy₂))) ;;2 
   invmap
     (φ₁ (invmap (φ₀ x₂ y₂) xy₂)
        (invmap (φ₀ x₃ y₃) xy₃) f₂ g₂)
     (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₂)
              (idpath y₂)
              (homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₂ y₂) xy₂) ;;2 fg₂ ;;2 
            idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₃)
              (idpath y₃)
              (! homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₃ y₃) xy₃)))) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁) (idpath y₁)
        (homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₁ y₁) xy₁) ;;2 (fg₁ ;;2 fg₂) ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₃) (idpath y₃)
        (! homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₃ y₃) xy₃))

        
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: C
xy₁: D₂ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₂ x₂ y₂
xy₃: D₂ x₃ y₃
f₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
fg₁: xy₁ -->[ f₁ ][ g₁] xy₂
f₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
fg₂: xy₂ -->[ f₂ ][ g₂] xy₃
(♯ F)%mor_disp
  (invmap
     (φ₁ (invmap (φ₀ x₁ y₁) xy₁)
        (invmap (φ₀ x₂ y₂) xy₂) f₁ g₁)
     (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁)
              (idpath y₁)
              (homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₁ y₁) xy₁) ;;2 fg₁ ;;2 
            idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₂)
              (idpath y₂)
              (! homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₂ y₂) xy₂))) ;;2 
   invmap
     (φ₁ (invmap (φ₀ x₂ y₂) xy₂)
        (invmap (φ₀ x₃ y₃) xy₃) f₂ g₂)
     (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₂)
              (idpath y₂)
              (homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₂ y₂) xy₂) ;;2 fg₂ ;;2 
            idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₃)
              (idpath y₃)
              (! homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₃ y₃) xy₃)))) =
?b
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: C
xy₁: D₂ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₂ x₂ y₂
xy₃: D₂ x₃ y₃
f₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
fg₁: xy₁ -->[ f₁ ][ g₁] xy₂
f₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
fg₂: xy₂ -->[ f₂ ][ g₂] xy₃
?b =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp 
        (idpath x₁) (idpath y₁)
        (homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₁ y₁) xy₁) ;;2 
      (fg₁ ;;2 fg₂) ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp 
        (idpath x₃) (idpath y₃)
        (! homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₃ y₃) xy₃))

        
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: C
xy₁: D₂ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₂ x₂ y₂
xy₃: D₂ x₃ y₃
f₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
fg₁: xy₁ -->[ f₁ ][ g₁] xy₂
f₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
fg₂: xy₂ -->[ f₂ ][ g₂] xy₃
(♯ F)%mor_disp
  (invmap
     (φ₁ (invmap (φ₀ x₁ y₁) xy₁)
        (invmap (φ₀ x₂ y₂) xy₂) f₁ g₁)
     (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁)
              (idpath y₁)
              (homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₁ y₁) xy₁) ;;2 fg₁ ;;2 
            idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₂)
              (idpath y₂)
              (! homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₂ y₂) xy₂))) ;;2 
   invmap
     (φ₁ (invmap (φ₀ x₂ y₂) xy₂)
        (invmap (φ₀ x₃ y₃) xy₃) f₂ g₂)
     (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₂)
              (idpath y₂)
              (homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₂ y₂) xy₂) ;;2 fg₂ ;;2 
            idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₃)
              (idpath y₃)
              (! homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₃ y₃) xy₃)))) =
?b

          apply disp_functor_comp_two_disp.
        
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: C
xy₁: D₂ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₂ x₂ y₂
xy₃: D₂ x₃ y₃
f₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
fg₁: xy₁ -->[ f₁ ][ g₁] xy₂
f₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
fg₂: xy₂ -->[ f₂ ][ g₂] xy₃
(♯ F)%mor_disp
  (invmap
     (φ₁ (invmap (φ₀ x₁ y₁) xy₁)
        (invmap (φ₀ x₂ y₂) xy₂) f₁ g₁)
     (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁)
              (idpath y₁)
              (homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₁ y₁) xy₁) ;;2 fg₁ ;;2 
            idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₂)
              (idpath y₂)
              (! homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₂ y₂) xy₂)))) ;;2 
(♯ F)%mor_disp
  (invmap
     (φ₁ (invmap (φ₀ x₂ y₂) xy₂)
        (invmap (φ₀ x₃ y₃) xy₃) f₂ g₂)
     (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₂)
              (idpath y₂)
              (homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₂ y₂) xy₂) ;;2 fg₂ ;;2 
            idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₃)
              (idpath y₃)
              (! homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₃ y₃) xy₃)))) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁) (idpath y₁)
        (homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₁ y₁) xy₁) ;;2 (fg₁ ;;2 fg₂) ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₃) (idpath y₃)
        (! homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₃ y₃) xy₃))

        
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: C
xy₁: D₂ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₂ x₂ y₂
xy₃: D₂ x₃ y₃
f₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
fg₁: xy₁ -->[ f₁ ][ g₁] xy₂
f₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
fg₂: xy₂ -->[ f₂ ][ g₂] xy₃
(♯ F)%mor_disp
  (invmap
     (φ₁ (invmap (φ₀ x₁ y₁) xy₁)
        (invmap (φ₀ x₂ y₂) xy₂) f₁ g₁)
     (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁)
              (idpath y₁)
              (homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₁ y₁) xy₁) ;;2 fg₁ ;;2 
            idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₂)
              (idpath y₂)
              (! homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₂ y₂) xy₂)))) ;;2 
(♯ F)%mor_disp
  (invmap
     (φ₁ (invmap (φ₀ x₂ y₂) xy₂)
        (invmap (φ₀ x₃ y₃) xy₃) f₂ g₂)
     (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₂)
              (idpath y₂)
              (homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₂ y₂) xy₂) ;;2 fg₂ ;;2 
            idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₃)
              (idpath y₃)
              (! homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₃ y₃) xy₃)))) =
?b
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: C
xy₁: D₂ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₂ x₂ y₂
xy₃: D₂ x₃ y₃
f₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
fg₁: xy₁ -->[ f₁ ][ g₁] xy₂
f₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
fg₂: xy₂ -->[ f₂ ][ g₂] xy₃
?b =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp 
        (idpath x₁) (idpath y₁)
        (homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₁ y₁) xy₁) ;;2 
      (fg₁ ;;2 fg₂) ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp 
        (idpath x₃) (idpath y₃)
        (! homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₃ y₃) xy₃))

        
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: C
xy₁: D₂ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₂ x₂ y₂
xy₃: D₂ x₃ y₃
f₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
fg₁: xy₁ -->[ f₁ ][ g₁] xy₂
f₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
fg₂: xy₂ -->[ f₂ ][ g₂] xy₃
(♯ F)%mor_disp
  (invmap
     (φ₁ (invmap (φ₀ x₁ y₁) xy₁)
        (invmap (φ₀ x₂ y₂) xy₂) f₁ g₁)
     (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁)
              (idpath y₁)
              (homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₁ y₁) xy₁) ;;2 fg₁ ;;2 
            idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₂)
              (idpath y₂)
              (! homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₂ y₂) xy₂)))) ;;2 
(♯ F)%mor_disp
  (invmap
     (φ₁ (invmap (φ₀ x₂ y₂) xy₂)
        (invmap (φ₀ x₃ y₃) xy₃) f₂ g₂)
     (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₂)
              (idpath y₂)
              (homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₂ y₂) xy₂) ;;2 fg₂ ;;2 
            idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₃)
              (idpath y₃)
              (! homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₃ y₃) xy₃)))) =
?b

          
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: C
xy₁: D₂ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₂ x₂ y₂
xy₃: D₂ x₃ y₃
f₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
fg₁: xy₁ -->[ f₁ ][ g₁] xy₂
f₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
fg₂: xy₂ -->[ f₂ ][ g₂] xy₃
(♯ F)%mor_disp
  (invmap
     (φ₁ (invmap (φ₀ x₂ y₂) xy₂)
        (invmap (φ₀ x₃ y₃) xy₃) f₂ g₂)
     (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₂)
              (idpath y₂)
              (homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₂ y₂) xy₂) ;;2 fg₂ ;;2 
            idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₃)
              (idpath y₃)
              (! homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₃ y₃) xy₃)))) =
?t2

          apply (homotweqinvweq (φ₁ _ _ _ _)).
        
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: C
xy₁: D₂ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₂ x₂ y₂
xy₃: D₂ x₃ y₃
f₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
fg₁: xy₁ -->[ f₁ ][ g₁] xy₂
f₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
fg₂: xy₂ -->[ f₂ ][ g₂] xy₃
(♯ F)%mor_disp
  (invmap
     (φ₁ (invmap (φ₀ x₁ y₁) xy₁)
        (invmap (φ₀ x₂ y₂) xy₂) f₁ g₁)
     (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁)
              (idpath y₁)
              (homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₁ y₁) xy₁) ;;2 fg₁ ;;2 
            idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₂)
              (idpath y₂)
              (! homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₂ y₂) xy₂)))) ;;2 
(trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₂) (idpath y₂)
         (homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₂ y₂) xy₂) ;;2 fg₂ ;;2 
       idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₃) (idpath y₃)
         (! homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₃ y₃) xy₃))) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁) (idpath y₁)
        (homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₁ y₁) xy₁) ;;2 (fg₁ ;;2 fg₂) ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₃) (idpath y₃)
        (! homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₃ y₃) xy₃))

        
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: C
xy₁: D₂ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₂ x₂ y₂
xy₃: D₂ x₃ y₃
f₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
fg₁: xy₁ -->[ f₁ ][ g₁] xy₂
f₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
fg₂: xy₂ -->[ f₂ ][ g₂] xy₃
(♯ F)%mor_disp
  (invmap
     (φ₁ (invmap (φ₀ x₁ y₁) xy₁)
        (invmap (φ₀ x₂ y₂) xy₂) f₁ g₁)
     (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁)
              (idpath y₁)
              (homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₁ y₁) xy₁) ;;2 fg₁ ;;2 
            idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₂)
              (idpath y₂)
              (! homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₂ y₂) xy₂)))) ;;2 
(trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₂) (idpath y₂)
         (homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₂ y₂) xy₂) ;;2 fg₂ ;;2 
       idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₃) (idpath y₃)
         (! homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₃ y₃) xy₃))) = ?b
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: C
xy₁: D₂ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₂ x₂ y₂
xy₃: D₂ x₃ y₃
f₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
fg₁: xy₁ -->[ f₁ ][ g₁] xy₂
f₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
fg₂: xy₂ -->[ f₂ ][ g₂] xy₃
?b =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp 
        (idpath x₁) (idpath y₁)
        (homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₁ y₁) xy₁) ;;2 
      (fg₁ ;;2 fg₂) ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp 
        (idpath x₃) (idpath y₃)
        (! homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₃ y₃) xy₃))

        
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: C
xy₁: D₂ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₂ x₂ y₂
xy₃: D₂ x₃ y₃
f₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
fg₁: xy₁ -->[ f₁ ][ g₁] xy₂
f₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
fg₂: xy₂ -->[ f₂ ][ g₂] xy₃
(♯ F)%mor_disp
  (invmap
     (φ₁ (invmap (φ₀ x₁ y₁) xy₁)
        (invmap (φ₀ x₂ y₂) xy₂) f₁ g₁)
     (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁)
              (idpath y₁)
              (homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₁ y₁) xy₁) ;;2 fg₁ ;;2 
            idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₂)
              (idpath y₂)
              (! homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₂ y₂) xy₂)))) ;;2 
(trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₂) (idpath y₂)
         (homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₂ y₂) xy₂) ;;2 fg₂ ;;2 
       idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₃) (idpath y₃)
         (! homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₃ y₃) xy₃))) = ?b

          
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: C
xy₁: D₂ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₂ x₂ y₂
xy₃: D₂ x₃ y₃
f₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
fg₁: xy₁ -->[ f₁ ][ g₁] xy₂
f₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
fg₂: xy₂ -->[ f₂ ][ g₂] xy₃
(♯ F)%mor_disp
  (invmap
     (φ₁ (invmap (φ₀ x₁ y₁) xy₁)
        (invmap (φ₀ x₂ y₂) xy₂) f₁ g₁)
     (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁)
              (idpath y₁)
              (homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₁ y₁) xy₁) ;;2 fg₁ ;;2 
            idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₂)
              (idpath y₂)
              (! homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₂ y₂) xy₂)))) =
?y'

          apply (homotweqinvweq (φ₁ _ _ _ _)).
        
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: C
xy₁: D₂ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₂ x₂ y₂
xy₃: D₂ x₃ y₃
f₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
fg₁: xy₁ -->[ f₁ ][ g₁] xy₂
f₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
fg₂: xy₂ -->[ f₂ ][ g₂] xy₃
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁) (idpath y₁)
        (homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₁ y₁) xy₁) ;;2 fg₁ ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₂) (idpath y₂)
        (! homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₂ y₂) xy₂)) ;;2 (trf₂ 
                                                (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 x₂)
                                                 (idpath
                                                 y₂)
                                                 (homotweqinvweq
                                                 (φ₀
                                                 x₂ y₂)
                                                 xy₂) ;;2 fg₂ ;;2 
                                                 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 x₃)
                                                 (idpath
                                                 y₃)
                                                 (! 
                                                 homotweqinvweq
                                                 (φ₀
                                                 x₃ y₃)
                                                 xy₃))) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁) (idpath y₁)
        (homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₁ y₁) xy₁) ;;2 (fg₁ ;;2 fg₂) ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₃) (idpath y₃)
        (! homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₃ y₃) xy₃))

        
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: C
xy₁: D₂ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₂ x₂ y₂
xy₃: D₂ x₃ y₃
f₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
fg₁: xy₁ -->[ f₁ ][ g₁] xy₂
f₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
fg₂: xy₂ -->[ f₂ ][ g₂] xy₃
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁) (idpath y₁)
        (homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₁ y₁) xy₁) ;;2 fg₁ ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₂) (idpath y₂)
        (! homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₂ y₂) xy₂) ;;2 (trf₂ 
                                               (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 x₂)
                                                 (idpath
                                                 y₂)
                                                 (homotweqinvweq
                                                 (φ₀
                                                 x₂ y₂)
                                                 xy₂) ;;2 fg₂ ;;2 
                                                idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 x₃)
                                                 (idpath
                                                 y₃)
                                                 (! 
                                                 homotweqinvweq
                                                 (φ₀
                                                 x₃ y₃)
                                                 xy₃)))) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁) (idpath y₁)
        (homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₁ y₁) xy₁) ;;2 (fg₁ ;;2 fg₂) ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₃) (idpath y₃)
        (! homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₃ y₃) xy₃))

        
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: C
xy₁: D₂ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₂ x₂ y₂
xy₃: D₂ x₃ y₃
f₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
fg₁: xy₁ -->[ f₁ ][ g₁] xy₂
f₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
fg₂: xy₂ -->[ f₂ ][ g₂] xy₃
trf₂ (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁)
              (idpath y₁)
              (homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₁ y₁) xy₁) ;;2 fg₁ ;;2 
            idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₂)
              (idpath y₂)
              (! homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₂ y₂) xy₂) ;;2 
            (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₂)
               (idpath y₂)
               (homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₂ y₂) xy₂) ;;2 fg₂ ;;2 
             idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₃)
               (idpath y₃)
               (! homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₃ y₃) xy₃)))) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁) (idpath y₁)
        (homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₁ y₁) xy₁) ;;2 (fg₁ ;;2 fg₂) ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₃) (idpath y₃)
        (! homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₃ y₃) xy₃))

        
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: C
xy₁: D₂ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₂ x₂ y₂
xy₃: D₂ x₃ y₃
f₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
fg₁: xy₁ -->[ f₁ ][ g₁] xy₂
f₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
fg₂: xy₂ -->[ f₂ ][ g₂] xy₃
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁) (idpath y₁)
        (homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₁ y₁) xy₁) ;;2 fg₁ ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₂) (idpath y₂)
        (! homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₂ y₂) xy₂) ;;2 (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 x₂)
                                                 (idpath
                                                 y₂)
                                                 (homotweqinvweq
                                                 (φ₀
                                                 x₂ y₂)
                                                 xy₂) ;;2 fg₂ ;;2 
                                               idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 x₃)
                                                 (idpath
                                                 y₃)
                                                 (! 
                                                 homotweqinvweq
                                                 (φ₀
                                                 x₃ y₃)
                                                 xy₃))) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁) (idpath y₁)
        (homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₁ y₁) xy₁) ;;2 (fg₁ ;;2 fg₂) ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₃) (idpath y₃)
        (! homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₃ y₃) xy₃))

        
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: C
xy₁: D₂ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₂ x₂ y₂
xy₃: D₂ x₃ y₃
f₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
fg₁: xy₁ -->[ f₁ ][ g₁] xy₂
f₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
fg₂: xy₂ -->[ f₂ ][ g₂] xy₃
trf₂ (trf₂ (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁)
                    (idpath y₁)
                    (homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₁ y₁) xy₁) ;;2 
                  (fg₁ ;;2 (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                              (idpath x₂) (idpath y₂)
                              (! homotweqinvweq
                                   (φ₀ x₂ y₂) xy₂) ;;2 
                            (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                     (idpath x₂)
                                     (idpath y₂)
                                     (homotweqinvweq
                                        (φ₀ x₂ y₂) xy₂) ;;2 
                                   (fg₂ ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                              (idpath
                                                 x₃)
                                              (idpath
                                                 y₃)
                                              (! homotweqinvweq
                                                 (φ₀
                                                 x₃ y₃)
                                                 xy₃))))))))) =
trf₂ (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁)
              (idpath y₁)
              (homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₁ y₁) xy₁) ;;2 
            (trf₂ (fg₁ ;;2 (fg₂ ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                      (idpath x₃)
                                      (idpath y₃)
                                      (! homotweqinvweq
                                           (φ₀ x₃ y₃)
                                           xy₃))))))

        
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: C
xy₁: D₂ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₂ x₂ y₂
xy₃: D₂ x₃ y₃
f₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
fg₁: xy₁ -->[ f₁ ][ g₁] xy₂
f₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
fg₂: xy₂ -->[ f₂ ][ g₂] xy₃
trf₂ (trf₂ (trf₂ (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                          (idpath x₁) (idpath y₁)
                          (homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₁ y₁)
                             xy₁) ;;2 (fg₁ ;;2 (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 x₂)
                                                 (idpath
                                                 y₂)
                                                 (! 
                                                 homotweqinvweq
                                                 (φ₀
                                                 x₂ y₂)
                                                 xy₂) ;;2 
                                                (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 x₂)
                                                 (idpath
                                                 y₂)
                                                 (homotweqinvweq
                                                 (φ₀
                                                 x₂ y₂)
                                                 xy₂) ;;2 
                                                 (fg₂ ;;2 
                                                 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 x₃)
                                                 (idpath
                                                 y₃)
                                                 (! 
                                                 homotweqinvweq
                                                 (φ₀
                                                 x₃ y₃)
                                                 xy₃))))))))) =
trf₂ (trf₂ (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁)
                    (idpath y₁)
                    (homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₁ y₁) xy₁) ;;2 
                  (fg₁ ;;2 (fg₂ ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                      (idpath x₃)
                                      (idpath y₃)
                                      (! homotweqinvweq
                                           (φ₀ x₃ y₃)
                                           xy₃))))))

        
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: C
xy₁: D₂ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₂ x₂ y₂
xy₃: D₂ x₃ y₃
f₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
fg₁: xy₁ -->[ f₁ ][ g₁] xy₂
f₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
fg₂: xy₂ -->[ f₂ ][ g₂] xy₃
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁) (idpath y₁)
        (homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₁ y₁) xy₁) ;;2 (fg₁ ;;2 
                                             (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                (idpath
                                                 x₂)
                                                (idpath
                                                 y₂)
                                                (! 
                                                 homotweqinvweq
                                                 (φ₀
                                                 x₂ y₂)
                                                 xy₂) ;;2 
                                              (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 x₂)
                                                 (idpath
                                                 y₂)
                                                 (homotweqinvweq
                                                 (φ₀
                                                 x₂ y₂)
                                                 xy₂) ;;2 
                                               (fg₂ ;;2 
                                                idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 x₃)
                                                 (idpath
                                                 y₃)
                                                 (! 
                                                 homotweqinvweq
                                                 (φ₀
                                                 x₃ y₃)
                                                 xy₃)))))) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁) (idpath y₁)
        (homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₁ y₁) xy₁) ;;2 (fg₁ ;;2 
                                             (fg₂ ;;2 
                                              idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                (idpath
                                                 x₃)
                                                (idpath
                                                 y₃)
                                                (! 
                                                 homotweqinvweq
                                                 (φ₀
                                                 x₃ y₃)
                                                 xy₃))))

        
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: C
xy₁: D₂ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₂ x₂ y₂
xy₃: D₂ x₃ y₃
f₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
fg₁: xy₁ -->[ f₁ ][ g₁] xy₂
f₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
fg₂: xy₂ -->[ f₂ ][ g₂] xy₃
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁) (idpath y₁)
        (homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₁ y₁) xy₁) ;;2 (fg₁ ;;2 
                                             (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                (idpath
                                                 x₂)
                                                (idpath
                                                 y₂)
                                                (! 
                                                 homotweqinvweq
                                                 (φ₀
                                                 x₂ y₂)
                                                 xy₂) ;;2 
                                              (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 x₂)
                                                 (idpath
                                                 y₂)
                                                 (homotweqinvweq
                                                 (φ₀
                                                 x₂ y₂)
                                                 xy₂) ;;2 
                                               (fg₂ ;;2 
                                                idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 x₃)
                                                 (idpath
                                                 y₃)
                                                 (! 
                                                 homotweqinvweq
                                                 (φ₀
                                                 x₃ y₃)
                                                 xy₃)))))) =
?b
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: C
xy₁: D₂ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₂ x₂ y₂
xy₃: D₂ x₃ y₃
f₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
fg₁: xy₁ -->[ f₁ ][ g₁] xy₂
f₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
fg₂: xy₂ -->[ f₂ ][ g₂] xy₃
?b =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp 
        (idpath x₁) (idpath y₁)
        (homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₁ y₁) xy₁) ;;2 
      (fg₁ ;;2 (fg₂ ;;2 
                idtoiso_twosided_disp 
                  (idpath x₃) 
                  (idpath y₃)
                  (! homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₃ y₃) xy₃))))

        
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: C
xy₁: D₂ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₂ x₂ y₂
xy₃: D₂ x₃ y₃
f₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
fg₁: xy₁ -->[ f₁ ][ g₁] xy₂
f₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
fg₂: xy₂ -->[ f₂ ][ g₂] xy₃
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁) (idpath y₁)
        (homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₁ y₁) xy₁) ;;2 (fg₁ ;;2 
                                             (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                (idpath
                                                 x₂)
                                                (idpath
                                                 y₂)
                                                (! 
                                                 homotweqinvweq
                                                 (φ₀
                                                 x₂ y₂)
                                                 xy₂) ;;2 
                                              (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 x₂)
                                                 (idpath
                                                 y₂)
                                                 (homotweqinvweq
                                                 (φ₀
                                                 x₂ y₂)
                                                 xy₂) ;;2 
                                               (fg₂ ;;2 
                                                idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 x₃)
                                                 (idpath
                                                 y₃)
                                                 (! 
                                                 homotweqinvweq
                                                 (φ₀
                                                 x₃ y₃)
                                                 xy₃)))))) =
?b

          
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: C
xy₁: D₂ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₂ x₂ y₂
xy₃: D₂ x₃ y₃
f₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
fg₁: xy₁ -->[ f₁ ][ g₁] xy₂
f₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
fg₂: xy₂ -->[ f₂ ][ g₂] xy₃
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₂) (idpath y₂)
  (! homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₂ y₂) xy₂) ;;2 (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                           (idpath x₂)
                                           (idpath y₂)
                                           (homotweqinvweq
                                              (φ₀ x₂
                                                 y₂)
                                              xy₂) ;;2 
                                         (fg₂ ;;2 
                                          idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                            (idpath x₃)
                                            (idpath y₃)
                                            (! homotweqinvweq
                                                 (φ₀
                                                 x₃ y₃)
                                                 xy₃))) =
?t2

          
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: C
xy₁: D₂ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₂ x₂ y₂
xy₃: D₂ x₃ y₃
f₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
fg₁: xy₁ -->[ f₁ ][ g₁] xy₂
f₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
fg₂: xy₂ -->[ f₂ ][ g₂] xy₃
trb₂ (trb₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₂)
              (idpath y₂)
              (! homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₂ y₂) xy₂) ;;2 
            idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₂)
              (idpath y₂)
              (homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₂ y₂) xy₂) ;;2 fg₂ ;;2 
            idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₃)
              (idpath y₃)
              (! homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₃ y₃) xy₃))) =
?t2

          
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: C
xy₁: D₂ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₂ x₂ y₂
xy₃: D₂ x₃ y₃
f₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
fg₁: xy₁ -->[ f₁ ][ g₁] xy₂
f₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
fg₂: xy₂ -->[ f₂ ][ g₂] xy₃
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₂) (idpath y₂)
  (! homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₂ y₂) xy₂) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                          (idpath x₂)
                                          (idpath y₂)
                                          (homotweqinvweq
                                             (φ₀ x₂ y₂)
                                             xy₂) ;;2 fg₂ ;;2 
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₃) (idpath y₃)
  (! homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₃ y₃) xy₃) = ?t2

xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂

xy₃: D₂ x₃ y₃
f₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧

g₂: C ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧

                                          (idpath y₂)
                                          (homotweqinvweq
                                             (φ₀ x₂ y₂)
                                             xy₂) =
?y'

          apply (idtoiso_twosided_disp_concat (D := D₂)).

xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂

                                                 (idpath

                                                 x₂ y₂)

                                                 xy₂)) ;;2 fg₂ ;;2
