D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: C
xy₁: D₂ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₂ x₂ y₂
xy₃: D₂ x₃ y₃
f₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
fg₁: xy₁ -->[ f₁ ][ g₁] xy₂
f₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
fg₂: xy₂ -->[ f₂ ][ g₂] xy₃
trf₂ (trf₂ (trf₂ (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                          (idpath x₁) (idpath y₁)
                          (homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₁ y₁)
                             xy₁) ;;2 (fg₁ ;;2 (pr1
                                                 (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 x₂)
                                                 (idpath
                                                 y₂)
                                                 (idpath
                                                 xy₂)) ;;2 fg₂ ;;2 
                                                idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 x₃)
                                                 (idpath
                                                 y₃)
                                                 (! 
                                                 homotweqinvweq
                                                 (φ₀
                                                 x₃ y₃)
                                                 xy₃))))))) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁) (idpath y₁)
        (homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₁ y₁) xy₁) ;;2 (fg₁ ;;2 
                                             (fg₂ ;;2 
                                              idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                (idpath
                                                 x₃)
                                                (idpath
                                                 y₃)
                                                (! 
                                                 homotweqinvweq
                                                 (φ₀
                                                 x₃ y₃)
                                                 xy₃))))

        
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: C
xy₁: D₂ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₂ x₂ y₂
xy₃: D₂ x₃ y₃
f₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
fg₁: xy₁ -->[ f₁ ][ g₁] xy₂
f₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
fg₂: xy₂ -->[ f₂ ][ g₂] xy₃
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁) (idpath y₁)
        (homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₁ y₁) xy₁) ;;2 (fg₁ ;;2 
                                             (pr1
                                                (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 x₂)
                                                 (idpath
                                                 y₂)
                                                 (idpath
                                                 xy₂)) ;;2 fg₂ ;;2 
                                              idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                (idpath
                                                 x₃)
                                                (idpath
                                                 y₃)
                                                (! 
                                                 homotweqinvweq
                                                 (φ₀
                                                 x₃ y₃)
                                                 xy₃)))) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁) (idpath y₁)
        (homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₁ y₁) xy₁) ;;2 (fg₁ ;;2 
                                             (fg₂ ;;2 
                                              idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                (idpath
                                                 x₃)
                                                (idpath
                                                 y₃)
                                                (! 
                                                 homotweqinvweq
                                                 (φ₀
                                                 x₃ y₃)
                                                 xy₃))))

        
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: C
xy₁: D₂ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₂ x₂ y₂
xy₃: D₂ x₃ y₃
f₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
fg₁: xy₁ -->[ f₁ ][ g₁] xy₂
f₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
fg₂: xy₂ -->[ f₂ ][ g₂] xy₃
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁) (idpath y₁)
        (homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₁ y₁) xy₁) ;;2 (fg₁ ;;2 
                                             (pr1
                                                (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 x₂)
                                                 (idpath
                                                 y₂)
                                                 (idpath
                                                 xy₂)) ;;2 fg₂ ;;2 
                                              idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                (idpath
                                                 x₃)
                                                (idpath
                                                 y₃)
                                                (! 
                                                 homotweqinvweq
                                                 (φ₀
                                                 x₃ y₃)
                                                 xy₃)))) =
?b
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: C
xy₁: D₂ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₂ x₂ y₂
xy₃: D₂ x₃ y₃
f₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
fg₁: xy₁ -->[ f₁ ][ g₁] xy₂
f₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
fg₂: xy₂ -->[ f₂ ][ g₂] xy₃
?b =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp 
        (idpath x₁) (idpath y₁)
        (homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₁ y₁) xy₁) ;;2 
      (fg₁ ;;2 (fg₂ ;;2 
                idtoiso_twosided_disp 
                  (idpath x₃) 
                  (idpath y₃)
                  (! homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₃ y₃) xy₃))))

        
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: C
xy₁: D₂ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₂ x₂ y₂
xy₃: D₂ x₃ y₃
f₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
fg₁: xy₁ -->[ f₁ ][ g₁] xy₂
f₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
fg₂: xy₂ -->[ f₂ ][ g₂] xy₃
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁) (idpath y₁)
        (homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₁ y₁) xy₁) ;;2 (fg₁ ;;2 
                                             (pr1
                                                (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 x₂)
                                                 (idpath
                                                 y₂)
                                                 (idpath
                                                 xy₂)) ;;2 fg₂ ;;2 
                                              idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                (idpath
                                                 x₃)
                                                (idpath
                                                 y₃)
                                                (! 
                                                 homotweqinvweq
                                                 (φ₀
                                                 x₃ y₃)
                                                 xy₃)))) =
?b

          
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: C
xy₁: D₂ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₂ x₂ y₂
xy₃: D₂ x₃ y₃
f₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
fg₁: xy₁ -->[ f₁ ][ g₁] xy₂
f₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
fg₂: xy₂ -->[ f₂ ][ g₂] xy₃
pr1
  (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₂) (idpath y₂)
     (idpath xy₂)) ;;2 fg₂ ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                 (idpath x₃)
                                 (idpath y₃)
                                 (! homotweqinvweq
                                      (φ₀ x₃ y₃) xy₃) =
?t2

          
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: C
xy₁: D₂ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₂ x₂ y₂
xy₃: D₂ x₃ y₃
f₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
fg₁: xy₁ -->[ f₁ ][ g₁] xy₂
f₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
fg₂: xy₂ -->[ f₂ ][ g₂] xy₃
pr1
  (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₂) (idpath y₂)
     (idpath xy₂)) ;;2 fg₂ = ?y'

          apply id_two_disp_left.
        
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: C
xy₁: D₂ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₂ x₂ y₂
xy₃: D₂ x₃ y₃
f₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
fg₁: xy₁ -->[ f₁ ][ g₁] xy₂
f₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
fg₂: xy₂ -->[ f₂ ][ g₂] xy₃
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁) (idpath y₁)
        (homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₁ y₁) xy₁) ;;2 (fg₁ ;;2 
                                             (trb₂ fg₂ ;;2 
                                              idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                (idpath
                                                 x₃)
                                                (idpath
                                                 y₃)
                                                (! 
                                                 homotweqinvweq
                                                 (φ₀
                                                 x₃ y₃)
                                                 xy₃)))) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁) (idpath y₁)
        (homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₁ y₁) xy₁) ;;2 (fg₁ ;;2 
                                             (fg₂ ;;2 
                                              idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                (idpath
                                                 x₃)
                                                (idpath
                                                 y₃)
                                                (! 
                                                 homotweqinvweq
                                                 (φ₀
                                                 x₃ y₃)
                                                 xy₃))))

        
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: C
xy₁: D₂ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₂ x₂ y₂
xy₃: D₂ x₃ y₃
f₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
fg₁: xy₁ -->[ f₁ ][ g₁] xy₂
f₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
fg₂: xy₂ -->[ f₂ ][ g₂] xy₃
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁) (idpath y₁)
        (homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₁ y₁) xy₁) ;;2 (fg₁ ;;2 
                                             (trf₂ fg₂ ;;2 
                                              idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                (idpath
                                                 x₃)
                                                (idpath
                                                 y₃)
                                                (! 
                                                 homotweqinvweq
                                                 (φ₀
                                                 x₃ y₃)
                                                 xy₃)))) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁) (idpath y₁)
        (homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₁ y₁) xy₁) ;;2 (fg₁ ;;2 
                                             (fg₂ ;;2 
                                              idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                (idpath
                                                 x₃)
                                                (idpath
                                                 y₃)
                                                (! 
                                                 homotweqinvweq
                                                 (φ₀
                                                 x₃ y₃)
                                                 xy₃))))

        
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: C
xy₁: D₂ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₂ x₂ y₂
xy₃: D₂ x₃ y₃
f₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
fg₁: xy₁ -->[ f₁ ][ g₁] xy₂
f₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
fg₂: xy₂ -->[ f₂ ][ g₂] xy₃
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁) (idpath y₁)
        (homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₁ y₁) xy₁) ;;2 (fg₁ ;;2 
                                             (trf₂ 
                                              (fg₂ ;;2 
                                               idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 x₃)
                                                 (idpath
                                                 y₃)
                                                 (! 
                                                 homotweqinvweq
                                                 (φ₀
                                                 x₃ y₃)
                                                 xy₃))))) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁) (idpath y₁)
        (homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₁ y₁) xy₁) ;;2 (fg₁ ;;2 
                                             (fg₂ ;;2 
                                              idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                (idpath
                                                 x₃)
                                                (idpath
                                                 y₃)
                                                (! 
                                                 homotweqinvweq
                                                 (φ₀
                                                 x₃ y₃)
                                                 xy₃))))

        
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: C
xy₁: D₂ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₂ x₂ y₂
xy₃: D₂ x₃ y₃
f₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
fg₁: xy₁ -->[ f₁ ][ g₁] xy₂
f₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
fg₂: xy₂ -->[ f₂ ][ g₂] xy₃
trf₂ (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁)
              (idpath y₁)
              (homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₁ y₁) xy₁) ;;2 
            (fg₁ ;;2 (fg₂ ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                (idpath x₃)
                                (idpath y₃)
                                (! homotweqinvweq
                                     (φ₀ x₃ y₃) xy₃))))) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁) (idpath y₁)
        (homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₁ y₁) xy₁) ;;2 (fg₁ ;;2 
                                             (fg₂ ;;2 
                                              idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                (idpath
                                                 x₃)
                                                (idpath
                                                 y₃)
                                                (! 
                                                 homotweqinvweq
                                                 (φ₀
                                                 x₃ y₃)
                                                 xy₃))))

make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)

(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)

xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂

xy₁: D₂ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₂ x₂ y₂
xy₃: D₂ x₃ y₃
f₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
fg₁: xy₁ -->[ f₁ ][ g₁] xy₂
f₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧

        (homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₁ y₁) xy₁) ;;2 (fg₁ ;;2 
                                             (fg₂ ;;2 
                                              idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                (idpath
                                                 x₃)
                                                (idpath
                                                 y₃)
                                                (! 
                                                 homotweqinvweq
                                                 (φ₀
                                                 x₃ y₃)
                                                 xy₃)))) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁) (idpath y₁)
        (homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₁ y₁) xy₁) ;;2 (fg₁ ;;2 
                                             (fg₂ ;;2 
                                              idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                (idpath
                                                 x₃)

                                                 xy₃))))

        
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: C
xy₁: D₂ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₂ x₂ y₂
xy₃: D₂ x₃ y₃
f₁: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g₁: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
fg₁: xy₁ -->[ f₁ ][ g₁] xy₂
f₂: C ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
fg₂: xy₂ -->[ f₂ ][ g₂] xy₃
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁) (idpath y₁)
  (homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₁ y₁) xy₁) ;;2 (fg₁ ;;2 (fg₂ ;;2 
                                                idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 x₃)
                                                 (idpath
                                                 y₃)
                                                 (! 
                                                 homotweqinvweq
                                                 (φ₀
                                                 x₃ y₃)
                                                 xy₃))) =
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x₁) (idpath y₁)
  (homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x₁ y₁) xy₁) ;;2 (fg₁ ;;2 (fg₂ ;;2 
                                                idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 x₃)
                                                 (idpath
                                                 y₃)
                                                 (! 
                                                 homotweqinvweq
                                                 (φ₀
                                                 x₃ y₃)
                                                 xy₃)))

        apply idpath.
    Qed.

    
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁

F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)

φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁

      
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
twosided_disp_functor_data (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
(λ FG : twosided_disp_functor_data
          (functor_identity C) 
          (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁,
 twosided_disp_functor_laws 
   (functor_identity C) 
   (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁ FG) 
  ?pr1

      
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
twosided_disp_functor_data (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
 exact to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv_data.
      
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
(λ FG : twosided_disp_functor_data
          (functor_identity C) (functor_identity C) D₂
          D₁,
 twosided_disp_functor_laws (functor_identity C)
   (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁ FG)
  to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv_data
 exact to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv_laws.
    Defined.

    Let G := to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv.

    Local Arguments idtoiso_twosided_disp {_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _}.

    
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
G:= to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
is_disp_inverse (identity_z_iso C)
  (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
     (disp_functor_over_pair F)) G

    
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
G:= to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
is_disp_inverse (identity_z_iso C)
  (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
     (disp_functor_over_pair F)) G

      
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
G:= to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
(G ;; disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
        (disp_functor_over_pair F))%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp D₂ D₂) (pr2 (identity_z_iso C))
  (id_disp D₂)
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
G:= to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
(disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
   (disp_functor_over_pair F) ;; G)%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp D₁ D₁) 
  (pr1 (identity_z_iso C)) 
  (id_disp D₁)

      
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂

  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
(G ;; disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
        (disp_functor_over_pair F))%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp D₂ D₂) (pr2 (identity_z_iso C))
  (id_disp D₂)
 
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
G:= to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
∏ (x y : C) (xy : D₂ x y),
(G ;; disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
        (disp_functor_over_pair F))%mor_disp x y xy =
transportb (mor_disp D₂ D₂) (pr2 (identity_z_iso C))
  (id_disp D₂) x y xy
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
G:= to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
∏ (x₁ x₂ : C) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧) 
(y₁ y₂ : C) (g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧) 
(xy₁ : D₂ x₁ y₁) (xy₂ : D₂ x₂ y₂)
(fg : xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂),
(#2 (G ;; disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
            (disp_functor_over_pair F))%mor_disp) fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 
      (#2 (transportb (mor_disp D₂ D₂)
             (pr2 (identity_z_iso C)) 
             (id_disp D₂))) fg)

        
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
G:= to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
∏ (x y : C) (xy : D₂ x y),
(G ;; disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
        (disp_functor_over_pair F))%mor_disp x y xy =
transportb (mor_disp D₂ D₂) (pr2 (identity_z_iso C))
  (id_disp D₂) x y xy
 abstract
            (intros x y xy ; cbn ;
             refine (homotweqinvweq (φ₀ x y) _ @ _) ;
             refine (!_) ;
             apply (transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                      (functor_identity _))).
        
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
G:= to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
∏ (x₁ x₂ : C) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧) (y₁ y₂ : C)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧) (xy₁ : D₂ x₁ y₁) (xy₂ : D₂ x₂ y₂)
(fg : xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂),
(#2 (G ;; disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
            (disp_functor_over_pair F))%mor_disp) fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 (#2 (transportb
                                       (mor_disp D₂ D₂)
                                       (pr2
                                          (identity_z_iso
                                             C))
                                       (id_disp D₂)))
                                  fg)
 
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
G:= to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₂ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₂ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
(#2 (G ;; disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
            (disp_functor_over_pair F))%mor_disp) fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 (#2 (transportb
                                       (mor_disp D₂ D₂)
                                       (pr2
                                          (identity_z_iso
                                             C))
                                       (id_disp D₂)))
                                  fg)

          
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
G:= to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₂ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₂ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
(♯ F)%mor_disp
  (invmap
     (φ₁ (invmap (φ₀ x₁ y₁) xy₁)
        (invmap (φ₀ x₂ y₂) xy₂) f g)
     (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp))) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 (#2 (transportb
                                       (mor_disp D₂ D₂)
                                       (id_left
                                          (functor_identity
                                             (pr1 C)))
                                       (twosided_disp_functor_identity
                                          D₂))) fg)

          
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
G:= to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₂ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₂ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
(♯ F)%mor_disp
  (invmap
     (φ₁ (invmap (φ₀ x₁ y₁) xy₁)
        (invmap (φ₀ x₂ y₂) xy₂) f g)
     (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp))) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp =
?b
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
G:= to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₂ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₂ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
?b =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 
      (#2 (transportb (mor_disp D₂ D₂)
             (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 C)))
             (twosided_disp_functor_identity D₂))) fg)

          
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
G:= to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₂ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₂ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
(♯ F)%mor_disp
  (invmap
     (φ₁ (invmap (φ₀ x₁ y₁) xy₁)
        (invmap (φ₀ x₂ y₂) xy₂) f g)
     (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp))) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp =
?b

            
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
G:= to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₂ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₂ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
(♯ F)%mor_disp
  (invmap
     (φ₁ (invmap (φ₀ x₁ y₁) xy₁)
        (invmap (φ₀ x₂ y₂) xy₂) f g)
     (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp))) =
?y'

            apply (homotweqinvweq (φ₁ (invmap (φ₀ x₁ y₁) xy₁) (invmap (φ₀ x₂ y₂) xy₂) f g)).
          
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
G:= to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₂ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₂ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 (#2 (transportb
                                       (mor_disp D₂ D₂)
                                       (id_left
                                          (functor_identity
                                             (pr1 C)))
                                       (twosided_disp_functor_identity
                                          D₂))) fg)

  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)

φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),

  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)

xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂

  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁

f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₂ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₂ x₂ y₂

F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)

φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
G:= to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₂ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₂ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ (trf₂ (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 (fg ;;2 
                                             (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp))))) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 (#2 (transportb
                                       (mor_disp D₂ D₂)
                                       (id_left
                                          (functor_identity
                                             (pr1 C)))
                                       (twosided_disp_functor_identity
                                          D₂))) fg)

xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂

D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)

HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
G:= to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₂ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₂ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp = ?t2

            apply (idtoiso_twosided_disp_concat (D := D₂)).
          
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
G:= to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₂ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₂ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 (fg ;;2 (trb₂ pr1
                                                idtoiso_twosided_disp))) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 (#2 (transportb
                                       (mor_disp D₂ D₂)
                                       (id_left
                                          (functor_identity
                                             (pr1 C)))
                                       (twosided_disp_functor_identity
                                          D₂))) fg)

  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)

HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),

  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
G:= to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₂ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₂ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂

                                                idtoiso_twosided_disp))) =

                                       (mor_disp D₂ D₂)
                                       (id_left

                                       (twosided_disp_functor_identity
                                          D₂))) fg)

xy₂: D₂ x₂ y₂

make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)

C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
G:= to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₂ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₂ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 (#2 (transportb
                                       (mor_disp D₂ D₂)
                                       (id_left
                                          (functor_identity
                                             (pr1 C)))
                                       (twosided_disp_functor_identity
                                          D₂))) fg) =
?b
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
G:= to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₂ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₂ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
?b =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 
      (fg ;;2 pr1 idtoiso_twosided_disp))

          
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
G:= to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₂ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₂ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 (#2 (transportb
                                       (mor_disp D₂ D₂)
                                       (id_left
                                          (functor_identity
                                             (pr1 C)))
                                       (twosided_disp_functor_identity
                                          D₂))) fg) =
?b

            
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
G:= to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₂ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₂ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
(#2 (transportb (mor_disp D₂ D₂)
       (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 C)))
       (twosided_disp_functor_identity D₂))) fg = 
?t2

            apply (transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_mor
                     (functor_identity _)).
          
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
G:= to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₂ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₂ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 
                                       (#2 (twosided_disp_functor_identity
                                              D₂)) fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp))) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 (fg ;;2 pr1
                                          idtoiso_twosided_disp))

          
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
G:= to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₂ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₂ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp))) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 (fg ;;2 pr1
                                          idtoiso_twosided_disp))

  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)

φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y

(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
G:= to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₂ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₂ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp))) =

                                          idtoiso_twosided_disp))

  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))

(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),

  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)

(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂

  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁

f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧

xy₂: D₂ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ (trb₂ (trb₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 fg) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp)) =

                                               idtoiso_twosided_disp))

xy₂: D₂ x₂ y₂

?b

D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)

φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)

xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂

  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁

xy₁: D₂ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₂ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
?b =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 fg ;;2 
      pr1 idtoiso_twosided_disp)

y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₂ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₂ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp =
?t2

            
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
G:= to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₂ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₂ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp = ?y'

            apply (idtoiso_twosided_disp_concat (D := D₂)).
          
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
G:= to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₂ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₂ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ (trb₂ pr1 idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 fg ;;2 pr1
                                         idtoiso_twosided_disp)

          
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
G:= to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₂ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₂ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ (trf₂ pr1 idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 fg ;;2 pr1
                                         idtoiso_twosided_disp)

          
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
G:= to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₂ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₂ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ (trf₂ (pr1 idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp)) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 fg ;;2 pr1
                                         idtoiso_twosided_disp)
