  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
G:= to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₂ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₂ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ (pr1 idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 fg ;;2 pr1
                                         idtoiso_twosided_disp)

          
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
G:= to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₂ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₂ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
pr1 idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp =
idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 fg ;;2 pr1
                                   idtoiso_twosided_disp

          use idtoiso_twosided_disp_triple_concat.
      
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
G:= to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
(disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
   (disp_functor_over_pair F) ;; G)%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp D₁ D₁) (pr1 (identity_z_iso C))
  (id_disp D₁)
 
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
G:= to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
∏ (x y : C) (xy : D₁ x y),
(disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
   (disp_functor_over_pair F) ;; G)%mor_disp x y xy =
transportb (mor_disp D₁ D₁) (pr1 (identity_z_iso C))
  (id_disp D₁) x y xy
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
G:= to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
∏ (x₁ x₂ : C) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧) 
(y₁ y₂ : C) (g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧) 
(xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁) (xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂)
(fg : xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂),
(#2 (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
       (disp_functor_over_pair F) ;; G)%mor_disp) fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 
      (#2 (transportb (mor_disp D₁ D₁)
             (pr1 (identity_z_iso C)) 
             (id_disp D₁))) fg)

        
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
G:= to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
∏ (x y : C) (xy : D₁ x y),
(disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
   (disp_functor_over_pair F) ;; G)%mor_disp x y xy =
transportb (mor_disp D₁ D₁) (pr1 (identity_z_iso C))
  (id_disp D₁) x y xy
 
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
G:= to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x, y: C
xy: D₁ x y
invmap (φ₀ x y) (F (x,, y) xy) =
transportb (mor_disp D₁ D₁)
  (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 C)))
  (twosided_disp_functor_identity D₁) x y xy

          
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
G:= to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x, y: C
xy: D₁ x y
xy =
transportb (mor_disp D₁ D₁)
  (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 C)))
  (twosided_disp_functor_identity D₁) x y xy

          
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
G:= to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x, y: C
xy: D₁ x y
transportb (mor_disp D₁ D₁)
  (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 C)))
  (twosided_disp_functor_identity D₁) x y xy = xy

          apply (transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_ob
                   (functor_identity _)).
        
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
G:= to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
∏ (x₁ x₂ : C) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧) (y₁ y₂ : C)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁) (xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂)
(fg : xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂),
(#2 (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
       (disp_functor_over_pair F) ;; G)%mor_disp) fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 (#2 (transportb
                                       (mor_disp D₁ D₁)
                                       (pr1
                                          (identity_z_iso
                                             C))
                                       (id_disp D₁)))
                                  fg)
 
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
G:= to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
(#2 (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
       (disp_functor_over_pair F) ;; G)%mor_disp) fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 (#2 (transportb
                                       (mor_disp D₁ D₁)
                                       (pr1
                                          (identity_z_iso
                                             C))
                                       (id_disp D₁)))
                                  fg)

          
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
G:= to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
φ₁
  ((disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
      (disp_functor_over_pair F) ;; G)%mor_disp x₁ y₁
     xy₁)
  (transportb (mor_disp D₁ D₁)
     (pr1 (identity_z_iso C)) (id_disp D₁) x₂ y₂ xy₂)
  (# (identity_z_iso C
      · inv_from_z_iso (identity_z_iso C)) f
   · idtoiso
       (idpath
          ((identity_z_iso C
            · inv_from_z_iso (identity_z_iso C)) x₂)))
  (# (identity_z_iso C
      · inv_from_z_iso (identity_z_iso C)) g
   · idtoiso
       (idpath
          ((identity_z_iso C
            · inv_from_z_iso (identity_z_iso C)) y₂)))
  ((#2 (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
          (disp_functor_over_pair F) ;; G)%mor_disp)
     fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp) =
φ₁
  ((disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
      (disp_functor_over_pair F) ;; G)%mor_disp x₁ y₁
     xy₁)
  (transportb (mor_disp D₁ D₁)
     (pr1 (identity_z_iso C)) (id_disp D₁) x₂ y₂ xy₂)
  (# (identity_z_iso C
      · inv_from_z_iso (identity_z_iso C)) f
   · idtoiso
       (idpath
          ((identity_z_iso C
            · inv_from_z_iso (identity_z_iso C)) x₂)))
  (# (identity_z_iso C
      · inv_from_z_iso (identity_z_iso C)) g
   · idtoiso
       (idpath
          ((identity_z_iso C
            · inv_from_z_iso (identity_z_iso C)) y₂)))
  (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 (#2 (transportb
                                          (mor_disp D₁
                                             D₁)
                                          (pr1
                                             (identity_z_iso
                                                C))
                                          (id_disp D₁)))
                                     fg))

          
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
G:= to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
(♯ F)%mor_disp
  (invmap
     (φ₁ (invmap (φ₀ x₁ y₁) (F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁))
        (invmap (φ₀ x₂ y₂) (F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂)) f g)
     (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 (♯ F)%mor_disp
                                        fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp)) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp) =
(♯ F)%mor_disp
  (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 (#2 (transportb
                                          (mor_disp D₁
                                             D₁)
                                          (id_left
                                             (functor_identity
                                                (pr1 C)))
                                          (twosided_disp_functor_identity
                                             D₁))) fg))

          
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
G:= to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
(♯ F)%mor_disp
  (invmap
     (φ₁ (invmap (φ₀ x₁ y₁) (F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁))
        (invmap (φ₀ x₂ y₂) (F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂)) f g)
     (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 (♯ F)%mor_disp
                                        fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp)) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp) =
trf₂ (♯ F)%mor_disp
       (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 (#2 (transportb
                                         (mor_disp D₁
                                            D₁)
                                         (id_left
                                            (functor_identity
                                               (pr1 C)))
                                         (twosided_disp_functor_identity
                                            D₁))) fg)

          
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
G:= to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
(♯ F)%mor_disp
  (invmap
     (φ₁ (invmap (φ₀ x₁ y₁) (F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁))
        (invmap (φ₀ x₂ y₂) (F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂)) f g)
     (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 (♯ F)%mor_disp
                                        fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp)) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp) =
?b
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
G:= to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
?b =
trf₂ (♯ F)%mor_disp
       (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 
        (#2 (transportb 
               (mor_disp D₁ D₁)
               (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 C)))
               (twosided_disp_functor_identity D₁)))
          fg)

          
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
G:= to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
(♯ F)%mor_disp
  (invmap
     (φ₁ (invmap (φ₀ x₁ y₁) (F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁))
        (invmap (φ₀ x₂ y₂) (F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂)) f g)
     (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 (♯ F)%mor_disp
                                        fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp)) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp) =
?b

            apply disp_functor_comp_two_disp.
          
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
G:= to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
(♯ F)%mor_disp
  (invmap
     (φ₁ (invmap (φ₀ x₁ y₁) (F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁))
        (invmap (φ₀ x₂ y₂) (F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂)) f g)
     (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 (♯ F)%mor_disp
                                        fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp))) ;;2 
(♯ F)%mor_disp idtoiso_twosided_disp =
trf₂ (♯ F)%mor_disp
       (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 (#2 (transportb
                                         (mor_disp D₁
                                            D₁)
                                         (id_left
                                            (functor_identity
                                               (pr1 C)))
                                         (twosided_disp_functor_identity
                                            D₁))) fg)

          
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
G:= to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
(♯ F)%mor_disp
  (invmap
     (φ₁ (invmap (φ₀ x₁ y₁) (F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁))
        (invmap (φ₀ x₂ y₂) (F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂)) f g)
     (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 (♯ F)%mor_disp
                                        fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp))) ;;2 
(♯ F)%mor_disp idtoiso_twosided_disp = ?b
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
G:= to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
?b =
trf₂ (♯ F)%mor_disp
       (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 
        (#2 (transportb 
               (mor_disp D₁ D₁)
               (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 C)))
               (twosided_disp_functor_identity D₁)))
          fg)

          
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
G:= to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
(♯ F)%mor_disp
  (invmap
     (φ₁ (invmap (φ₀ x₁ y₁) (F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁))
        (invmap (φ₀ x₂ y₂) (F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂)) f g)
     (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 (♯ F)%mor_disp
                                        fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp))) ;;2 
(♯ F)%mor_disp idtoiso_twosided_disp = ?b

            
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
G:= to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
(♯ F)%mor_disp
  (invmap
     (φ₁ (invmap (φ₀ x₁ y₁) (F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁))
        (invmap (φ₀ x₂ y₂) (F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂)) f g)
     (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 (♯ F)%mor_disp
                                        fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp))) =
?y'

            apply (homotweqinvweq (φ₁ _ _ _ _)).
          
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
G:= to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 (♯ F)%mor_disp fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp) ;;2 
(♯ F)%mor_disp idtoiso_twosided_disp =
trf₂ (♯ F)%mor_disp
       (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 (#2 (transportb
                                         (mor_disp D₁
                                            D₁)
                                         (id_left
                                            (functor_identity
                                               (pr1 C)))
                                         (twosided_disp_functor_identity
                                            D₁))) fg)

  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)

xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂

  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧

xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂

  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F

φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)

xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂

  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁

xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂

xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂

trf₂ (♯ F)%mor_disp
       (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 (#2 (transportb
                                         (mor_disp D₁
                                            D₁)
                                         (id_left
                                            (functor_identity
                                               (pr1 C)))
                                         (twosided_disp_functor_identity
                                            D₁))) fg) =
?b

            
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
G:= to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
(♯ F)%mor_disp
  (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 (#2 (transportb
                                    (mor_disp D₁ D₁)
                                    (id_left
                                       (functor_identity
                                          (pr1 C)))
                                    (twosided_disp_functor_identity
                                       D₁))) fg) = 
?t2

            apply disp_functor_comp_two_disp.
          
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
G:= to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ ((♯ F)%mor_disp idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 (♯ F)%mor_disp
                                                 ((#2 
                                                 (transportb
                                                 (mor_disp
                                                 D₁ D₁)
                                                 (id_left
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 (pr1
                                                 C)))
                                                 (twosided_disp_functor_identity
                                                 D₁)))
                                                 fg)) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 (♯ F)%mor_disp fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp) ;;2 
(♯ F)%mor_disp idtoiso_twosided_disp

          
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
G:= to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ ((♯ F)%mor_disp idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 (♯ F)%mor_disp
                                                 ((#2 
                                                 (transportb
                                                 (mor_disp
                                                 D₁ D₁)
                                                 (id_left
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 (pr1
                                                 C)))
                                                 (twosided_disp_functor_identity
                                                 D₁)))
                                                 fg)) =
?b
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
G:= to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
?b =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 
      (♯ F)%mor_disp fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp) ;;2 
(♯ F)%mor_disp idtoiso_twosided_disp

          
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
G:= to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ ((♯ F)%mor_disp idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 (♯ F)%mor_disp
                                                 ((#2 
                                                 (transportb
                                                 (mor_disp
                                                 D₁ D₁)
                                                 (id_left
                                                 (functor_identity
                                                 (pr1
                                                 C)))
                                                 (twosided_disp_functor_identity
                                                 D₁)))
                                                 fg)) =
?b

            
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
G:= to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
(#2 (transportb (mor_disp D₁ D₁)
       (id_left (functor_identity (pr1 C)))
       (twosided_disp_functor_identity D₁))) fg = 
?t2

            apply (transportb_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat_mor
                     _
                     _ _
                     (id_left (C := cat_of_setcategory) (functor_identity C))).
          
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
G:= to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ ((♯ F)%mor_disp idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 (♯ F)%mor_disp
                                                 (trf₂ 
                                                 (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 
                                                 (#2 
                                                 (twosided_disp_functor_identity
                                                 D₁))
                                                 fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp))) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 (♯ F)%mor_disp fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp) ;;2 
(♯ F)%mor_disp idtoiso_twosided_disp

          
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
G:= to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ ((♯ F)%mor_disp idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 (♯ F)%mor_disp
                                                 (trf₂ 
                                                 (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp))) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 (♯ F)%mor_disp fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp) ;;2 
(♯ F)%mor_disp idtoiso_twosided_disp

F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂

  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ ((♯ F)%mor_disp idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 (trf₂ 
                                                (♯ F)%mor_disp
                                                 (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp))) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 (♯ F)%mor_disp fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp) ;;2 
(♯ F)%mor_disp idtoiso_twosided_disp

D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
G:= to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁

f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C

xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ ((♯ F)%mor_disp idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 (trf₂ 
                                                (♯ F)%mor_disp
                                                 (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp))) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 (♯ F)%mor_disp fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 
      (♯ F)%mor_disp idtoiso_twosided_disp)

          
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
G:= to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ (trf₂ ((♯ F)%mor_disp idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 
            (♯ F)%mor_disp
              (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp))) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 (♯ F)%mor_disp fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 
      (♯ F)%mor_disp idtoiso_twosided_disp)

          
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
G:= to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ ((♯ F)%mor_disp idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 (♯ F)%mor_disp
                                                 (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp)) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 (♯ F)%mor_disp fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 
      (♯ F)%mor_disp idtoiso_twosided_disp)

          
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
G:= to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ ((♯ F)%mor_disp idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 (♯ F)%mor_disp
                                                 (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp)) =
?b
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
G:= to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
?b =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 
      (♯ F)%mor_disp fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 
      (♯ F)%mor_disp idtoiso_twosided_disp)

  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))

  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)

HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
G:= to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ ((♯ F)%mor_disp idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 (♯ F)%mor_disp
                                                 (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp)) =
?b

  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F

φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
G:= to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
(♯ F)%mor_disp
  (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp) =
?t2

φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)

xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂

  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁

xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂

(♯ F)%mor_disp
  (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp) =

φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)

xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂

fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂

C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
G:= to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
(♯ F)%mor_disp
  (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp) =
?b

              apply disp_functor_comp_two_disp.
            
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
G:= to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
(♯ F)%mor_disp (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 fg) ;;2 
(♯ F)%mor_disp idtoiso_twosided_disp = ?t2

            
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
G:= to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
(♯ F)%mor_disp (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 fg) = ?y'

            apply disp_functor_comp_two_disp.
          
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
G:= to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ ((♯ F)%mor_disp idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 ((♯ F)%mor_disp
                                                 idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 
                                                (♯ F)%mor_disp
                                                 fg ;;2 
                                                (♯ F)%mor_disp
                                                 idtoiso_twosided_disp)) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 (♯ F)%mor_disp fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 
      (♯ F)%mor_disp idtoiso_twosided_disp)

          
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
G:= to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ ((♯ F)%mor_disp idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 ((♯ F)%mor_disp
                                                 idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 
                                                (♯ F)%mor_disp
                                                 fg ;;2 
                                                (♯ F)%mor_disp
                                                 idtoiso_twosided_disp)) =
?b
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
G:= to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
?b =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 
      (♯ F)%mor_disp fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 
      (♯ F)%mor_disp idtoiso_twosided_disp)

  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)

φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)

  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂

  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁

f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C

xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂

D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)

φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
G:= to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
(♯ F)%mor_disp idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 ((♯ F)%mor_disp
                                            idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 
                                          (♯ F)%mor_disp
                                            fg ;;2 
                                          (♯ F)%mor_disp
                                            idtoiso_twosided_disp) =
?t2

xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂

φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),

  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)

xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂

  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁

f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧

xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
?b = ?t2

  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)

C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
G:= to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
(♯ F)%mor_disp idtoiso_twosided_disp = ?y'

              apply disp_functor_idtoiso_twosided_disp.
            
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
G:= to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 ((♯ F)%mor_disp
                             idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 
                           (♯ F)%mor_disp fg ;;2 (♯ F)%mor_disp
                                                 idtoiso_twosided_disp) =
?t2

            
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
G:= to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
(♯ F)%mor_disp idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 (♯ F)%mor_disp
                                           fg ;;2 
(♯ F)%mor_disp idtoiso_twosided_disp = ?t2

            
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
G:= to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
(♯ F)%mor_disp idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 (♯ F)%mor_disp
                                           fg ;;2 
(♯ F)%mor_disp idtoiso_twosided_disp = ?b
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
G:= to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
?b = ?t2

C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
G:= to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 
                                 (♯ F)%mor_disp fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp)) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 (♯ F)%mor_disp fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 
      (♯ F)%mor_disp idtoiso_twosided_disp)

  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)

φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)

xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂

  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁

xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂

trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2

xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂

      (♯ F)%mor_disp idtoiso_twosided_disp) = ?b

φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)

xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂

  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁

f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C

xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂

  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))

φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
G:= to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
(♯ F)%mor_disp idtoiso_twosided_disp = ?t2

            apply disp_functor_idtoiso_twosided_disp.
          
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
G:= to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 (♯ F)%mor_disp fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 
                                 (♯ F)%mor_disp fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp))

          
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
G:= to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ (trf₂ (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 ((♯ F)%mor_disp
                                               fg ;;2 
                                             (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp))))) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 
                                 (♯ F)%mor_disp fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp))

φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y

  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁

xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂

φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂

  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁

f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 ((♯ F)%mor_disp fg ;;2 
                                 (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp))) =
?b
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)

HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
G:= to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
?b =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 
      (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 
       (♯ F)%mor_disp fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp))

φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)

  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)

xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂

xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂

φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)

make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)

xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂

  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁

f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧

xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp = ?t2

            apply (idtoiso_twosided_disp_concat (D := D₂)).

(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)

xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂

  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁

f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 ((♯ F)%mor_disp fg ;;2 
                                 (trb₂ pr1
                                         idtoiso_twosided_disp))) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 
                                 (♯ F)%mor_disp fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp))

F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
G:= to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 ((♯ F)%mor_disp fg ;;2 
                                 pr1
                                   idtoiso_twosided_disp)) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 
                                 (♯ F)%mor_disp fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp))

          
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
G:= to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 
                                 (♯ F)%mor_disp fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp)) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 ((♯ F)%mor_disp fg ;;2 
                                 pr1
                                   idtoiso_twosided_disp))

          
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
G:= to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ (trb₂ (trb₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 
                  (♯ F)%mor_disp fg) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp)) =
trf₂ (trb₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 (♯ F)%mor_disp
                                        fg ;;2 pr1
                                                 idtoiso_twosided_disp))

  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)

xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂

  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁

xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂

  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)

φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂

f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧

xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 
      (♯ F)%mor_disp fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp) =
?b

D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)

φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)

(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂

  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁

f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
