xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
?b =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 
      (♯ F)%mor_disp fg ;;2 
      pr1 idtoiso_twosided_disp)

(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂

xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂

φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂

f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧

xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 
(♯ F)%mor_disp fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp = ?t2

  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)

xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂

xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp = ?y'

            apply (idtoiso_twosided_disp_concat (D := D₂)).
          
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
G:= to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ (trb₂ pr1 idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 (♯ F)%mor_disp
                                           fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 (♯ F)%mor_disp fg ;;2 
      pr1 idtoiso_twosided_disp)

          
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
G:= to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ (trf₂ pr1 idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 (♯ F)%mor_disp
                                           fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 (♯ F)%mor_disp fg ;;2 
      pr1 idtoiso_twosided_disp)

          
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
G:= to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ (trf₂ (pr1 idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 (♯ F)%mor_disp
                                            fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp)) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 (♯ F)%mor_disp fg ;;2 
      pr1 idtoiso_twosided_disp)

          
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
G:= to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
trf₂ (pr1 idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 (♯ F)%mor_disp fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 (♯ F)%mor_disp fg ;;2 
      pr1 idtoiso_twosided_disp)

          
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
G:= to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
x₁, x₂: C
f: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C
g: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
xy₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
fg: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
pr1 idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 (♯ F)%mor_disp fg ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp =
idtoiso_twosided_disp ;;2 (♯ F)%mor_disp fg ;;2 pr1
                                                 idtoiso_twosided_disp

          use idtoiso_twosided_disp_triple_concat.
    Qed.

    
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
G:= to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso C)
  (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
     (disp_functor_over_pair F))

    
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
G:= to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso C)
  (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
     (disp_functor_over_pair F))

      
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
G:= to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
D₂ -->[ inv_from_z_iso (identity_z_iso C)] D₁
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
G:= to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
(λ gg : D₂ -->[ inv_from_z_iso (identity_z_iso C)] D₁,
 is_disp_inverse (identity_z_iso C)
   (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
      (disp_functor_over_pair F)) gg) 
  ?pr1

      
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
G:= to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
D₂ -->[ inv_from_z_iso (identity_z_iso C)] D₁
 exact G.
      
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
φ₀:= λ x y : C, make_weq (F (x,, y)) (HF_weq (x,, y)): ∏ x y : C, D₁ x y ≃ D₂ x y
φ₁:= λ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
make_weq
  (λ ff : xy₁ -->[ f,, g] xy₂, (♯ F)%mor_disp ff)
  (HF_ff (x₁,, y₁) (x₂,, y₂) xy₁ xy₂ (f,, g)): ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (xy₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁)
(xy₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (f : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧),
xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
≃ F (x₁,, y₁) xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] F (x₂,, y₂) xy₂
G:= to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_inv: twosided_disp_functor (functor_identity C)
  (functor_identity C) D₂ D₁
(λ gg : D₂ -->[ inv_from_z_iso (identity_z_iso C)] D₁,
 is_disp_inverse (identity_z_iso C)
   (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
      (disp_functor_over_pair F)) gg) G
 exact to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_laws.
    Defined.
  End ToIso.

  
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
(∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)) × disp_functor_ff F
≃ is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso C)
    (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
       (disp_functor_over_pair F))

  
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
(∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)) × disp_functor_ff F
≃ is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso C)
    (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
       (disp_functor_over_pair F))

    
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
(∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)) × disp_functor_ff F
→ is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso C)
    (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
       (disp_functor_over_pair F))
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso C)
  (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
     (disp_functor_over_pair F))
→ (∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)) × disp_functor_ff F
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
isaprop
  ((∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)) × disp_functor_ff F)
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
isaprop
  (is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso C)
     (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
        (disp_functor_over_pair F)))

    
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
(∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)) × disp_functor_ff F
→ is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso C)
    (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
       (disp_functor_over_pair F))
 
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF: (∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)) × disp_functor_ff F
is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso C)
  (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
     (disp_functor_over_pair F))

      
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF_weq: ∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
HF_ff: disp_functor_ff F
is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso C)
  (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
     (disp_functor_over_pair F))

      exact (to_is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat HF_ff HF_weq).
    
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso C)
  (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
     (disp_functor_over_pair F))
→ (∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)) × disp_functor_ff F
 
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso C)
  (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
     (disp_functor_over_pair F))
(∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)) × disp_functor_ff F

      
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso C)
  (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
     (disp_functor_over_pair F))
∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso C)
  (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
     (disp_functor_over_pair F))
disp_functor_ff F

      
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso C)
  (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
     (disp_functor_over_pair F))
∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)
 exact (is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_to_ob_weq HF).
      
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
HF: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso C)
  (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
     (disp_functor_over_pair F))
disp_functor_ff F
 exact (is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_to_ff HF).
    
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
isaprop
  ((∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x)) × disp_functor_ff F)
 
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
isaprop (∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x))
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
isaprop (disp_functor_ff F)

      
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
isaprop (∏ x : C × C, isweq (F x))
 
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
t: C × C
isofhlevel 1 ((λ t : C × C, isweq (F t)) t)

        apply isapropisweq.
      
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
isaprop (disp_functor_ff F)
 apply isaprop_disp_functor_ff.
    
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂)
isaprop
  (is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso C)
     (disp_functor_to_two_sided_disp_functor
        (disp_functor_over_pair F)))
 apply isaprop_is_z_iso_disp.
  Qed.
End StrictTwosidedDispCatIso.

(** ** 5.2. The actual proof of univalence *)

is_univalent_disp disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat


is_univalent_disp disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat

  
is_univalent_in_fibers
  disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat

  
C: cat_of_setcategory
D₁, D₂: disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat C
isweq (λ e : D₁ = D₂, idtoiso_fiber_disp e)

  
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
isweq (λ e : D₁ = D₂, idtoiso_fiber_disp e)

  
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
D₁ = D₂ ≃ z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso C) D₁ D₂
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
?w ~ (λ e : D₁ = D₂, idtoiso_fiber_disp e)

  
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
D₁ = D₂ ≃ z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso C) D₁ D₂
 
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
pr1 D₁ = pr1 D₂ ≃ z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso C) D₁ D₂

    
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
two_sided_disp_cat_weq_disp_cat C C D₁ =
two_sided_disp_cat_weq_disp_cat C C D₂
≃ z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso C) D₁ D₂

    
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
(∑
 F : disp_functor
       (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
       (two_sided_disp_cat_weq_disp_cat C C D₁)
       (two_sided_disp_cat_weq_disp_cat C C D₂),
 (∏ x : category_binproduct C C, isweq (F x))
 × disp_functor_ff F)
≃ z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso C) D₁ D₂

    
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (two_sided_disp_cat_weq_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (two_sided_disp_cat_weq_disp_cat C C D₂)
≃ D₁ -->[ identity_z_iso C] D₂
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
∏
x : disp_functor
      (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
      (two_sided_disp_cat_weq_disp_cat C C D₁)
      (two_sided_disp_cat_weq_disp_cat C C D₂),
(λ x0 : disp_functor
          (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
          (two_sided_disp_cat_weq_disp_cat C C D₁)
          (two_sided_disp_cat_weq_disp_cat C C D₂),
 (∏ x1 : category_binproduct C C, isweq (x0 x1))
 × disp_functor_ff x0) x
≃ is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso C) (?f x)

    
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (two_sided_disp_cat_weq_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (two_sided_disp_cat_weq_disp_cat C C D₂)
≃ D₁ -->[ identity_z_iso C] D₂
 exact (invweq
               (two_sided_disp_functor_weq_disp_functor
                  (functor_identity C)
                  (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂)
             ∘ disp_functor_over_pair_weq _ _)%weq.
    
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
∏
x : disp_functor
      (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
      (two_sided_disp_cat_weq_disp_cat C C D₁)
      (two_sided_disp_cat_weq_disp_cat C C D₂),
(λ x0 : disp_functor
          (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
          (two_sided_disp_cat_weq_disp_cat C C D₁)
          (two_sided_disp_cat_weq_disp_cat C C D₂),
 (∏ x1 : category_binproduct C C, isweq (x0 x1))
 × disp_functor_ff x0) x
≃ is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso C)
    ((invweq
        (two_sided_disp_functor_weq_disp_functor
           (functor_identity C) (functor_identity C)
           D₁ D₂)
      ∘ disp_functor_over_pair_weq
          (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
          (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂))%weq
       x)
 
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
F: disp_functor
  (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
  (two_sided_disp_cat_weq_disp_cat C C D₁)
  (two_sided_disp_cat_weq_disp_cat C C D₂)
(λ x : disp_functor
         (functor_identity (category_binproduct C C))
         (two_sided_disp_cat_weq_disp_cat C C D₁)
         (two_sided_disp_cat_weq_disp_cat C C D₂),
 (∏ x0 : category_binproduct C C, isweq (x x0))
 × disp_functor_ff x) F
≃ is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso C)
    ((invweq
        (two_sided_disp_functor_weq_disp_functor
           (functor_identity C) (functor_identity C)
           D₁ D₂)
      ∘ disp_functor_over_pair_weq
          (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
          (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂))%weq
       F)

      apply is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_weq.
  
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
(weqtotal2
   (invweq
      (two_sided_disp_functor_weq_disp_functor
         (functor_identity C) (functor_identity C) D₁
         D₂)
    ∘ disp_functor_over_pair_weq
        (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
        (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂))
   (λ F : disp_functor
            (functor_identity
               (category_binproduct C C))
            (two_sided_disp_cat_weq_disp_cat C C D₁)
            (two_sided_disp_cat_weq_disp_cat C C D₂),
    is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_weq F)
 ∘ disp_cat_eq
     (two_sided_disp_cat_weq_disp_cat C C D₁)
     (two_sided_disp_cat_weq_disp_cat C C D₂)
 ∘ make_weq
     (maponpaths (two_sided_disp_cat_weq_disp_cat C C))
     (isweqmaponpaths
        (two_sided_disp_cat_weq_disp_cat C C) D₁ D₂)
 ∘ path_sigma_hprop is_strict_twosided_disp_cat D₁ D₂
     (isaprop_is_strict_twosided_disp_cat (pr1 D₂)))%weq ~
(λ e : D₁ = D₂, idtoiso_fiber_disp e)
 
C: setcategory
D₁, D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
p: D₁ = D₂
(weqtotal2
   (invweq
      (two_sided_disp_functor_weq_disp_functor
         (functor_identity C) (functor_identity C) D₁
         D₂)
    ∘ disp_functor_over_pair_weq
        (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
        (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₂))
   (λ F : disp_functor
            (functor_identity
               (category_binproduct C C))
            (two_sided_disp_cat_weq_disp_cat C C D₁)
            (two_sided_disp_cat_weq_disp_cat C C D₂),
    is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_weq F)
 ∘ disp_cat_eq
     (two_sided_disp_cat_weq_disp_cat C C D₁)
     (two_sided_disp_cat_weq_disp_cat C C D₂)
 ∘ make_weq
     (maponpaths (two_sided_disp_cat_weq_disp_cat C C))
     (isweqmaponpaths
        (two_sided_disp_cat_weq_disp_cat C C) D₁ D₂)
 ∘ path_sigma_hprop is_strict_twosided_disp_cat D₁ D₂
     (isaprop_is_strict_twosided_disp_cat (pr1 D₂)))%weq
  p = idtoiso_fiber_disp p

    
C: setcategory
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
(weqtotal2
   (invweq
      (two_sided_disp_functor_weq_disp_functor
         (functor_identity C) (functor_identity C) D₁
         D₁)
    ∘ disp_functor_over_pair_weq
        (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
        (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁))
   (λ F : disp_functor
            (functor_identity
               (category_binproduct C C))
            (two_sided_disp_cat_weq_disp_cat C C D₁)
            (two_sided_disp_cat_weq_disp_cat C C D₁),
    is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_weq F)
 ∘ disp_cat_eq
     (two_sided_disp_cat_weq_disp_cat C C D₁)
     (two_sided_disp_cat_weq_disp_cat C C D₁)
 ∘ make_weq
     (maponpaths (two_sided_disp_cat_weq_disp_cat C C))
     (isweqmaponpaths
        (two_sided_disp_cat_weq_disp_cat C C) D₁ D₁)
 ∘ path_sigma_hprop is_strict_twosided_disp_cat D₁ D₁
     (isaprop_is_strict_twosided_disp_cat (pr1 D₁)))%weq
  (idpath D₁) = idtoiso_fiber_disp (idpath D₁)

    
C: setcategory
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
isPredicate (is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso C))
C: setcategory
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
pr1
  ((weqtotal2
      (invweq
         (two_sided_disp_functor_weq_disp_functor
            (functor_identity C) (functor_identity C)
            D₁ D₁)
       ∘ disp_functor_over_pair_weq
           (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
           (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁))
      (λ F : disp_functor
               (functor_identity
                  (category_binproduct C C))
               (two_sided_disp_cat_weq_disp_cat C C D₁)
               (two_sided_disp_cat_weq_disp_cat C C D₁),
       is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_weq F)
    ∘ disp_cat_eq
        (two_sided_disp_cat_weq_disp_cat C C D₁)
        (two_sided_disp_cat_weq_disp_cat C C D₁)
    ∘ make_weq
        (maponpaths
           (two_sided_disp_cat_weq_disp_cat C C))
        (isweqmaponpaths
           (two_sided_disp_cat_weq_disp_cat C C) D₁ D₁)
    ∘ path_sigma_hprop is_strict_twosided_disp_cat D₁
        D₁
        (isaprop_is_strict_twosided_disp_cat (pr1 D₁)))%weq
     (idpath D₁)) =
pr1 (idtoiso_fiber_disp (idpath D₁))

    
C: setcategory
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
isPredicate (is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso C))

      
C: setcategory
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
x: D₁ -->[ identity_z_iso C] D₁
isaprop (is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso C) x)

      apply isaprop_is_z_iso_disp.
    
C: setcategory
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
pr1
  ((weqtotal2
      (invweq
         (two_sided_disp_functor_weq_disp_functor
            (functor_identity C) (functor_identity C)
            D₁ D₁)
       ∘ disp_functor_over_pair_weq
           (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
           (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁))
      (λ F : disp_functor
               (functor_identity
                  (category_binproduct C C))
               (two_sided_disp_cat_weq_disp_cat C C D₁)
               (two_sided_disp_cat_weq_disp_cat C C D₁),
       is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_weq F)
    ∘ disp_cat_eq
        (two_sided_disp_cat_weq_disp_cat C C D₁)
        (two_sided_disp_cat_weq_disp_cat C C D₁)
    ∘ make_weq
        (maponpaths
           (two_sided_disp_cat_weq_disp_cat C C))
        (isweqmaponpaths
           (two_sided_disp_cat_weq_disp_cat C C) D₁ D₁)
    ∘ path_sigma_hprop is_strict_twosided_disp_cat D₁
        D₁
        (isaprop_is_strict_twosided_disp_cat (pr1 D₁)))%weq
     (idpath D₁)) =
pr1 (idtoiso_fiber_disp (idpath D₁))

    
C: setcategory
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
isPredicate
  (twosided_disp_functor_laws (identity_z_iso C)
     (identity_z_iso C) D₁ D₁)
C: setcategory
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
pr11 ((weqtotal2
         (invweq
            (two_sided_disp_functor_weq_disp_functor
               (functor_identity C)
               (functor_identity C) D₁ D₁)
          ∘ disp_functor_over_pair_weq
              (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
              (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁))
         (λ F : disp_functor
                  (functor_identity
                     (category_binproduct C C))
                  (two_sided_disp_cat_weq_disp_cat C C
                     D₁)
                  (two_sided_disp_cat_weq_disp_cat C C
                     D₁),
          is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_weq F)
       ∘ disp_cat_eq
           (two_sided_disp_cat_weq_disp_cat C C D₁)
           (two_sided_disp_cat_weq_disp_cat C C D₁)
       ∘ make_weq
           (maponpaths
              (two_sided_disp_cat_weq_disp_cat C C))
           (isweqmaponpaths
              (two_sided_disp_cat_weq_disp_cat C C) D₁
              D₁)
       ∘ path_sigma_hprop is_strict_twosided_disp_cat
           D₁ D₁
           (isaprop_is_strict_twosided_disp_cat
              (pr1 D₁)))%weq (idpath D₁)) =
pr11 (idtoiso_fiber_disp (idpath D₁))

    
C: setcategory
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
isPredicate
  (twosided_disp_functor_laws (identity_z_iso C)
     (identity_z_iso C) D₁ D₁)

      
C: setcategory
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
x: twosided_disp_functor_data (identity_z_iso C)
  (identity_z_iso C) D₁ D₁
isaprop
  (twosided_disp_functor_laws (identity_z_iso C)
     (identity_z_iso C) D₁ D₁ x)

      apply isaprop_twosided_disp_functor_laws.
    
C: setcategory
D₁: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
pr11 ((weqtotal2
         (invweq
            (two_sided_disp_functor_weq_disp_functor
               (functor_identity C)
               (functor_identity C) D₁ D₁)
          ∘ disp_functor_over_pair_weq
              (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁)
              (twosided_disp_cat_to_disp_cat C C D₁))
         (λ F : disp_functor
                  (functor_identity
                     (category_binproduct C C))
                  (two_sided_disp_cat_weq_disp_cat C C
                     D₁)
                  (two_sided_disp_cat_weq_disp_cat C C
                     D₁),
          is_z_iso_disp_strict_twosided_disp_cat_weq F)
       ∘ disp_cat_eq
           (two_sided_disp_cat_weq_disp_cat C C D₁)
           (two_sided_disp_cat_weq_disp_cat C C D₁)
       ∘ make_weq
           (maponpaths
              (two_sided_disp_cat_weq_disp_cat C C))
           (isweqmaponpaths
              (two_sided_disp_cat_weq_disp_cat C C) D₁
              D₁)
       ∘ path_sigma_hprop is_strict_twosided_disp_cat
           D₁ D₁
           (isaprop_is_strict_twosided_disp_cat
              (pr1 D₁)))%weq (idpath D₁)) =
pr11 (idtoiso_fiber_disp (idpath D₁))

    apply idpath.
Qed.


is_univalent cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat


is_univalent cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat

  
is_univalent cat_of_setcategory
is_univalent_disp disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat

  
is_univalent cat_of_setcategory
 exact is_univalent_cat_of_setcategory.
  
is_univalent_disp disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat
 exact is_univalent_disp_disp_cat_of_strict_twosided_disp_cat.
Qed.
